name: ...cats
description: *cats is all about the immersive digital art experience - we gift a high-fidelity LED live visualscape, where we host a roster of visual and sound artists, with a bias towards experimental art forms.

name: 17 Virgins
description: Invites you to the transdimensional portal. Come explore our 250' long tunnel to another universe! Who knows you may find a hidden doorway to the party of your dreams.

name: 2 girls 1 camp
description:
We're slinging slushies—The No.1 (Yellow) and The No.2 (Brown).
Fiber-spiked for flow, booze-spiked for fun.

Join us in the Center Camp Oculus for traditional coconut oil wrestling—thumbs welcome, dignity optional, hilarity guaranteed.

The beauty of Black Rock City is we are all on equal ground--in fact, we're 3,907 feet above sea level, and so are you! We are Elevators, here to Elevate your experience. Elevate yourself with our 12' tall Mood Swing! We will gladly supply you with (mis) information while you have a drink at the bar, then browse our clothing boutique for all the latest fashions. Be sure to join in our classes including make your own Rope Man, followed by a dive into our expanded pit of 1000 rubber chickens!

name: 42 Ramen
description: We know the answer to the ultimate question. If you know it, come and tell us to claim your yummy prize.

name: 7 Sirens Cove
description: A pirate bohemia since 2011 where merrymaking, mermaid lounging, dancing rhythms and mischief run aground. Beware, it is futile to resist the 7 Siren's call!

name: 706 Tribe
description:
Where scattered stories meet - 
a diaspora of makers and dreamers, kindred spirits building home in the nowhere.

Ink in the wind. Roots in the dust. Home in each other.

name: 8-bit Bunny
description: Our steam sauna is open every day. Sweet out the dust and leave cleaner than you have ever been on playa. Feeling adventurous? Spin the wheel at our bar for a drink. Rabbit ears encouraged, but not required.

name: A Shack of Sit
description:
Do you feel like belting out a karaoke song or letting out your frustrations in our rage cage (uncaged)? Are you looking for a great spot to sit, grab some cold water, and watch the world go by while getting your nails painted, moisturizing your face, and enjoying a percussive massage? Are you looking for the Mensa Camp?
Come visit A Shack of Sit; where sit happens. We will be waiting for you in Snowflake Village.

name: A Touchy Subject
description: A shady spot to relax, confess, break the ice, forget about a postcard, meet a friend, or get away. Brought to you by those shady folks who didn't serve waffles.

name: A Transformation Station
description:
Explore, Engage, Evolve: Transformation at A Transformation Station.

Step into a space where grounded healing, interactive experiences, and playful experimentation come together. By day, join workshops in breathwork, meditation, movement, and conscious technology, or sign up for one-on-one sessions inside our climate-controlled sanctuary. By night, engage in music, salons, and participatory gatherings that blend introspection with expression.

A Transformation Station is designed for those seeking real connection, personal growth, and shared exploration. We offer fewer, more intentional experiences held with care, inviting participants to slow down, tune in, and actively co-create the moment.

Come as you are. Leave with something shifted.

name: A-PLAYA-MASK
description: Breathe easy with the Maskman's quality N-95 Dusk Masks with the non toxic psychedelic Burning Man logo. And don't forget our Breathe Easy nose plugs, BM Stickers, and Pins.

name: AAA Astro Accessible Arcade
description: A Space Age-inspired camp featuring accessible arcade games, immersive experiences, and a community space designed for radical inclusion. Think retro-futurism meets playa magic where everyone can play, connect, and experience wonder.

name: Aah Wonder
description: Offers Thai coconut bites (Kanom Krok) and Thai iced tea inspired by our members' favorite experiences traveling around the world. While waiting for your fresh off the griddle treat, step into our shaded lounge space with rugs, pillows, and cool mist fans. There, you can relax and enjoy connecting with new people and playing conversational and hands-on games. All ages welcome!

name: Abominable Base Camp
description: Home of the Yeti Mob. We host a welcoming base camp for BRC citizens--providing cool daytime vibes and an immersive lit nighttime environment. ABC will have live DJs, parties, workshops, a book nook, and a bar for custom infused vodka tasting. Come get abominable with us.

name: Above & Below
description: Art Support Camp for Above and Below Honorarium Art Installation.

name: Abraxas Camp
description:
Abraxas Dragon has been on playa since 2006, providing incredible music, art and vibes. This year is the 20th Anniversary of Abraxas!

Abraxas has a history of being one of the most recognizable and photogenic art cars on the playa. We believe that art car magic can be created with dedication, commitment and basic tools and supplies. We live this dream and aspire to show burners that they can too.

name: Abstininthe
description: The friendly bar on the playa, providing our special drink to the thirsty of BRC since the last millennium. Come try our many flavors and enjoy the music, ambiance and conversation of our neighborhood bar. Now serving non-alcoholic shrubs.

name: Accult
description: Black Rock City's preeminent venue for ascending to the next plane of existence. Come to us in order to register for planar ascension and join us in our standardized ritual initiation or SRI. We look forward to collecting you.. er uhm we mean assisting you in the next stage of your planar journey.

name: Acid On Ice
description: Step into a snowstorm of silliness at Acid on Ice! We're a frosty oasis serving chilled vibes, mulled wines, and warm welcomes. Join us at our snow-themed lounge and bar for mist-cooled hangouts, icy karaoke, and popsicle mischief. Whether you're escaping the heat or diving into connection, our camp is your winter wonderland in the dust.

name: Acorn Oasis
description: Welcome to the Department of Radical Self-Projection a future-bureaucratic agency temporarily stationed in Black Rock City to credential citizens for the world of Tomorrow, Today. At our futuristic field office, participants are interviewed, pose for a quantum mugshot, and receive their laminated Playa SurReal ID: a license for the soul they're becoming. Get certified by our Licensing Specialists by day, and return at night to witness the Orb of Source Identity a luminous, timeline-jumping relic. The Department of Radical Self-Projection proudly recognizes radical self-expression across all dimensions, timelines, and realities.

name: ADHz
description:
At its core, ADHz is sound sanctuary built around an Hi-Fi infra-sub audio system tuned down to 19 Hz, wrapped in a cozy & vibrant living-room vibe.
DJs/Producers showcase their music through a sound system that produces frequencies which are not just heard, but deeply felt. Settle into deep bass sound baths, watch live painting unfold, or just hang and connect. Everyone is empowered to dance, listen, connect, decompress, and simply be at ADHz!

name: AdramaNation
description: An all inclusive and diverse camp focusing on a drama free and fun filled burn. Delicious delicacies, hydration, art, weddings, burnercise, and good company are to be found with us. Whether you need a safe space to escape your drama or a place to meet new friends, you're always welcome here.

name: adult playground
description:
Simple human connection. We offer daily sessions including Morning Flow, 
Midday Reset, and an evening social hour that creates an easy space for people 
to meet and unwind. Our main attraction is a tall oiled slide that invites 
participants to let go and play like kids again, with camp members on hand to 
keep everything safe and fun. On select afternoons we gift authentic fried 
pizza made fresh in camp. Throughout the day visitors can drop in for 
stretching, grounding, conversation, or a moment of shade. Adult Playground 
is a relaxed, friendly space designed to help people reset, connect, and enjoy 
the lighter side of the playa.

name: AerialKnotics
description: We teach, we share, we tie people up and might set them on fire, we impact with pleasure. Our passion is gifting our BDSM knowledge including beginner to intermediate rope bondage and impact play classes, aerial bondage Shibari performances, and daily meditation with a Kinky Monk. Waste your precious time in our dungeon— please BYOFUT (Bring Your Own Fucked Up Toys).

name: Afterglow
description: That wonderful feeling that lingers long after the experience has elapsed - a feeling that only occurs when the mind, body, and soul has been ever so stimulated. Our gift to the Playa and to its dear citizens is Afterglow!

name: Afterglow Lounge & Spa
description: A communal space of nurturement where wandering burners can rejuvenate, relax and recharge. A caring place where burners can restore and reignite their radiant glow. Come to enjoy the spa, grab a drink and relax at the lounge, or get weird to the sound of our beats to show off that new sexy glow!

name: Airpusher Collective
description: The Airpusher camp is the port from which our fantastical airship begins and ends her voyages.  Join us for music and joy.  Check our event schedule and meet us at camp prior to our published airship rides to playa and beyond.

name: Airstreameri and What Not
description: Home to Playa's Best Postcards! Come create one-of-a-kind art postcards filled with love and playa magic for the people you cherish back in the default world.

name: Alborz
description: If you find yourself parched and disoriented, listen carefully. Follow the melody and you may just stumble across camp Alborz. We'll be happy to nurture your body and soul before we send you back off to find the next adventure.

name: Alchemist Bazaar
description: Alchemist Bazaar by PlayAlchemist is a mythic, medieval-inspired city, a living world of winding pathways, hidden courtyards, and immersive encounters. Enclosed like an ancient walled village, it invites wanderers into a realm where discovery unfolds at every turn. Pathways draw participants inward toward a central fire, the beating heart of the city, radiating ritual and connection. Within its walls, low-lit chambers, secret passages, and intimate sanctuaries reveal art, music, storytelling, and ceremony. Each space stewarded by artists offering unique expressions that blur the line between participant and creator. The Bazaar is the feminine counterpart to the Pyramid's order, a place of mystery, play, and transformation, where one may lose their way only to find something deeper.

name: Alchemy Stop
description: Alchemy Stop is a dusty sanctuary for anyone to enjoy a quiet musical retreat with a cold hand-made limoncello in hand. Look for our open bar - we will be welcoming you with open arms.

name: Alice in Slumberland
description:
The oldest Alice themed bar on the playa is back, but much less Alice-themed than you'd expect!

Known for intricate cocktails and zany decor, this year the bar returns and it will be nastier than nasty.

The extremely obvious speakeasy for a one time event, and we promise you won't believe what you will see behind the bar !

We offer our classic chill lounge with Tarot readings wednesday afternoon, you know what to expect for the rest of the week or for the rest of your life.

Hungry and want to party all together ? 
Carbs meet chaos. We serve raviolis while DJs spin some tunes. Party with us until 23:00 fueled by pasta and playa magic on Wednesday.

name: Alma Borekas
description:
Moroccan atmosphere with Middle Eastern influence. Traditional chilling area and an open bar serving signature cocktails from 12 PM to 2 PM. 

Our legendary Borekas will be served on Tuesday, and mint tea will warm you up at night.
Our welcoming seating area is for YOU to relax or go partying, depending on the hour.

name: Alter Ego
description: Camp ALTER EGO creates experiences through art that challenge and expand one's sense of self.

name: Alternative Energy Zone
description: A camp where you can come learn about how you can create a solar system to take care of your power needs large or small. 11am daily. Get a cocktail or pancakes, learn to figure draw and even get a positive attitude adjustment. We have Wifi gifted from the BM Org, shade and technical support from Solar to Excel...

name: Altitude Lounge
description: Come lounge on our tower anytime, any day. Get the best view of the playa and see what you helped create. Enjoy our down-tempo beats leading into sunset.

name: Amateur Hour Playa Pub
description: Welcome, dusty wanderer! Follow the sounds of clanging horseshoes and cheersing beers to cold keg-poured beer/cider and electrolyte salvation. Shaded lounge, backyard games, space for melting, mingling and a swing set for drifting. Bar runs 12—4, Mon—Fri (maybe Sat if the kegs behave). Come thirsty. Stay weird.

name: AMAZONE
description:
Draws its spirit from the Amazon - the largest river system on Earth and one of the most biodiverse places in existence. We are a Brazilian-rooted community that honors South American heritage while welcoming people from all over the world into our family. We believe in showing up fully: to work, to celebrate, to heal, and to connect. Our camp is built around that commitment, offering a rich mix of ceremonial and embodied experiences: Amazonian plant medicine, ice plunges, vibroacoustic therapy, ecstatic dance, cacao ceremonies, and the kind of music and food that makes strangers feel like family.
Come for the pizza. Stay for the community. 2026 marks our 10th burn. We have every reason to celebrate and we intend to.

name: AmberDust
description: A retro-futuristic lounge camp built around the AmberDust Express art installation, blending interactive lights, music, shade, and spontaneous social chaos. Wander in for glowing nighttime vibes, unexpected conversations, late-night dancing, and our legendary returning sausage parties. By day, relax in our shaded gathering space; by night, watch the camp transform into an illuminated social playground. Come curious, leave slightly confused and hopefully well-fed.

name: Amma
description: Meaning: "Mother", we create and hold space for everyone. This is our offering. A communal oasis. A home. A place to be curious and feel nourished. To reset and share our gifts. All are welcome. All are free. All are one.

name: Amulet
description: Whether you seek magic or inspiration, join us at Camp Amulet for a morning pineapple pancake, and find out where and when our next Amulet pop-up will be. At our Amulet table, you'll be gifted a brass dog tag; pre-stamped with the Burning Man symbol. Our highly skilled Amulet Counselors will guide and inspire you to make your mark, and answer the great pressing questions of your life as you customize your Amulet. Using metal stamping tools you can add names, numbers, symbols, astrological signs, and Viking runes. After you have all the answers, we'll put your Amulet on a necklace, keychain or bracelet for you when you're finished.

name: And Then There's Only Love
description:
Home of the world famous Orgy Dome — where couples & moresomes of all orientations are invited to come and play. We welcome the combination of love in all forms.

We're a sex-positive, inclusionary, and exploratory space that's been a place of fire, fun, and passion since 2003.

Everyone wishing to enter the Orgy Dome receives a detailed orientation covering Informed Enthusiastic Consent. Remember, anything other than an enthusiastic YES means NO!

Our (relatively) dust free and air conditioned space is designed for people to experience social sexuality in a safe and respectful way. We have a 'Just Us' and an 'Open to More' section — so monogamous & non-monogamous folks are all welcome.

name: Anonymous Village
description: Anonymous Village is a supportive community to help burners stay sober in the challenging environment of the playa and BRC. Members staff the Village hospitality tent and lead recovery meetings in communal meeting space. Recovery Yoga is available daily at 10:30am in the Yoga tent. We offer a daily meeting schedule including meetings of AA (Alcoholics Anonymous), NA (Narcotics Anonymous), Alanon, SAA/SLAA, FA/OA, CoDA, MA, and PIR. We also host sober camping as well as a separate area for Alanon's and recovery friends/allies. We also offer "AnyA" meetings daily that offer an inclusive environment for people recovering from addiction to "ANY" behavior or substance. We welcome curious burners who want to learn about how we burn sober.

name: ANTIIX
description:
ANTIIX where we are Anti-Icks and always up for kicks. 
A Shady place to meet for drinks, laughs, chats, music, who knows what else!

name: Apokalyptika
description: We are proud to be an eco conscious kamp that strives to re-envision waste materials into art. Come chill out with us and have a beverage in our post Apokalpytikally themed sunset bar and 24 hr lounge, or play with our eclectic collection of installations and games.

name: Apotheneum
description:
Defined as a "place of divine elevation" it is a visual, sonic and haptic instrument intended to "transport" visitors through participatory immersion. Comprised of two nested chambers made of back-to-back LED nets (13,940 nodes in all), Apotheneum presents multiple canvases for collaborating visual artists and an immersive sound system for collaborating sound artists. Measuring 40 x 40 x 40 feet, Apotheneum's cubic antechamber envelops a thirty-foot "inner sanctum" that opens to the sky and is anchored by a 24-foot pressure-sensing "bed" on which visitors are invited to recline, and be transported.

At night, evoking aspects of the natural world: wind, fire, lightning, rain, stars, gravity, people and animals, Apotheneum encourages inward contemplation through multi-sensory somatic immersion.

name: Après Ski Injury
description:
An interactive camp offering an Après-Ski Bar, a Morning Coffee Bar as well as a thrill ride: A ski ramp in the middle of the desert! Our bar is open every afternoon till late night and offers not only drinks, but entertainment, fun games and fire.
You can also ski!

We will have also events (see WhatWhereWhen) and ski-races.

name: Après-Ski
description:
Shimmering on the horizon is a sight that shouldn't exist: a pocket of Swiss mountain magic in the middle of a prehistoric lake bed. An Alpine outpost where high-altitude hospitality meets the Playa dust.
By day, seek refuge in our Ski Cabin Wine Bar. We're gifting crisp Swiss pours and mountain vibes to the soundtrack of Euro-house. Feeling bold? Take on the Ski Pass Challenge? and who knows where you may end up.. Perhaps in a fluffy fur lined speakeasy?

Follow the scent of roasting potatoes and Alpine funk to our doorstep for an interactive feast of bubbling cheese and laughter. Whether you're here for the vintage, the challenge, or the midnight melt, the mountains are calling... and they taste like home.

name: Arctic Court
description: Multi national art support camp of Arctic Court 360

name: Argonauts
description: Cherish the uncertain, challenge fear, welcome the odd, and seek thyself! The Argonauts bring a unique and infectious spirit which we share across the playa and in conjunction with reenergizing camp activities including our high-noon ArgoDogs. Besides our Argonaut spirit and noontime hot dogs, our gifts include Argonaut dust, sun & fashion bandanas and spiritually-assigned individual Quests for each newly inducted Argonaut for the coming year.

name: Armageddon Bike Camp
description: It's not the end of the world, it's the safe word! Think Armageddon for all your bike needs. We've been providing Bike Love Bike Repair on-playa for almost 20 years, and we offer professional bike repair daily. Or fix your own bike at our Public Bike Repair station, 24x7! We also host great parties, don't miss our Wednesday afternoon Alley Cat Race and After Party with Funny Bike Demo! Our well-stocked BoozeBar opens on (polite) demand. Blend yourself a refreshing frozen beverage on our Blender Bike while you're there! Our 28ft dome 'living room' / shade structure provides the perfect hang-out space, no matter the weather. Open to visitors 24x7. Drop in any time!

name: ARMÉ - Army of Love
description:
A camp built around the idea of love as a force that moves people, not a concept. We create a space where connection feels natural, presence matters, and everyone contributes to the atmosphere around them.

Our shaded cooling and tea space offers a place to slow down, reset, and share a moment with others in the middle of the chaos.

Alongside the camp, we support a large-scale art installation that adds another layer to the experience, inviting people to step into something bigger than themselves.

This is a space for real interaction, openness, and the kind of energy you can feel when people actually show up for each other.

name: Art Car Camp
description:
on Playa since 1994
a Place to gather and get your issues resolved 
To reunite with old friends and make new ones
Gandhi's Garage for mechanical issues
Barter Bob's Lost Camp Supplies for Gear
Lady LaLaLa for seeing your Tomorrow Today through her many skills
Catch a ride on the Mighty Zenith's little brother TV MV

name: Art for Art's Sake
description: A place for one-on-one discussions about art. Come to sit with one other "rando" and talk to each other about "What art means to you", "What art moves you", and "Why art". This camp is open most nights from 8pm to midnight. We are just a few people with a few chairs for pairs of people that wanna talk art.

name: Art Haus
description: A collective of musicians and dancers dedicated to creating classical and contemporary productions on playa and sharing their art with the citizens of Black Rock City. We are a mix of professional and recreational artists and their supporters from all over the world.

name: Art Support for Bass Snail
description:
Welcome to the high-desert hub for the Bass Snail Mutant Vehicle and the Idaho Conclave. Located at the intersection of heavy machinery and flow arts, our camp is a vibrant gateway for the Idaho creative community.

When the Bass Snail is docked, visitors can explore the art car, meet the builders, and collect commemorative stickers and patches. Seeking a break from the dust? Relax under our 400 square feet of public shade, a welcoming street-side sanctuary where you can watch the Idaho Conclave during daily flow rehearsals and workshops.

Whether you are here to talk shop with our mechanics, demystify fire safety with performers, or find a friendly place to park your bike, we invite you to experience the Gem State on playa. Look for the glowing snail and the flickering flames.

name: ArtSled
description: Step into a glowing spherical space where creativity and community come alive. Sip tea from a samovar, grab a pencil or marker, and join in collaborative drawing or live karaoke. DJ sets and music fill the air, inviting everyone to dance, relax, or simply enjoy the shared energy. Our camp is open to all, encouraging participation, playful exploration, and connection. Whether you're here to create, perform, or just soak in the vibe, there's a spot for you in our interactive hub.

name: As Above So At Camp
description: We are the support camp for the Honoraria artwork As Above, So Within, a sculptural installation inspired by Persian mythology, mathematics, and fractal geometry. Our crew brings together artists, builders, designers, and fabricators supporting the piece from build through strike. The work explores the ancient idea that the patterns above us are reflected within us, using form, light, and computation. Come say hello, meet the team, and learn more about the artwork on playa.

name: Ashram Galactica
description:
The Grand Hotel | Your Home Away From Home Away From Home 

Located Directly Above the Center of the Earth

name: Astral Lab
description:
Enjoy a different sound on the playa this year. Immerse yourself in psychedelic trance soundscapes that blur the lines of party and ceremony. 

Astral Project with us in our interactive musical playground. 

All beings, All hours, All welcome.

name: Astral Outpost
description: Astral Outpost is a place where the ethereal meets the earthly.

name: Astro Cats
description: We invite all burners to chill at the Flying Saucer Lounge with special cocktails during the day, and hot or cold sake or premium Tequila at the Dragon Lounge during the evening. You can enjoy acrobatic, fire dancing performance and workshops at scheduled times, and a place to practice and spin fire with us. If you want to join our kitties for morning yoga or a afternoon tandem running race, bring your mat to stretch and pose with us You can chill on our chairs and watch people pass by while sipping our special drinks. You can learn to be a puppet master and perform at our Improv Puppet Theatre. You can challenge yourself to walk the plank, or play the game of Giant Jenga, or play poker at our game table while enjoying your sake. Yes, we also invite your for our night sky star tours!

name: ASTRO SHACK JaVa JoINt
description: Delicious coffee served in a cool space with extraordinary hospitality. Fresh ground French press dark roast brewed black as the depths of interstellar space itself (BYO creamer if you must adulterate). The hangout for quasi-legal alien beatniks, mutant cyborg gear heads, trans-solar scooter gangs, radical anarchist raypunks, neuroatypical geeks, freaked-out psychonauts, and caffeine fiends of every stripe.

name: Astropups
description: Fun, Frisky, and Fabulous! Exploring the Playaverse one Open Heart at a time.

name: Ataraxia
description: We're a safe space to: Chill. Laugh. Dance. Meet. Experience. Learn.

name: Atlantis
description: Returning from the dust with mezcal, myth, and music. Our lounge is open 24/7. Two DJ parties to incite dance rituals. By day: tea, meditation, and rest. By night: light, rhythm, and strange delights. Come curious. Stay so long that you forget why you came.

name: Atom Cult
description:
Cool yourself down with a variety of Fission Ice Cream offerings at noon!
Get lost in our Garden of Lost Apparatus!
Relax and recharge both yourself and your portable electronics in our Reactor Dome!

name: Atomic Octopus
description: A friendly neighborhood dive. Pay no attention to the 30 foot steampunk atomic octopus at the back of the shade structure. Part of 404: Village Not Found.

name: Atomic Pussy Photo Lounge
description: Come visit what is easily the 3rd best Bar/Lounge and Photo Booth on the playa. Returning this year is Weir(d) Wednesday, when we'll be serving up a hero dose of the Grateful Dead all afternoon. Also returning this year is our twin-tip, reverse camber Shot-Ski (for those playa face shots), the Elaine Benes Dance Experience (dance classes for dance-introverts) — and of course the photobooth, photo art, and photo gifts. Noon-6pm M-T-W-Th-F. Lounge space is 24 hrs.

name: Aurora
description: Konnichiwa, pardner. Whether you're coming home from a long night in the saddle or just mounting up for the day, join us for a fresh bowl of ramen that'll soothe both body and soul. Sidle up to our cozy bar, share a tale with a stranger, and settle your spirit to the sweet sounds of smooth grooves.

name: Avant Garden
description:
We are a small Burning Man camp focused on creating community and connection both on and off Playa. We maintain a camp size of around 20 members, mostly based in the San Francisco/Bay Area.
At night on Playa, our Brothel will serve hot, steamy broth to people who want a cozy place to hang out and warm up.

name: Awesomesauce
description: We are a Unicorn ranch decorated in bright fuchsia pink, lights and unicorns. We run an afternoon and early evening bar, called The unStable, serving our unique 'Unicorn Tears' and a dress up bar. We also host daily events such as Square Dancing, Advice, & Crafting.

name: Awkward & Tawdry Lounge
description: Part bar. Part lounge. Part sing. Part dance. Part chill. Part Shoot Your Balls Off. 100% Awkward & Tawdry.

name: Axis of Stillness
description: A quiet presence amid the storm - an 8-foot mosaic pyramid rises from the playa, its hand-crafted glass panels glowing with color-shifting light from within. Axis of Stillness is an invitation to pause, breathe, and find your center. Built by a family of makers and 18-year Burning Man veterans, the installation celebrates the art of mosaic and the power of stillness. Come find the eye of the hurricane.

name: Aya The Tiger
description: We are a healing-centered camp offering psychedelic peer support, yoga, meditation, and a sacred tobacco ceremony. Our team includes experienced volunteers, therapists, and physicians trained in harm reduction and emotional care. We provide a calm, welcoming sanctuary for anyone in need of grounding, connection, or support throughout the week.

name: B.E.D Bureau of Erotic Discourse
description: Our camp is dedicated to promoting consent culture at Burning Man by ensuring every theme camp has a BEDucator. We believe in the importance of education and empowerment when it comes to fostering a safe and consensual environment on the playa. Our team of passionate volunteers is committed to providing information and resources to help every camp create a respectful and inclusive space for their participants. Join us in our mission to make Burning Man a place where consent is prioritized and respected by all.

name: BAAAHS Station
description:
We're the home of BAAAHS: the Big-Ass Amazingly Awesome Homosexual Sheep. You might know us as the 40-foot long rolling disco whose entrance, naturally, is through the pulsing pink sphincter in the rear. Day and night, we graze on the playa...laser eyeballs shining, beloved DJs spinning, dancy people flocking.
BAAAHS Station is our central depot where everyone is welcome to kick up your hooves. Come for our daily dance parties, get a view from our four-story watchtower, enjoy a lovely beverage from our friendly bartenders, and meet a homo or two.
We're builders, artists, and techies at heart. Our DJ line-up combines world-famous names with up-and-cumming performers, with a focus on featuring queer artists. Our mission - Shear queer bliss.

name: Backfire
description:
A small camp composed of ASL signers that loves to bring a little bit of their community and experience to the citizens of Black Rock City! 

We have Vietnamese Coffee and ASL every morning, along with our popular Lil Fixit Shop if you have something that needs fixing.

Or come by in the afternoon to check out our ASL confessional booth!

name: Backstage
description: Backstage is an interactive electronic music camp built as a rotating audience-to-artist-to-crew ritual. Part social music installation and part anti-spectator experience, it invites guests into a structured participation loop of backstage creation, onstage performance, and front of house support. Participants create a track in a guided music studio behind the stage, hear it come alive on stage, then help light the next act before returning to the dance floor. We also host live experimental electronic music, dance parties, and late night ambient sets.

name: Baconeers
description:
Come visit the BACONEERS for BACON, BOOZE and BEATS! 5 huge parties featuring 90's Hip-Hop, break-beats, funk and more. We're cooking up more than 400 pounds of bacon this year, so come get your fix. Come pick up some rubber shoe covers all week in case it ever rains while you're out! Evening videos, karaoke and periodic bacon sightings! Sunday from 6-10 PM. Tuesday from 2-5 PM. Thursday from 2-5 PM. Friday from 7:00 - ?
Hot Yoga on Monday, Wednesday and Saturday, too!

name: Bad Asstronauts
description: The Bad Asstronauts are an Earth-based collective with stations in Denver and San Francisco. We will take care of all your musical and libation needs. Our DJs will blow your mind with electrifying beats on our upgraded sound system to bring you an incredible new audio and visual experience. Quench your thirst with our extraordinary elixirs crafted by our skilled mixologists at the Moontang Bar. Step into our chill lounge, the Planetarium, where you can find tranquility while gazing at celestial wonders projected above. We look forward to continuing to be the best gateway to the galaxy on playa since 2015.

name: Bad Boy's Discover Your Kinks
description: Introductions to BDSM for the Vanilla but Curious and those new to the Kink community

name: Bad Idea
description: Welcome to Camp Bad Idea, where we proudly present the Thumberdome! Picture a tiny cage filled with contestants in equally tiny costumes, ready for the ultimate test of strength — thumb wrestling! Join scheduled tournaments, craft miniature costumes, or attend thumb wrestling workshops. Reveal your inner sock puppet thespian. Wonder at our rope suspension demonstrations. Embrace the absurdity, laughter, and warmth of our camp. Whether you're a participant or spectator, there's never a dull moment at Bad Idea!

name: badlands
description:
Badlands is a live music open jam camp. 
Formed in 2011, we have always had a drum kit (or 3), amps, guitar, bass, keys, and a PA with microphones available for anyone that wants to come by and play. All levels of musicianship (within reason haha) are welcome!! We are open from 3-7 Mon-Fri and oftentimes have random night jams too! We have topless bartenders and bottomless drinks at our bar and a comfy shaded area with games and couches to relax, enjoy music and get out of the sun.

name: Bag o' Dicks
description: Free-spirited camp bringing the good beats and the friendliest Bag o' Dicks you'll ever meet. Look for the giant LED dicks lighting up the sky — you truly can't miss us. A Bag o' Dicks isn't always a bad thing— come inspect our dicks and form your own highly professional opinion. Warm your dick by our bonfire most nights (and those "how is it already sunrise—" mornings too). Good vibes, questionable maturity, and zero judgment — just the way we like our dicks.

name: Baggage Check
description:
Check your Emotional Baggage with us. Spend time with us to create a better world for yourself! By writing down your emotional baggage you don't have to carry it with you; use that freed up emotional headspace to cultivate and connect with your future! We'll turn your emotional baggage into ashes and celebrate your newfound self-actualization at the temple burn. 

Stop by any time of the day or night, lounge in our super comfy dome, treat yourself to our pamper station, get out of the sun, or join a dance party in progress. We have a full slate of events every day - whether it's our Afternoon Oasis Sanctuary, Liquid Alchemy, giant Cuddle Puddle, Consent Workshop, Hypnotising Eye-Gazing Session, or a Topsy Turvy Happy Hour - we have something for you and welcome all with open arms!

name: Bao Chicka Wow Wow
description:
Come hungry, not hangry.
Visit Bao Chicka Wow Wow to taste our bao (dim sum buns)!

Fill your belly with our fresh and delicious steamed-to-order pork, red-bean, and custard bao.

Hours:
Sunday Sunset: 5pm - 8pm (SUN)
Brunch: 11am - 2pm (MON, TUES, WED)

name: Bar Fallover
description: Your local bar. Your home away from home when at home. Offering questionable advise and altered philosophies.

name: BAR MACTROPOLIS
description: We are a full-service Bar. All are welcome. In the morning, we serve coffee, extra libation, and blood Mary's! For the rest of the day come by for a blended drink that you can blend with our custom-made blender or enjoy a cocktail or beer. Our music is chill and our bartenders the best!

name: Barbie Day Spa
description: Get pampered at Barbie Day Spa: Fingernail painting, foot soaks, foot massage, body wash, erotic massage, cold drinks.

name: Barbie Death Village
description: Barbie Death Village is a delight to the eyes and the mind. Our camp features the Infamous Barbie Art - 1500 Barbies marching into the Barbie Dream Chipper. Barbie's street fronts are full of a range of interactivity! Swim up to our Barbie Swim Up Bar for a drink, enjoy our artistic Barbie-based silliness, stay for one of our many events which range from Pewter Casting, Liquid Light Show, Midnight Toast, Morning Mimosas (Sat), and so much more. Keep an eye out for and take a ride on our beloved Mutant Vehicle: The Barbie Whorehouse (It is not just a Whorehouse, it is a Whore Home.)

name: Barbots: Baby Needs A Break
description: Feeling dusty, crooked, or cosmically misaligned? Does Baby Need a Break? The Barbots have you covered. Wander in for pop up bar hours, spa style pampering, karaoke, champagne saber lessons, and our famous Struggle Bus for anyone whose Burn has gone sideways. Recover at Tuesday Bruncho de los Muertos, branch out at Wednesday Cosmic Treehouse Happy Hour, realign your dusty axis at the Day Spa, or bounce through the Cosmic Portal of Doom. Expect strong drinks, shady lounging, and plenty of questionable life decisions.

name: Base Camp
description: Home and landing pad for the Metro Chop mutant vehicle. A working camp where stuff gets done so the Black Rock City can have some fun.

name: Bat Haus
description: Art support camp

name: Battle Born Burners
description: Come play, drink and lounge with us. The only bar on the playa with Nevada-tude!

name: Bearwhalea
description: They frame the wildest theories upon the most irrelevant facts, or upon the merest fancies. Mr. Darwin thinks that whales may be bears which have enormously increased their bulk, washed their paws into fins by constant swimming, and stretched their mouths by keeping them open to catch insects in the water. So also he thinks that men and women may have been developed out of monkeys, monkeys out of mushrooms, and mushrooms out of " monads," or little clots of jelly. Where is the proof? Where is a single instance of a bearwhale, or a man-monkey, to be seen? Of course there is not one.

name: Beats 'n Deets
description:
Don't lose your shit when you lose your shit. Label it first at Beats 'n Deets. We make labels for all your stuff with a mug shot style photo with you and your camp details on it making it easy for people to return it to you or easy to find at lost and found. And it's a great souvenir. 
Come join us for drinks in our circus tent with animated projections on the wall and some of the most underrated DJ's on the playa.
And debuting this year, The Smile High Club. Towering nearly 20 feet above the Playa, soak in the views-or just be a soak.

name: Beaverton
description: Camp Beaverton is an intentional, experimental, and experiential Burning Man community theme camp and a legacy sapphic nonprofit organization. Not queer? No fear! We're straight friendly! We are a group of queer women/trans/genderqueer/lesbian/bisexual/heterosexual/etc... or folks who are simply as wayward as the playa is dusty. We celebrate sexuality, self exploration, and respect for one's journey through this life. Our goal is to provide a safe(r), brave(r) space that centers queer women, trans folks, and nonbinary identities on and off-playa. We encourage education, participation, inquiry, conversation, and self-reflection. We extend our goals to the greater Black Rock community by hosting workshops and social events.

name: Best Butt
description: Camp Best Butt is dedicated to the relentless appreciation and promotion of all things buttocks related. How do you achieve the Best Butt? It's 90% confidence and 10% squats.

name: Best Year Yet
description: Providing the best hot drip coffee on playa every morning. Come enjoy a cup of Joe, a game of cribbage (or learn cribbage) and pay a visit to our magical gaseous eggplant!

name: Better Together
hometown: Zurich, Tel-Aviv, San Diego, New York
description: Better Together Camp is where sparks fly and connections are made, literally, we're not responsible for any Playa-induced lightning strikes. Our Speed Dating isn't your average meet-and-greet; it's all about real conversations, radical self-expression, and a little bit of magic. Whether you're a Burning Man newbie or a dusty veteran, we've got a spot for you to connect, laugh, and maybe even find your Playa soulmate (or just a good chat). In our camp, everyone's welcome, and everyone's encouraged to be their weird, wonderful selves. Come for the speed dating, stay for the unforgettable memories, and remember: we're better together.

name: Betty's Bike Shop
description: Bring your broken bike to our camp and With Consent we will help you get to a Happy Ending. We want you Fixed so you can return that familiar and intimate friend back where it belongs. Right Between your legs! A functional Playa Bike; now that's a Happy Ending! Limited Hours of Happiness so Cum Early for Best Results.

name: Beverly Grillz
description: The playa's home for exotic meats and wacky beatz. We believe in radical inclusion and invite you to participate in our love and nourishment.

name: BigFrankEnergy
description: Come get a hot dog. BigFrankEnergy is Black Rock City's dedicated hot dog theme camp, grilling and gifting franks daily from sunrise runs across the playa to late-night campfire sessions. Daily programming includes The Relish Lab (build your own signature condiment blend), Frank Talks (philosophical debates on the great hot dog questions), Franks and Ranks trivia competition, Hot Dog Couture costume contests, and the Saturday Grand Frank-Off celebration. We believe radical self-expression and the radical gift of a perfectly grilled frankfurter are not mutually exclusive. Find us by the 15-foot illuminated Big Frank Tower.

name: Bike Gods
hometown: Reno, Sacramento, Paris, Salt Lake City
description: Bike trouble got ya down? Come visit the Bike Gods, where we practice self reliant bike repair 24 hours a day. Our camp features 8 fully equipped workstations and spare parts. We have caring and compassionate bike mechanics to assist you M-F 10am-12pm. Out on the Playa, look for our Bike Gods Taxi Service running yellow tandems.

name: Bikini Bottom(less)
description:
Campy, colorful, and delightfully ridiculous...join some of the best-known sea creatures on the playa.

Start your day with morning Tai Chi, then drift over for our daily bottomless mimosas (you and your drink can be bottomless if desired). Feeling athletic? Try the Naked Beer Mile: four beers, one mile, zero clothes, maximum glory.

In the afternoons we transform into an Under the Sea Prom, complete with spiked punch, karaoke, campy accessories, and a photo setup so you can capture the most wonderfully absurd prom pictures for your scrapbook.

Sequins, scales, fins, pearls, and questionable life choices encouraged.

name: Bioluminati (Bike Mutation)
description:
Unadorned cyclists beware-- The Style Enforcement Officers will be back in person in the dust to issue citations for kinetic-aesthetic violations! But fear not: the Bioluminati Bike Mutation Station - is THE destination for bicycle decoration and transformation. We gift all manner of non-moopagenic materials and accoutrements for mutating your mobile mount into something magnificent! 
We are open Monday through Friday from 11-2ish hosting interactive bike decorating activities. We have a spray paint area, lots of duct tape, toys, dolls, barbies, non-moopy materials, all helping to make the playa a more fun and colorful place to be!
On Tuesday night, we will have a night bike DANCE PARTY!! with lights to decorate bikes and a DJ
On Saturday a.m. we will be having a bike mutation ride parade!

name: Birthday Camp
description:
At Birthday Camp, every day is a reason to celebrate. Throughout the week we host playful birthday-themed experiences for anyone passing by...wish-making, card writing, surprise celebrations, and spontaneous moments of joy.

Whether it's your actual birthday or you just want to feel seen and celebrated, our camp is a welcoming place to stop, connect, and share a little happiness. Because on the playa, everyone deserves a birthday.

name: Bisous
description: Welcome to Bisous. We are an experiential theme camp and non-profit co-created by a team with backgrounds in experience design, community building, and history building theme camps on playa.

name: Bistro Manonio
description: Step inside a small desert bistro where strangers gather around a circular communal table inside a handmade geodesic dome. Inspired by French and Polish traditions, we share simple rustic food, warm drinks, and good conversation with curious wanderers who stop by. Scheduled evenings feature intimate tastings featuring Provençal & Warsawa-inspired flavors. Slow down, connect, and experience the magic of a home cooked meal in Black Rock City at Bistro Manonio.

name: Bitchin' Braid Camp
description: Come for the braids, stay for the bar parties. Please grab a partner or find one in the braiding lounge to make a plan for a style that will last the week. Braiders on hand with all the supplies and skills to get you taken care of, including mirrors to check out your sweet self on the way out. No hair? NO PROBLEM. From 10am to sunset we have have hosted bar parties, new faces, new specialty drinks, new outfits and new music every two hours. Want to be apart of our camp's 10 year tradition, head over right before sunset to grab a bevy and enjoy a special treat as the sun starts kissing those mountains. Miss you already, so swing by.

name: Black Hole Literary Society
description: COME PLAY!! Grow old, not up. By day rest in our shady lounge and hydrate, color, knit, play games and talk. After dark, lose yourself in our immersive 360 degree 3-D black-light experience! Watch the moths dance in their special disco club. Come flow to some vibey tunes, create a visual masterpiece on our Giant Bright Light, and warm yourself at our campfire. Join us late on Thursday night for 'Elvis Hour' around 8 pm followed by a night of music with words through the decades and psychedelic rock. Friday we welcome ALL for our annual Shabbat potluck at sundown - bring some food to share or simply come and enjoy! We dig high fives, interpretive dance, and hula hoops, meaningful conversation, and old-school burners. WELCOME HOME! We've missed you. Let's share and play.

name: Black Karma
description:
Black Karma is a lantern lit gathering space built around hospitality, participation, and meaningful connection. In the intensity of Black Rock City, we offer a place to pause, sit, and engage.

Each morning we invite neighbors and wanderers to reset, share stories from the night before, and set intentions for the day ahead. Coffee is gifted freely and conversation is encouraged.

name: Black Rock Academy
description:
Black Rock Academy is a collective of artists and crafts-people. The collective works together to create art through different mediums year round through community engagement. We are often approached at Camp Black Rock Academy with the question of, "So what do you guys teach?"
Personally, I dont think the important question is, "What do you guys teach?" But rather, I would follow up with, "What are you willing to learn?"

name: BLACK ROCK ADVENTURES BUS STOP!
description: Providing accessible Playa tours in our adventure rig, with room for about 10 - 13 Burners, leaving from our BUS STOP! art installation on the Playa. Tours go daily at 9am, return you to the BUS STOP! and last about 2hrs. Or meet us at camp prior to the tour! Contact us for info about special tours and pick ups/drop offs, and if you are interested in camping with us or driving tours. To find our camp - look for tall grey feather flag with a big " ! "on it! or check our website for our location closer to the Burn. Come ride with us!

name: Black Rock Brewery
description: Black Rock Brewery specializes in serving home brew creations. Including dozens of varieties of beer, cider, mead, seltzer, wine and tea. We are also home to Utah Fire Tribe conclave group.

name: Black Rock City Municipal Pool
description:
Looking for a place to cool down and relax? The Black Rock City Municipal Pool might be the place for you! There's something for everyone: come by for a refreshment and shady misting during one of our Open Swim sessions, swing through at night for a bit of poolside lounging in peace, or put your dancing boots to good use at our Spring Break party! Access to our Spa is supposed to only be available for members, so stop by our Membership Office and fill out your application. 

Want to book the pool for your next event? Reach out with a request and let's make a splash together!

name: Black Rock City Passport Office
description: Your adventure awaits! Explore Black Rock City! Record your journey! We provide playa passports you can get stamped at various camps to record your travels. Visit your favorite camps and discover new ones!

name: Black Rock City Pickleball Club
description: Step off your bike and onto the court. This full size pickleball playground on playa turns strangers into teammates and sends laughter flying farther than the ball. Learn the game in minutes, cheer from the sidelines, or rotate into your next match, no experience or equipment required. Rally at sunrise, dink at dusk, or glow under the lights after dark. Movement, connection, and a little friendly competition await.

name: Black Rock City Shipyard
description:
Where good vibes meet great times!
Sip cocktails, savor glitzy hot dogs, and sway to groovy beats in a chilled lounge atmosphere. 

Cruise in, kick back, and let the party float you away

name: Black Rock City Welding & Repair
description: Welding, repair, adjustment and general tinkering help. Come on over to use our tools to repair your stuff or get our help repairing what's broken. We repair bikes and all sorts of other things. Enjoy an adult or NA beverage at the Crowbar - our shaded walk up and sit down Bar.

name: Black Rock Disc Golf Club
description:
Black Rock Disc Golf Club has a mushroom-themed disc golf course which embraces fun, games, friendly competition, collaboration, and creativity. We provide a place where folks can join together and throw one of the custom stamped discs loaned out at the camp. You can win one at one of our tournaments or events! The course is accessible 24/7, and discs glow in the dark so don't hesitate to swing by late night/early morning for a round. 


We also have some mushroom hazards on the course! We have tall ones, small ones, ones that glow, and ones that show you what disc golf is all about. It's definitely a psychedelic experience to walk through, even if you aren't in the mood to play a round. Just make sure to listen for the call of, "FORE!"

name: Black Rock Labs The Expanse
description: Black Rock Labs is a Civic Support camp focused on testing/scaling/messaging climate smart regenerative technologies at Black Rock City and the Regionals. Black Rock Labs hosts 1-hour Sustainability Talk Series at 2 pm on Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday and a Playa-wide tour on the Abraxas art car at 4 pm on Thursday to view BRC's expanding deployment of renewables and regenerative climate smart activities.

name: Black Rock Observatory Theme Camp
description: Black Rock Observatory is a mobile astronomical observatory dedicated to showing people just how amazing the universe is. Started at Burning Man in 2014, we have expanded beyond the borders of Black Rock City to educational institutions and events all along the West Coast.

name: Black Rock Piano Lounge
description: Black Rock Piano Lounge is the place to come and share your talent with a friendly audience. We bring great musicians to the playa but build our lounge for that spontaneous moments where the perfect vocals are combined with the best tuned pianos on the playa. Lets make some beautiful music together.

name: Black Rock Public Library
description: We're a library. Come browse our dusty stacks! One year book checkouts!

name: Black Rock Roller Disco
description: Every city has a roller skating rink. The Black Rock Roller Disco is the roller skating rink for Blac Rock City. We ae a full service roller rink. We have the skates, the funky music and we're always a funky good time every time.

name: Black Rock Sauna Society
description: Experience the essence of Finnish sauna culture amidst the Playa's embrace. Our camp offers invigorating sauna sessions, traditional löyly rituals, and the chance to encounter real life sauna elves! Join us for communal relaxation, deep connection, and the transcendent warmth of the Northern spirit.

name: Black Rock Socks
description: Come by for Chocolate Roulette, Tea and Shock Collar Karaoke for a magical time

name: Black Rock Travel Agency
description: The Black Rock Travel Agency is a gang of pilots, aviation enthusiasts, and adventurers who come together every year to serve the airport village and its visitors located at the end of Point5. Yes, there is an airport! BRTA makes it just like you imagine a Burning Man Airport would be. A massive Starport pyramid structure with entertainment and bar underneath with 30 foot viewing platform above? Yes! A super yummy galley serving pancake breakfast and bbq? Yes! Facilitating scenic airplane flights for Burners? Of course! The Agents at the Black Rock Travel Agency are committed to burners having an experience only to be found at the best airport in the world. Start, continue or end your journey with us.

name: Black Rock University
description: Black Rock University teaches Playa Survival Skills and Best Practices. The 10 Principles of Burning Man. 10 Principles of Couples Survival and other Playa Centric courses and outreach. Virgin 101, Get your playa name. Fairy Shrimp 101.

name: Black Rock Yacht Club
description: We share our love of sailing by offering instruction, and use of our fleet of wind-powered rigs

name: Black Rock Yearbook
description: Every year at Burning Man, since 2007, we set up a professional shooting gallery and photographers to give out playa names and take your Black Rock Yearbook Photo! Hosting the archive for tens of thousands of Burners online at blackrockyearbook.com

name: Blazing Death Ship
description: Join the legendary Death Ship at its home camp, where many secrets and mysteries will surely disappoint you.

name: BLD
description: Swiss Space cow racing, coffee, drinks, and an observation tower for looking out across BRC.

name: BlinkingManCamp97
description: BlinkingManCamp97 blinks again where excess just never seems to be enough. We will have the usual art project on the trash fence - SK8Z, 50 skateboard decks decorated with past Bman themes. When in camp prove how smart you are by passing the wacky IQ Test and becoming a MENSA member, normal answers wont get you there! And of course we have a Dragnet Interrogation, our tradition since 1999. Remember while the others are thinking we'll be blinking . And we were among the very first burners to bring LERD lights to the playa!

name: Blood & Sugar
description: A mildly chaotic clubhouse dedicated to the strange art of keeping humans functioning with a little help from treats, movement, and friends. Stop by for Bloody Mary mornings, gummy bears, yoga, and conversations that range from heartfelt to weird to unhinged. This space celebrates resilience, curiosity, and mutual support. Wander in and help us keep things balanced.

name: Bloom Camp
description:
Join us at Bloom Camp, where we help burners thrive - not just survive.

Bloom is a portal to human flourishing, centered around our climbable art installation, Bloom Pyramid by Gregg Fleishman. From there, we open space for transformative conversations and workshops exploring art, culture, consciousness, and human potential.

By day, come by for our signature mimosas and fresh smoothies.
By night, we come alive with DJ sets, live music and link ups with Art cars.

Come Bloom with us!

name: Blue CATerpillar
description: Come to the Wonderland Hookah Lounge to enjoy Tribal/Shamanic beats, herbal teas, cool smoothies and a variety of games like Backgammon, Chess, Checkers, Dice Poker, Spy, The Hat, Catan, CodeNames, UNO, etc. For those looking for more active entertainment we have a foosball, and the fire pit at night, so put your best foot forward!

name: BMIR
description:
Burning Man Information Radio (94.5 FM) is your nexus for essential information on the playa. Check BMIR for late-breaking event announcements and a melange of music. In the event of an on-site emergency, tune into BMIR for rumor-free updates and advisories to surf the storm to a sane conclusion.

Come down to BMIR from 12-5pm each day to record event and camp announcements. Or relate your encounters with radical acts of gifting on-air to the city at large.

name: Bo_b Squad
description: The 'Bo_b Squad' is a rag tag group of nuclear clowns specializing in atomic hijinx. The crew is committed to providing nuclear warmth to the Playa via the custom burn barrels 'Fat Man' and 'Little Boy'. If comfort is what you're looking for then the Squad's couch swings were made for you. The 'Bo_b Squad' hopes to see you in the cosmic wastes.

name: Bone Voyage
description: Welcome to the official backstage hub for the Bone Voyage mutant vehicle! While our vessel is out cruising the dust, our support camp serves as the critical base to refuel and keep the gears turning. We don't host public events in camp, as our gift to Black Rock City is entirely mobile and out on the open playa. However, if you spot our Mammoth Skull Flags or our Bony Bus, give us a wave...we're probably just gearing up for another wild expedition!

name: Booboos Gaagoos
description: Pull up a seat and cool down at the playa's friendliest non alcoholic watering hole. We pour cold zero proof drinks with mellow chillout tunes (or hard techno) and a comfy place to rest your dusty bones. Whenever you need a shady moment between adventures, you are always welcome.

name: Book Club
description: Book Club is proud to open its doors to serve the citizens of Black Rock City. Join us in the evening for shenanigans, whimsy, and the slowest service you'll find on any side of the playa. Bring a book, read one of ours and get comfy for a while

name: Bootleg Buggy Camp
description: We cruise to quench your thirst and transport you to, and be part of your next adventure.

name: Booty Worship
description:
Allow us to worship you. Your ass is our asset.

Booty Worship is a place where you can:

Feel safe to be exactly as you are
Explore your edges
Embrace your queerness
Move your divine, sexy body

name: Brain Freeze Camp
description: We will be back again in 2026 serving the coldest frozen margaritas on the Playa. Our amusement center will certainly entertain you and Power to the People will be available to help keep your electrical devices charged.

name: Brainiac Camp
description:
Brainiac Camp and the Burning Man Philosophical Center: Where Principles Collide and Confusion Is a Feature

Welcome to the resurrected Philosophical Center...not a department, not a brand, but a sandbox of inquiry and absurdity. Here, we do what philosophy does best: take your Burning Man-related discomfort, ambiguity, and unresolved contradictions... and roll around in them with delight.

Have a conundrum? A dilemma? A principle-on-principle conflict (say, Radical Self-Expression vs. Civic Responsibility)? Bring it.

name: Brand-Ur-Ass N More
description:
Brand-Ur-Ass N More will stimulate your entire being -- from your mind to your ass. Bare your butt in the "branding coral" to get one of a number of temporary brands then belly up to our western saloon for some libations. 
Find something/give something at the Giving Tree, hitch a ride on our mutant vehicles or stop by late night to hang around one of our public space fire pits/fire features. Come play with us!!!

name: Branding & Booze
description: Bring your own leather and leave with a piece of playa-forged art! Use our cattle irons to brand or our stamping machine to stamp Burning Man-related images (like the man or city map)! We will have pre-cut leather for those without an item to bring. Enjoy our homemade liquors, chill in our shade, listen to our music, and play our Barn Games. Look for bright blue shade!

name: BRC Ski Resort
description: With great powder comes great responsibility. Black Rock City Ski Resort's EXTRAterrestrial hosts welcome all earthlings to join us for in the apres-ski experience of a lifetime. Send it on the dance floor with Frosty the Snowman Discoball and our iconic DJs, kick it and recharge with a SNOW CONE.

name: BRC Snow Club
description:
Welcome shredders! BRCSC is the home of the first (and only) ski slope on the Playa! Come get outfitted for boots and skis or a board in our Rental Shop, then ascend the slope to rip down our 60-foot long, multi-tiered dry ski hill! 

Don't ski or snowboard? No problem! We'll have saucers aplenty for shredders of all ages to come and fly down the slope! 

Also hosting nightly Après Ski parties with phenomenal DJs, performers, and more!

name: BRC3PO (BRC 3:00 Post Office)
description: Set in a giant rural postbox, the Black Rock City 3:00 Post Office (BRC3PO) provides postal services to the citizens of Black Rock City. We offer authentic, one-on-one, creative interactions that range from the side-splittingly silly to the supremely sublime. We also provide an array of curated Burning Man postcards and postage to send those postcards anywhere in the world - as our gift to the citizens of Black Rock City.. Imagine the intersection of immersive improvisational theater, spontaneous talent show, soulful conversation, and stifling yet corrupt bureaucracy. You never know what will happen next at BRC3PO -- YOU could be what will happen next at BRC3PO, if you pay us a visit!

name: BRCSPCA (anti-human society)
description: We are a small, welcoming camp focused on connection, creativity, and community care. Our central dome hosts daily interactive offerings like conversation games, pop-up workshops, and cozy lounges where anyone can drop in to chill, connect, or collaborate. Whether you're looking for a deep talk, a silly prompt, or a moment of rest, we offer a space that's low-key, low-barrier, and open to all. Come say hi, share a story, or just hang in the shade—everyone is welcome here.

name: BRCvr presents BurnerSphere
description: BRCvr invited you to come play and learn about immersive technologies and storytelling. Learn about the BurnerSphere and how you can participate.

name: Breakaway Republic
description: Tiny Arms Tavern welcomes all dinosaurs for libations and roar-ing laughter. Open every day, look for the giant T-Rex. Espresso martinis and wine from 9-12 every day!

name: Bubble Camp
description: Bubbles, bubbles everywhere and drops to drink for all. Dispensing thai iced tea and cold pressed coffee for all you parched playa peeps.

name: Bubble Lounge
description: A queer-forward, wildly inclusive, bar and chill zone celebrating 27 years on playa. Featuring DJ tower, interactive dance structure, vibrantly lit body wash experience, a chill lounge, and secret room (SSSH!) where you can find reprieve from the chaos. Expect music, mischief, bubbly, and a caring group of folk in equal measure.

name: BUBBLEGASM
description: Bubblegasm is a mutant vehicle built to spread the joy of bubbles and lights with all those who ride on her or dance and play around her. Bubbles are a metaphor for life, fleeting and fragile and are a reminder about how precious our time is while we are here, and to make the most of each moment. And like each bubble, each person and their life is beautiful and unique. Bubbles are also temporary and once they pop they become part of the universe, just as we do when we die. When people encounter bubbles it is a like a rare moment of magic. They symbolize our childhood innocence, reminding us of a time when life was simple and carefree. When we see these glass-like orbs dancing in the air they remind us to live in the moment, let go, dance with a stranger, be silly - have a bubblegasm!

name: Bubbles and Bass
description: Bubbles and Bass is a 100% volunteer run art and music collective that brings joy to burner events worldwide! Our goal is to provide a home conducive to connecting: spiritually, conversationally, energetically. Best known for our sunrise to midday dancing revelry: more Bubbles and Bass makes the playa a magical place!

name: Bumblepuss
description: Bumblepuss brings a spa theme to the playa with the addition of the aromatherapy focused Lavender Lounge. Visit and soak in the aromas while you relax in the shade after your Steam Bath from our sister camp.

name: Bumpbed
description: Bumping those beats across the playa far and wide

name: Bunny Meth Lab
description: Transcend your humanity and project your bunny personality. Bunny-human hybrids are the future. Come enjoy our Esplanade lounge and relax in large fur daybeds, listening to curated beats and sipping on craft cocktails. Daily sundown events with spontaneous happenstance all week long. Vibrant colors, mystical LED forests, and plenty of places to relax. Find the hidden interactive origin story experience.

name: Burner Buddies
description: We are a relaxed LGBTQI+ camp known for Genital Printmaking based on a traditional Japanese technique, plus throwing some fabulous cocktail parties.

name: Burner Express Bus Depot
description: Burner Express Bus Depot for arriving and departing Burner Express buses.

name: Burning Band Camp
description: This is the home of the itinerant Burning Band, here to provide you with an earful of music. Well, two earfuls, really...

name: Burning Globe
description:
Thespian? Thespian-curious? Do you have lots of Thespian friends? Well, round here, we call that an "ally" If that sounds like you, come join us for a chalice-full of tomfoolery, skullduggery, swashbuckle...ery and overall merriment. Theatrics! Catharsis! Comedy! Tragedy... catch a show--or be a part of one! We'll make you a fancy cocktail after the performance...

...if you can find our bar, that is.

name: Burning Man Bike Course
description: Come test your skills on the Burning Man Bike Course! A bicycle obstacle course and pump track for all ages, abilities, genders, and sexual preferences. Look for our morning "Kids Only" hours and our world famous Nitro Circus Biketakular Demo and Competition!

name: Burning Man Studios
description: Burning Man Studios is a diverse group of crazies from across the country and across space and time that love movies, bad writing, and self-expression in all its forms. Come by for a drink, some shade, or just to tell us a story. Bar is open every day and random shenanigans all day long.

name: Burning Man T-Shirt Factory
description: Interactive DIY BM logo designs. We supply the spray paint and BM logo stencils. You supply the clothing, gear, or body to create your own personalized BM swag. Totally interactive, quick, easy, and fun. Open 24/7.

name: Burning My Crêpe
description: Lighting up the Playa since 2018 with the best flamed crêpes you'll ever eat. Made from scratch by people from Brittany (crêpe's original birthplace), you'll be mesmerized by our pole dancers while enjoying our crêpes in our cozy living room!

name: Burning Questions
description: Burning Questions offers visitors an escape to a hammock world surrounded by nature. Here to provide you with a comfortable hang space day or night, come climb into our nets and let us take you away to the beach, the forest, or a field filled with our World Famous Crickets. We are a group of friends from around the globe who are excited to build our small sanctuary for you to enjoy!

name: Burning Sensation
description:
Through fiery flavors and spicy conversation, Burning Sensation awakens participants to the immediacy of the moment. 

At Fire Bar, guests are invited to sample gourmet hot sauces that challenge their resolve, while washing the heat down with bracing fireball cocktails. Rooted in inclusivity, we center BIPOC and LGBTQIA+ voices and bodies at our Playa Vybz party - while creating a space where all are invited to feel, engage, and burn brightly. 

Come experience hearts, tongues and souls on fire at Burning Sensation!

name: Burning Sky
description: Skydivers over Burning Man. Come see Black Rock City from 9,000 feet in the air. Watch the skydivers exit the plane while you stay safely inside and get an exciting ride back to the earth. Gifting rides Wednesday & Thursday & Friday 11a-5p.

name: BurningShip
description:
There are Wood Ships, there are Steel ships, but the best ships are "FriendShips."
A bunch of hippie shipmates from all over the world bring their FriendSHIP to the desert for a week of debauchery! Join us at "BurningShip," a cruise ship full of immoral crew that's currently stranded in the desert! We'll be your booze directors, providing you with drinks, smiles, and fun events. Learn how to salsa dance, smoke a premium stogie, and let's get "Knotty!" Come with no expectations and leave feeling full. Full of love, hugs, laughs, and WTFs. And most importantly long lasting Burning(friend)Ships.

name: Burnstream Court
description: Burnstream Court is a group of Airstream owners who recreate a 1960s trailer park, Black Rock City style. We almost always have fun daytime events happening that you can join in with. And we give away grilled cheese sandwiches midday M-F.

name: Burntown
description: Don't call it a comeback, we been here for years! Burntown is back again ready to ROCK the playa. Come try the Rope Bridge of DEATH. Savor many exotic tobacco and herbal snuff varieties in our SNUFF Emporium. Shop for that special something in our General Store. Relax and enjoy our Art Gallery, which will have all sorts of artwork and guest speakers throughout the week. At Burntown, expect the unexpected!

name: Cabana Club
description:
The Cabana Club is an oasis of hospitality and friendship in the tradition of the old grand social clubs and beach resorts of the early 20th century. Our Cabana Staff serve up tasty treats and resort-worthy cocktails while our guests lounge in our comfortable cabanas, cool off in our Aluminet shade structure, or go for a spin in "The Spa" with our resident DJ's. 

We're the Favorite Vacation Destination spot for the hard working citizens of Black Rock City!

name: Cameltopia
description: You Look Thirsty! Welcome to Cameltopia, your desert oasis and refuge from the sun's heat. You are welcome to pet the camels but please do not feed the animals. Recharge your soul and fill your vessel with premium unleaded H2O at our post-apocalyptic "Route 66" gas station. Our attendants will refuel your canteen while you browse our Inconvenience Store. Monday-Friday 1:11-4:44PM Playa Standard Time. Wednesday afternoon is our annual "Hump Day" party with an eclectic mix of tail-shaking beats!

name: Camp (Can't) Stop
description: Camp (Can't) STOP - purveyors of joy and peddlers of silly. What are we up to? You'll just have to STOP by and find out. We'd never STOP a good time - but we might STOP your journey for something way better than whatever it was you were planning on doing. We can't STOP won't STOP and are committed to the bit - whatever that bit might be.

name: Camp [No Name]
description: An international camp hosting DJs, yoga, workshops, theme parties, a bar for the thirsty, cozy lounging, bar games and flogging/kink dungeon. Specializing in dubious advice and questionable antics.

name: Camp ASL Support Services HUB
description: American sign language Support services. Centralized services for the Deaf. Spanish speaking services provided as well. Come and flip a table. Come hang out by the fire pit after dark whenever it happens

name: Camp Babe
description: CAMP BABE is a collection of curious, universal, space-time travelers on a sparkly journey through the cosmos. Our chariot is a shooting star (hailing from the dense star nebula surrounding planet B4B3) and we come bearing wonderful and exotic gifts for the denizens of the intergalactic hub that is Black Rock City, Earth.

name: Camp Balagan
description: Exists to create a playful, soulful, and immersive Moroccan desert experience rooted in music, connection, and creativity. "Balagan" is a joyful chaos we embrace that spirit with curated sonic journeys, shared rituals, and a warm, open atmosphere for self-expression and cultural fusion.

name: Camp Bangers Only
description:
An Aussie at heart camp with a global family.

Adventurers and well, dare we say it, a bunch of legends welcomes you to our playground to play, drink, dance and laugh with real people from amazing places, doing cool shit with no pretentiousness.

We have awesome places to hang, chill or get wild. Guaranteed awesomeness and welcoming vibes when ever you need.

We will be rolling all week but the events not to miss are: 

Monday: 7PM till late - Bang Bang Manic Monday Party

Wednesday 6PM till late - Wild Animal Party

Friday 9-12am: Breakfast revival; Chill and disco beats, mimosas, bloody marys and ofcourse VEGEMITE TOAST & Sausage Sizzle (Bangers).

name: Camp Bare Tentacles
description: We offer a simple mix of bodywork, basic hospitality, and low key communal space. On Monday and Thursday afternoons we serve hot dogs/vegan dogs and easy tropical cocktails, giving neighbors a chill place to pause and refuel. After dark, we maintain a small fire pit where people can gather, warm up, and unwind. We also offer massages on Tuesday and Thursday. Come by anytime and fly one of our kites! Aloha!

name: Camp Be Bothered
description: We can't be bothered to fill this out.

name: Camp Bean Water
description: Beans, flicking, roasting, steamy dripping love, room for cream ? our secret steps to the finest cup of coffee. Bring your brewtiful self over to Camp Bean Water to enjoy a cup and let us show you the full potential of a coffee shop. All cups of coffee our baristas serve-up are made to order and come with positive affirmations. Looking for something to fill your now stimulated colon, our cooks can fry you up mouth-watering arepas. Love and good vibes are abundant in our cafe, so drip on in. We're open every weekday morning. We have special evening events like arepa night and a special sunrise opening.

name: Camp Blowjob
description: Camp Blowjob is where you can let loose and get your leaf blown at Burning Man in a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity! We aim to provide a fun atmosphere where all are welcome!

name: Camp BUI
description: The friendliest camp on the playa famous for our front porch. Drop by for a visit and a cold drink. Join us at sundown for a Shot of the Day or Thursday from 2:00 to 4:00pm for our Pineapple Upside Down Cake Thursday event. We are well known for our fine cuisine and repartee.

name: Camp Butter
description:
Not only a camp of deliquescent souls. It is a movement... a way of sliding through life with a groove at your sails.
Equipped with DJ's, Butter-Inspired drinks, and a universal deep desire to churn ~ We're here to spread a simple message...
"Talk less, slide more" ~
Come see the WORLD'S BIGGEST BUTTER STICK !!

name: Camp Byte This
description: This is BYTE's fluffy camp! Come by and dance with us, play on our immersive art, explore our mutant vehicle "Petabyte" and lube up your tappin' toes with our signature drinks at our furiendly bar. Warning: you may receive really cool gifts, hear the best music and feel the furry best vibes!

name: Camp Canadianderthal
description: TRAGICALLY HIP LIVE Wednesday at 1:00pm! Find an outfit in our Cariboutique, offering a curated selection of vintage threads and pre-loved playa wear, refreshed daily. Smack down your northern neighbors in our life-size Whack-Ca-Nuck game. Play some tunes or sing along in our shaded piano lounge. Spreading Canadian love, missing our Phish Phans!

name: Camp Castaway
description: A welcoming, shaded, interactive neighborhood lounge where participants of all ages can stop in, engage, and connect. Our primary gift to Black Rock City will be freshly prepared micheladas, a traditional Mexican beer cocktail made with beer, savory Bloody-Mary-style mix, and chili-lime salt on the rim. We offer life size games, lively conversation, and will gift Nevada pendants one day during the week.

name: Camp Codename
description: Join Camp Codename for Cookies, Connection and Comeraderie!

name: Camp Cohere
description: A group of long-time burners who are committed to fostering human connection on the playa

name: Camp Come Find Us CCFU
description: Here at Camp Come Find Us (CCFU) we are a camp that is about finding yourself and exploring who you are at Burning Man. Every journey is individual and unique. Come flow with us and find your journey! We will create a laid-back and spontaneous atmosphere, and our offerings will be inspiring and fulfilling. We endeavor to create a strong community among our fellow Burners. Come find us and find yourself!

name: Camp Condundrum
description: Playa got you in a difficult place? Camp Conundrum might just be the answer. Our mutant vehicle, a delightful conundrum in itself, offers hydration, music to move you, and a pole for the ... adventurous.

name: Camp Connection
description: Art support camp that loves to share their love of creating art

name: Camp Contact
description: Camp Contact is dedicated to offering a more embodied world through Contact Improvisation, Acro Yoga, Ecstatic Dance, Authentic Relating, Internal Family Systems, and other Psychotechnologies. We bring a dance space and domes for our offerings! We welcome others who know of these and related practices and modalities to join us in community!

name: Camp Cosmo
description:
We are a tribe of global citizens who come together to create a Cosmopolitan playground. We provide Photo Booth and 360 degree rotating selfie platform from Tuesday to Friday between 1--4pm. You can use your own phone or camera to capture epic Burning Man inspired photos and videos. And of course we have the music, photo gifts and cold drinks. Come express yourself, get creative ,and take some unforgettable moments. 
so come and join us!

name: Camp Cul-de-Sac
description: Our Cinema runs from Sunset to Sunrise, Tuesday through Friday. Family-friendly content 8pm-10pm. Silent Films 10pm-12am. A cornucopia of the delightful and absurd from 12am-6am. A different theme every night!

name: Camp Darling
description: Our camp's mission and mantra is to provide a space for decadent, wine-soaked, slightly feral joy. Come enjoy allergen-friendly charcuterie and wine in our shaded picnic space while connecting, sharing stories, enjoying the sunset with old and/or new friends, and keeping it gay. A bacchanal of frivolity, deliciousness, and delight. It's camp, darling.

name: Camp Delicioso & Creperie
description: Hungry! Hung over? You've been hankerin' for something warm in your belly? Swing on by Camp Delicioso and Crêperie, where you'll find an International collective of foodies who'll entertain and serve you the best damn OG French crêpe in Black Rock City. EST 2007 We've got sweet and savory flavors that'll satisfy even the most discerning Playa palate. And while the crêpes are cooking, and the coffee is grinding, we'll serve up a saucy dance music set too! 9ish to noonish Tue, Wed and Thu. If you miss us giving you crêpe, come on over anyway. We have various events happening throughout the week Tue - Fri.

name: Camp DIY
description: Camp DIY offers daily Agua Fresca (non-alcoholic) refreshments Monday to Friday of Burn Week. We also have crafty supplies for you to "Pimp Your Cup".

name: Camp Do Nothing
