description: Camp Do Nothing - the camp that's actually doing the opposite of its name! Come take in a 360 view of the playa on our swing (yep, you'll be hanging 35 feet upside down!), climb on and into the foam dome, or come have a seat and some conversation with burners from all over.

name: Camp Elektra
description: Come visit us and take a ride on our beautiful Dragon Elektra or hang out at the Dragon's Lair Lounge while sipping on a cold beverage and dancing to the beats of our camp DJs!

name: Camp Elephant Toe
description: Like camel toe only bigger. We are the mutant vehicle support camp for Alladin's Lamp, a bottom of the genie bottle experience making playa dreams come true since 2023. Stop by for some music and drinks (21+).

name: Camp Emergency
description: A Burning Man camp that embodies the ethos of self-expression, communal living, and radical self-reliance. The camp is a vibrant and inclusive community that fosters creativity and encourages its members to embrace their unique identities. The camp's central gathering space provides an area for participants to connect, relax, and engage in creative pursuits. From sunrise yoga sessions to late-night dance parties, Emergency offers a dynamic and welcoming environment for all who seek to explore the boundaries of self-expression and community.

name: Camp Equilibrium
description:
Equilibrium has been established as a destination to represent the pinnacle for the collective first world culture in which we live: vacation. Adhering to a strict belief that our shared time together should be one of joy and relaxation, we seek to strike the all too difficult balance of hard work and play.
It is here that we have constructed a series of spaces and activities to ensure that all who step through our threshold experience the relaxation, camaraderie, and playfulness that we all deserve outside the hectic worlds of which we live the other 51 weeks of the year. "Because it's vacation for fucks sake."

name: Camp Fly
description: Camp Fly is the home of our insect themed art cars. Swing by our camp to get a ride, or reach out if you would like us to help host your event. At our camp, we have a pickleball court and an aerial silks rig, on which we will be offering aerial silks performances and lessons, please come find us!

name: Camp Fortress of Solitude
description: Superman's Fortress of Solitude Art Car support camp.

name: Camp Fucking Magical
description: Nestled in the quiet city street, our cozy camp is a haven of relaxation and connection. At its center, a giant cuddle pit swing invites visitors to sink into plush cushions and gently sway under the open sky, offering a peaceful escape from the noise and hustle of the outer city. Nearby, an enchanting bar glows with soft, colorful lights, serving drinks and innovative food delights. The camp's serene atmosphere, combined with its playful elements, creates a perfect spot for relaxation, laughter, and meaningful connections.

name: Camp Gotalotgoinon
description: A collective of doers and artist that want to create a collaborative art space to share with others. Creating together and experiencing multi-sensory art that inspires connection and growth. Come play games, solve a puzzle, get your dance on, add to the collaborative string art or come relax and take it all in at the tub. Whoever and whatever you create is art and we look forward to sharing ours with you and experiencing yours.

name: Camp Home
description: Just your friendly neighbors next door. We are here to provide creature comforts ? cold booze, hot tea, mist and buffer massages. Whether it be a piping hot midnight cup of custom blended tea, or a citrusy boozy creation while you briefly escape that blazing playa sunshine, we are here for you. We will keep you cozy with the comforts of home. Let's get weird and stay magical.

name: Camp Hot Cheeks
description: A theme camp focused on having fun, engaging with the BRC community, and inviting people to enjoy our lounge and nonsense. We host an annual event, called Sake Bomb Sunday, the Sunday after the man burns. Sake Bomb Sunday is an end-of-burn tradition at Camp Hot Cheeks. It is a day of celebration and camaraderie. Burners from all walks of life come together to enjoy sake bombs and celebrate the end of the burn.

name: CAMP JUICY
description: SMOOTHIES! 11am-5pm. Come get a fruity, frosty, frozen orange banana smoothie with extra playa love! If you come on the right day you'll get some frozen berries, mangos and pineapples. We encourage you to bring your entire camp or village. We love our guests! We want to talk with you about your love of fruit and juice. There could be a snow cone in it for you too. We will have a DJ spinning for your enjoyment and a chill lounge to hang out in the shade.

name: Camp Just Ahead
description:
Come spin our big WHEEL OF INDETERMINATE IMMEDIACY to choose a short, fun activity to do with us!

These activities create will human connection, encourage radical self-expression, and send you away with a smile. Some are silly playa games, others could be mildly naughty, and others are thoughtful conversation-starters. All can be adapted as needed for age, ability, etc. We will also (with consent) gift some photos of the fun too, delivered in a private online gallery afterward.

Activities will be updated through the day and across the week, so come by more than once!

Afternoons Mon-Fri, see our site for details!

name: Camp Kerosene
description: Black Rock City's premiere laser engraving camp. Solar powered gifts from the playa

name: Camp Kinetic
description:
Dedicated to Movement Arts in Black Rock City.
Afternoon Workshops in Flow Arts, Juggling, Dance, Yoga, and Aerial.
Evening Features Performances and Fire Jams

name: Camp Kühloff
description: This year we are coming to you! Camp Kuhloff Pop-up events are happening Monday-Thursday 2pm-4pm throughout the playa where we will be passing out ice-cold lavender towels and good vibes. Be on the look out for our inflatable yeti!

name: Camp LandHO!
description: Sunburnt, mischievous, and gently naughty-cal - a low-rise harbor on the playa where art cars dock, the lighthouse winks, and a sound trailer keeps the night humming. Come for Christina, our flagship mutant vehicle, and stay for Port Hours: predictable hosting windows with tea, small gifts, hands-on demos and low-barrier skill shares. At night the lighthouse and sound trailer host a rotating cast of top DJs, guest selectors and local talent playing flow-based sets that fold into layered vessel decks and late-night flow. We run on participation, consent, radical inclusion and Leave No Trace - builders, DJs and apprentices co-create a playful port of call where mischief is choreographed with care.

name: Camp Morning Wood
description: Welcome to Camp Morning Wood! Which is, quite simply, your friendly, neighborhood, summer camp-themed, saloon. Starting fresh each morning at 10:00 a.m. to "Eye of the Tiger" we're there to motivate the neighborhood, to attack a new day (after licking our wounds from the night before). CMW is ready to greet you with a smile, music, dancing, or maybe just a view of the city from our raised platform. From sunrise to sunset (and beyond), you can almost always pull up a barstool for some friendly conversation, and an ice cold (hard or soft) beverage.

name: Camp Nafas
description: A Persian-inspired oasis celebrating freedom, secularity, equality, and the spirit of shared humanity. Inspired by the Persian tradition of hospitality and gathering, our camp invites Burners to connect through tea, music, poetry, dance, and conversation. Visitors can participate in cultural experiences such as Persian calligraphy, language mini-lessons, poetry readings, and communal tea ceremonies. Through these interactive offerings, we create a welcoming space where people can slow down, breathe, and share meaningful moments with others. Camp Nafas brings the warmth of Persian culture to the playa while embracing Burning Man's principles of participation, gifting, and radical inclusion.

name: Camp Nope
description: Visit Area 58, an intergalactic and interdimensional roadside attraction constructed from the wreckage of a time-bending rocket. Step inside and get transported. Find the hidden doorway to another dimension - but it only opens sometimes.

name: Camp NOT a Cult!
description: Camp Not a Cult provides an alcohol-free, sobriety-supportive space for new and experienced burners which is light-hearted, sarcastically and not culty. We believe that by removing alcohol from our lives we have unlocked a way to live more authentically, feel better, and have more FUN every single day. And that doesn't make us boring. You still find us howling at the moon, wild-eyed and sometimes naked, dancing around the fire. Rather than daily recovery meetings, we offer a variety of yoga and meditation classes and workshops, a cacao ceremony & ecstatic dance, a fire-spinning workshop for beginners, Ayurvedic wisdom, 1-2 sober/sober-curious meetups, and other events. All these events will be open to the community.

name: Camp O-Wow
description: Come and enter a snippet of London and gaze at the stars and play a game of checkers or croquet whist enjoying cool shade and great company. Also grab a stick and make a mouthwatering S'more!

name: Camp of the Rising Buns
description: Camp of the Rising Buns is a community that celebrates the many gifts of the sun. Come to our Abuntent to experience the renewal of a new day while basking in the evaporative cooling powered by the gift of the sun's rays. Stop by at sunset daily for Bunset Karaoke + Rising Buns Bakery & Cool Your Buns Snowcones. "Sun's out, Buns out!"

name: Camp Orange
description: Our 16-foot tall banana stand will once again tower erect over the Playa a shining, lighted beacon for all citizens of BRC in search of a place to rest their weary, dusty bananas! Join us for chocolate covered frozen bananas, fruity frozen drinks, silly dance parties, fun and educational sessions inside our cozy dome, a hang in the Largest Known Hammock, or just to chill out and have a good time.

name: Camp Orange Heart
description: Our camp is founded on the principles of unconditional love, mutual respect, honesty, trust, and transparency. Our goal is to provide a deeper intimacy among all human beings with respect to the eight types of intimacy and a mocktail bar for burners. No drama type of camp - only love, respect, and radical acceptance!

name: Camp P3
description: Join us as we spiral ever outward in unending discovery of where the highway of radial participation intersects with the great canal of radical inclusion. Camp P3 is 'be your best self' boutique clothing gifters, and Nitro Coffee moguls hell bent on emblazoning your brain. We are also simply the hosts of the world's largest white Wedding Dress Wednesday procession complete with a mass wedding ceremony? Don't ask us, we don't even know what our camp name means? Perhaps it means something different to each of us. Come visit us and find out what P3 means to you.

name: Camp Peace of Ass
description: Povides the "professional installation" of lusciously, unique, "Peace of Ass" bike seat covers, bringing "Peace to the Playa, One Dusty Bottom at a Time." We continue to service the lovely citizens of Black Rock City who make their way to our inviting camp. We encourage our customers, with humor, to check out the Wall of Mirrors, and write on our annual poster. We also offer an "Ask the Expert" advice table as a "pop-up" activity.

name: Camp Pendant
description: Welcome one and all! Come by and decorate one of this year's pendants or pick-up a "BURNER" bike license plate. Rest your weary feet and tell us about your year. Place yourself on the world map. Be sure to check out the day's swag on our gifting tree. Whether you take a little something or leave a little something, it's here to make everyone's day a little brighter.

name: Camp Piper
description:
A ragtag group of international babes who all appreciate the elegant screeching and sophisticated whine of the bagpipe. Currently seeking a bagpipe player! 
Our camp was founded in 2014 when most of us (being virgin burners) stranded on the playa at the same place, same time. We all woke up to the beautiful sound of the bagpipe. Every since we have been warming wandering souls on the Playa. Stop by for a drink, a hug, and a belly laugh. Sparkles, y'all!

name: Camp PlayApology
description: You eff up, we fix it! Black Rock City's first "Custom Apology Delivery Service" offers Playa-friendly flowers, Burner-centric cards & singing "SorryGrams" for BRC residents looking to make playAmends. We also have cards for other occasions. Grab a Sorry Spritz, peruse our catalog and make someone's day cards that say everything from "I'm So Sorry" to "You're Awesome!" and "Happy Burn Mitzvah!"

name: Camp Ply Curious
description: A fun loving semi eccentric group inviting all to experience the unknown. Be loving. Be musical. Be creative. And above all.....be curious!

name: Camp PtP - Papillio Ovum
description: Art support camp for placed art installation "Papillio Ovum".

name: Camp Pull My Finger
description: Come join us for Biscuits and Gravy Tuesday and Thursday morning. "Best Thing You Will Put In Your Mouth all week" (Maybe second). Themed afternoon bars all week

name: Camp Questionmark
description: The age of questioning is here! Celebrating creativity & music born from the playa. Bring us your questions and we will give you more back )?(

name: Camp Random Pants
description: Need pants? We got you! Take a pair or leave a pair. Relax in our Dome, grab a drink from the bar and enjoy some tunes. Come by for our 10am morning yodel and mimosa social!

name: Camp Reno Nation
description:
Biggest Little Shit Show On The Playa

Great beer; Weird People

Welcome to the Shit-Rock Saloon V3!

name: Camp Safari
description: Determine your fate with a spin of the Safari Wheel. Photo ops, animal hunts, and other dusty games

name: Camp Scone Fucker
description: Come get Sconed with us. 9 unique flavors to try throughout the week and ice cold tea to wash it down. All while grooving to our camp DJs R & B, House, Rock, and Lo-Fi beats. Come chill out in the shade with a glass of ice tea or partake in our playground. Maybe we will have a fun surprise or two.. or three?

name: Camp Seem to Leave
description: Your sticky home away from home. We humbly welcome you, and the dusty pile of tetanus you rode in on. Drop by for a life-changing cocktail & leave with a side quest.

name: Camp Shark Cage
description: Welcome to the playa's one and only nautical Nicolas Cage theme camp! Come steal the Declaration of Independence with us.

name: Camp Shit Ain't Right
description: Wyoming-based with international flair - campmates from Wyoming, Canada, New Zealand, Russia, Australia, Ukraine, UK Germany, Netherlands... aaaand I'm definitely missing some. Come visit for public lounge, food, movie night, clothing boutique, large-scale, shitty punch and more!

name: Camp Shutterbuggy
description: Your neighborhood interactive art exhibit with music and drinks each night from 8pm to 12am. We have not one, but TWO of the world's coolest dance poles. Stop by for a spin!

name: Camp Slow Your Roll
description: Take inspiration from the sloth and give in to the deadly sin. Take a breath, put a pause on your carefully laid out plans and just slow your roll. No need to rush! Land in a sloth's dream jungle paradise. Come hang with us where everything is, you guessed it, slooowly done. Move as slow as you can at Slow Drunk Yoga and Slow Sloth Line Dancing. Experience the Best Worst Sloth Cocktail Lounge for the best tasting cocktails and mocktails on the playa but with the worst (slowest) service. While you wait for your drink, try to win the Slowest Bike Race by finishing last (don't fall!). Come channel your inner sloth to take a chill pill anytime by stopping by for photos in sloth onesies at our Sloth Pun Photo Booth, walking the slackline, and playing cornhole, ladder ball, Jenga, and Connect 4.

name: Camp SnuggleFunk
description: Step into a world of pure playa funk, where every moment is infused with vibrant energy and creative flair. This camp offers inviting relaxation zones to unwind and recharge, alongside dynamic dance spaces where funky beats keep spirits soaring. Engage in playful activities ranging from spontaneous art jams to quirky games, all designed to spark imagination and joyful connections. Here, originality is celebrated, boundaries are respected, and everyone is encouraged to let loose and embrace the rhythm of the desert. Join a community dedicated to fun, freedom, and unforgettable experiences under the bright Nevada sun.

name: Camp Stranger Things
description: Bringing our strange art to playa since 2019. If you are looking for us, you just found us. Check out the map and look for our art out on playa, A Cosmos Within. Come by and say Hello if you love what we do.

name: Camp Summer Camp
description: We are a San Francisco-based camp that celebrates the whimsical spirit of Summer Camp. We want to revisit the connection, growth, and playful wonder that comes with those magical childhood weeks. Think back to those golden days of campfire singalongs, friendship bracelets, and endless play?our mission is to teleport you right back to that delightful, wonder-filled time of your youth, but reimagined on the Playa.

name: Camp Sweaty Betty
description:
Can't tell which is dustier - body, mind, or soul? It's probably your hair. Friendly neighborhood hair washing salon - stop in and get yo'self correct head to foot - hell, bring a partner and we can teach them how, too. Plenty of gossip, probably a little therapy.

Open Monday - Friday 11:00 am - 3:00 pm

name: Camp Synthesis
description: Embodies the melding of three things: Synthesizers, Sake, and Sushi. Here's the concept: People who like producing music with synths, midi instruments, drum machines, etc., hanging out, jamming, teaching others to make music, performing live sets, share Japanese food, and sharing a drink. Daytime events: come jam on synths. Bring a synth or come play around with ours. Following the Food/Bar (takoyaki/soba) nights, we will host DJ sets from global random DJs who don't post their sets on social media. Come train human intelligence with us by generating analog signals.

name: Camp TeaPunk
description: Stop by our Steampunk inspired tea/coffee/cocktail tent and chill for a bit. With victorian furniture, plush rugs, a cuddle puddle, small library and games you're sure to feel welcome as you prop your feet up and relax. Looking for something more upbeat? Our "Teabag Olympics" might be for you. With relay races in high heals, granny panty competitions and other hilarious happenings, you're sure to find fun and laughter, all while listening to an array of DJ beats. Our campers are the family you wish you had, we welcome you to stop in and say hi!

name: Camp Tell You
description: A regenerative sanctuary on the playa. By day, we offer a regenerative sanctuary of healing frequencies. Mornings start with "Spill Tea over Tea," our daily conversation circle. Camp Tell You is a choice between surviving the playa and thriving within it, an invitation to explore interaction that goes beyond the ephemeral.

name: Camp THREAT
description: Dominating the portos for 6 years or more. Unofficial Headquarters of The Black Rock City Communist Party (BRCCP). Gonzo Decommodification Experts and Proud Purveyors of Bullshit. Sales and Service 100% Guaranteed to soothe the soul and waste the body and mind. Cold looks and warm seats. The whiskey is tolerable and the wine is worse. While supplies last. Conditions and terms apply. We are not a cult.

name: Camp Tidy
description: Enjoy a proper cuppa at tea time and peruse our extensive collection of literature in the Tea and Porn lounge. Recharge yourself and your devices with our solar powered charging station.

name: Camp Truth or Dare
description: Our mission is to inspire joy, mischief, courage, curiosity and connection through the game of "Truth or Dare," foster Burning Man's 10 Principles + consent, and promote the Radical Inclusivity, Diversity and Equity initiative.

name: Camp VRC
description: Camp VRC is about capturing and sharing the Burning Man experience beyond the playa by means of immersive 360 D virtual reality (VR) footage. Lose yourself in past year's VR experiences or jump in and help us build a global network to carry the impact beyond the playa. Monday to Saturday, 3-5pm, at the yellow short schoolbus. Also, you might find us POP-UP, to show footage, at other busy events throughout the playa.

name: Camp Why is My Mouth Tingling
description: Taste the Heat. Face the Fire. Embrace the Burn with our hot sauce tasting experience with sauces from all over the world at the Ring of Fire Hot Sauce Tasting, open to all! We are a vibrant diverse multicultural camp filled with burners who love the heat and want to share their love with BRC.

name: CAMP WWIT
description: CAMPWWIT is place to ask yourself the question, "Wait, What's In This?" We explore the playa experience through snarky reflection, encouraging internal monologue and external dialogue through games, drinks, and music. With everything going on during the burn, we hope you can reflect on what's going on inside you with others to help bring these playa lessons out into the default world!

name: Camp XUZA
description:
Home of XUZA Art Car
Every Night XUZA will be out on the prowl, seeking out Art installations to host parties and more.

name: Camp Zoombox
description: A giant boombox and some rad people

name: Campoline
description: We are an artsy international dive bar of friendly folks and stiff drinks under the circus bigtop of cascading parachutes. You can jump on trampolines under the stars or sun, paint, stroll through art work, belly up to the bar, listen to canned music from show tunes to punk, watch live original music and varied performances, or climb the intellectual ladder of conversation. Just depends on the night, and the people participating, but always a dependably great time.

name: Candyland
description:
Come join the fun at CandyLand. Enjoy a sweet treat from one of a dozen retro decorated candy dispensing machines.
After choosing your favorite vodka flavor, get in line at "The Claw" for an opportunity for more treats, and some x-rated sex toys for those over 18.
CandyLand is open every day from 11am - 4 pm for Candy treats, and 1- 4 pm to play "The Claw" to win fun, safe sex toys!

name: Captain Pump's Raiders
description: Black Rock City's finest giant-robot driving mercenary company, and we roll a mean D20. Come visit us for RaiderCon XI, the Playa's premier (and possibly only) roleplaying-game convention! Don't miss our Starcraft and Magic tournaments.

name: Caravan D'Light
description: Caravan of Light (COL) is an Art Camp at Heart! We are a global collective of Artists from diverse cultures, coming together to share our unique gifts - visual and performance art, music, dance, holistic teachings, and a deeper understanding of Burning Man Hospitality. In line with our BM Ethos of "Radical Inclusion" - Every Black Rock City Citizen is warmly Welcomed!!!

name: Casa de la Rumba
description:
The most magical prohibition era Casino where you can enjoy our whimsical cocktails while trying your luck at our roulette, Blackjack or Craps table, all under our glorious circus tent.

Come get some rumba to our Casa. Celebrate sharing, life, and try your luck in our little casino. You can come and bet whatever you have on you and we will match it up.

Be prepared to walk in a different time and space once you step into our 20s Casino. There will be a smile in your face when you leave. Guaranteed or we give you your money back!

name: Castra Ursi
description:
A fully solar-powered camp exploring what a fuel-free future on Playa can look like.

This year we present The Last Ocean, an interactive installation built from reclaimed ocean and ocean-bound plastic. Step onto the platforms and walk, run, and dance across a solar-powered sea of light as the surface responds to movement with shifting waves of color.

The entire artwork and camp operate 100% on solar energy with no fuel or petrol used in any capacity. Solar panels are integrated directly into the space, making the renewable energy system that powers the experience visible to everyone who visits.

Castra Ursi also shares open diagrams and build information showing how our solar and battery systems work, helping other camps explore how to build their own fuel-free infrastructure.

name: CatLand
description: Burning Man's haven for feline enthusiasts. Join us for themed parties featuring tacos, late night hotdogs, kareoke and craft activities all centered around our beloved cats. Indulge in our open bar, where camaraderie flows as freely as the drinks. We promise you a purrr-fect escape into our feline universe. Experience magic of CatLand, where the spirit of Burning Man meets the playful spirit of cats.

name: Catmandu
description: Catmandu is a group of diverse friends who love dumplings, music, and cats. Join us on playa for activities throughout the week like prom, pickles & tatts, and a cat creation station.

name: Celestial Alchemy
description: The practice of inner transformation and parallels with the cosmic realms, a diverse camp that celebrates the love and connection of a transcendent humanity. Join us for 10 Principle themed heartfelt yoga and conscious breathwork to revitalize your Burn spirit. We gift cold tea and herbal elixirs for your sweet pleasure. Our celestial moon art piece is visible during dusk and early nighttime, accompanied by soft beats and easeful smiles. We look forward to morning movement and moonlit kisses with you.

name: Celestial Bodies
description: For 22 years, Celestial Bodies has been your friendly, all inclusive, gay bar on the playa. Brining you fun, daily events in a welcoming environment.

name: Celestial Tea Garden
description: Welcome to Celestial Tea Garden Camp, a vibrant, women-led, multicultural oasis celebrating the rich diversity of culture in our vibrant zen tea dome amidst the dusty canvas of Burning Man. We are multi culture camp bringing asian traditions to the playa. Our camp is a sanctuary where ancient traditions meet modern playfulness, all dedicated to fostering a deep sense of community, understanding, and radical inclusion.

name: Census
description: The Census has been collecting information about the population of Black Rock City since 2002. The results of the Census from previous years will be on display at the Census Lab on playa and published in the Population Analysis Report at https://blackrockcitycensus.org

name: Central Cafe
description:
Central Cafe is a 24/7 open coffee lounge in the heart of Black Rock City. A warm, welcoming space where you can slow down, reconnect, and meet new people at any time of day or night.

Come for high quality coffee, fresh beverages, and a cozy style lounge filled with sofas, rugs, and glowing amber light. By day it is a vibrant social cafe, by night it transforms into an intimate coffee lounge with music and atmosphere.

Whether you are looking for your friends or finding new ones, Central Cafe is a place you will keep coming back to.

name: Cereal Thrillers
description: Breakfast cereal bar where we serve that sugary cereal your Mom didn't let you have as a kid

name: Chain Reaction
description:
Bike acting up out on playa? Pull up.

We're a laid back bike repair camp helping people get rolling again from 11am to 6pm every day. Flats, loose chains, brakes acting weird, or just need air, we've got you. No appointments, no stress, just swing by.

Need a break from the sun? Hang out for a bit, cool down, and kick it with us while we work. Good people, good energy, and a spot to reset before getting back out there.

name: Chair Camp
description: The Dusty, cozy-as-can-be living room with room for all of our Chair, automan, and TV people. Chair Camp is proud to be on playa for the fourth year, with 6 mutant vehicles and a 24/7 lounge-pad for when we're done stomping around deep playa + giving lifts to our burner neighbors and off adventuring. Cold beverages and warm, cozy hangs— Purrr.

name: Champagne Lounge
description: Welcome to the Champagne Lounge! Amidst Black Rock City's hustle, our oasis offers luxurious relaxation. Step into our elegantly adorned shade, sip champagne poured by less than knowledgeable bartenders, and recline on plush playa-tech or mingle with fellow Burners. As the sun sets, enjoy twinkling lights and ambient music for a magical atmosphere. Cheers to the extraordinary!

name: Chariot Project
description:
Injured? Have a footsie-oopsie-daisy? Fear not!
Our pedal-powered mobility carts are available for checkout by the day and attach to your own bike. We also offer canes, crutches, orthopedic boots, knee braces, and more to support your journey - whether you're healing up, rocking senior power, or living with a disability. There's a transport option for you.

name: Charting the Uncharted
description: Charting the Uncharted is an Oklahoma-based camp of first-time Burners supporting our interactive art installation, The Witness Wall. We invite participants to share their stories through writing and audio, creating a living map of human medial experience. Rooted in curiosity, connection, and contribution, our camp is dedicated to exploration - of both the desert and the voices within it.

name: Chatterbox Camp
description: Immerse yourself in the vibrant cacophony of creativity with the Chatterbox Art Car. This rolling masterpiece serves as a mobile platform for spontaneous conversations, fueled by the energy of the playa. Adorned with mesmerizing humans and pulsating with music, the Chatterbox invites participants to engage in dynamic dialogues, forging connections that transcend boundaries. Join the journey aboard this mobile marvel and experience the magic of community, expression, laughter and exploration!

name: Cheat Codes
description: Cheat Codes is a bespoke analog arcade offering games of wit and dexterity 24/7. Come play with us!

name: Cheezy Oasis
description: Indulge in the tantalizing allure of irresistibly cheezy goodness that delicately melts in your mouth. Join us to savor this exquisite experience of cheesy delight. Alternatively, embark on a flavorful adventure and roll the dice for a delectable drink that promises to energize your day like never before. Feeling adventurous? Grab the mic and unleash your inner comedian, songbird, or entertainer extraordinaire. The stage is yours to own! If mornings aren't your thing or you've burned the midnight oil, why not join us for a pick-me-up coffee and delightful conversation to start your day right? And remember--Stay Cheezy

name: Cheshire Alley
description: Join us on a trip down the rabbit hole! Cheshire Alley - the most fun dive bar on the playa!! Stop by for some afternoon and evening silliness, cool drinks and games. We host super fun themed parties Monday, Tuesday and Wednesday evenings.

name: Chicago Handshake
description: Craving a drink from Chicago or need some shade for your head? Look no further than Chicago Handshake, where you can grab a shot and a beer(The Chicago Handshake) or find a hat on our hat shack to protect you from the blistering sun. We also take sunrise and sunset videos of art on the playa.

name: Chicken Cooter Soup
description: A band of misfits, born of the playa, one living above the peaks of Donner, dedicated to give back via hot dogs, icy treats, and carnival games

name: Chicken Dragon
description:
Our camp is home to our mutant vehicle, Chicken Dragon - Hatchery Gone Wrong. 
Our hatchery has tried to obtain and hatch dragon eggs, but there have been issues, resulting in creatures that look a bit more like chickens. Visitors to our dungeon will see that we are hard at work trying to produce new dragons or chickens, we are not sure what we will get next. Our best hatchling grew large and protects our castle. His fire comes from his comb though, not his mouth. Nothing has gone quite right in the hatchery, but dancing in the dungeon and on the top of the castle will make up for our dragon-less frustration! Our vehicle will be available for exploring, dancing or possibly guest DJing when it is at camp or on the playa.

name: Chico Urban Area
description: Climb aboard the Intergalactic Transporter for a trip across the Playa you will never forget! We are happy to give you a cold beverage, space to dance, chill or just meet new people.

name: Children of Chaos
description: Children of Chaos, established in 2000, is returning to the playa! Join our Gold Parade, have your fortune told, stop by our conversation bar and have a drink and a chat! Our campers hail from Reno, Portland, Seattle, San Francisco, Denver, and Houston.

name: ChillVille on the Esplanade
description: A fire-powered bar and gathering space where participants don’t just watch the fire — they play with it. Guests can trigger towering bursts at the bar with the push of a button, shape flame through sound with the fire-reactive theremin (Theratiz), and step into the action with the ChillVille Spitfire, a flame photography experience that puts you in the shot. The ChillVillean Man comes to life with operator-triggered bursts, drawing in onlookers. Nearby, the Fire Chandelier offers a constant ambient flame where people gather, warm up, and lose themselves in the experience. DJs, music, and interactive effects create a shared, high-energy fire playground. During the day, a shaded lounge offers workshops, massage, and open space for community-led experiences.

name: Chivo Loco
description: A vibrant community bringing flavor, music, and warmth to Playa. Sharing our culture through food and connection. Our chill lounge offers a welcoming space with good vibes and great conversations. Everyone is invited to stop by, enjoy a meal, and experience our hospitality. Come as you are?leave as part of the Chivo Loco family!

name: Choo Choo
description: We have two art cars, bipolar express trains, we drive around the playa and play music, this year we will still build art.

name: Chop Shop
description: We are the best BRC bicycle repair shop. We have bicycle repairs, parts and welding.

name: Church of Chill
description: Come be Chill and enjoy a drink at our misted and shaded chapel. Leave a confession for others to read. Divinity and anhidrosis for all!

name: Cicadia
description: This nature and bug themed camp is buzzing with excitement and fun. The sweet sounds of music will draw you in like bugs to nectar. You can rest in the shaded nooks and comfy seats, quench your thirst with cold electrolytes, or dance the night away on the beautifully lit dancefloor.

name: Cinderbox
description:
An art support camp for the Resilience Art Collective. We are part of a HUB with our two dear sister camps, Fingerbang! and Chico Urban Area - come find us for a visit! 
We are proud recipients of a 2026 BRC Honoraria Grant for our placed art project, Resilience, a larger-than-life flaming tardigrade which will be waiting somewhere on the playa to welcome you!

name: Cinematic Regrets
description: Step into an immersive, fully enclosed space-themed cinema where the playa disappears and the cosmos begins. After sunset, we screen iconic sci-fi films paired with thoughtfully curated popcorn and cocktails inspired by each film. Come dressed for the galaxy or barrow from our costume closet to ear your ticket and join the experience.

name: Cirkus Freaks
description: Cirkus freak, mutant vehicle.

name: Clevian Circularity
description: Dates back to 30,000 BC. We channel a mystic lost civilization. Are you a Clevian too?

name: Cloud 9
description:
We are a live music, deep ancestral camp that jumps between mayhem and meditation depending on the day and whether we've had breakfast.

We wish to preserve clean water for future generations. To that end, we will provide only cold beer to the filthy citizens of Burning Man.

name: Cloudy AF
description:
Feel the thunder as we BUFF and FLOG your muscles at Body Werkz, get foggy in the Steamy AF sauna, get wisped away in our evolving sprinkles of frosty bevies, drift away in a dream in our cloud pit!
We are dedicated to raising the hearts, body and souls of the broader Burning Man community through our art, events, and welcoming space. We dew take our fun quite cirrus-ly.
It's never been this cool to throw so much shade!!

name: Club 40 at Cafe Calm
description:
Come Celebrate the Man's 40th Birthday, and Ours!

Step into the roaring forties. Step into an intimate desert oasis and escape the dust to celebrate the historic fortieth anniversary of the Man. We are bringing the ultimate living room vibe to the playa complete with comfortable couches, giant stuffed animals, and refreshing daily smoothies or pina coladas. Join our family for morning yoga sessions or stop by later to dance to curated ambient and house beats from our favorite international DJs. Removed from pretension, this welcoming haven is the perfect place to recharge, reminisce, and connect with amazing people. Come shake off the dust and raise a glass with us during three massive fortieth birthday celebrations under our shady canopy.

name: ClusterF*ck United
description: Dust, Sun, Booze, Bikes, Night, and Noise?it's a ClusterF*ck out there and that's exactly what you'll find here: a ClusterF*ck of activity where chaos meets collaboration in the heart of the playa! Our camp is a vibrant and diverse community of Burners from around the globe, coming together to celebrate the spirit of Burning Man in our own unique and unconventional ways. Look for our brightly-lit ? marquee!

name: Cockpit
description: We will spirit burners away to the golden age of air travel where they can stop by, relax and recuperate in our airport lounge with an espresso or green juice by day, or a cocktail by night, before taking flight again back to the playa.

name: Cocoon Society
description: A new theme camp operating within the Imagimorphia hub, a returning art support camp. The hub operates under a shared frontage with the Imagimorphia name, and Cocoon Society contributes a transformation-centered public ritual experience as its core offering: the Vinyl Ritual. Participants enter a softened ambient sound environment, choose from pre-made mandala or word/phrase vinyl designs, and slowly peel away the unwanted pieces before transferring the final symbol onto a personal object. The symbolic arc is clear: choose a symbol, peel away what is not needed, imprint what remains. This ties directly into Imagimorphia's metamorphosis theme.

name: Coffee and Pasties
description: Bringing organic peculator coffee / nitro cold brew back the Playa with great things to add like Whiskey or Irish cream and of course all the colorful pasties! And please come sit by our fire!

name: Cognitive Research Institute
description:
Would you like a quick memory screening? We can help you make sure you'll actually remember this week.

The Cognitive Research Institute has deployed a desert station to conduct daily field studies on human memory from a fully shaded research station staffed by clipboard-wielding statisticians in lab coats. 

Drop in during the week for a cognitive assessment and maybe a brain massage or two. Submit an unwanted memory for ceremonial destruction in the MDU-7, our clinical apparatus that is proven to be 100% effective except for ????????? and ???????????????????.

Monday: memory journaling. 
Wednesday: memory auction. 
Friday: Memory Burn ceremony. 

The tone is institutional, the forms are voluminous and the experience is real. Walk-ins welcome. Walk-outs vary.

name: Cold Yogis
description:
Cold Yogis exist to awaken terrestrial spirit, creative life force and ancestral resiliency by wilfully disrupting the status quo and immersing into the true self! 

We offer workshops for breathwork, cold exposures, brain over body techniques, verbal liberation, yoga and tantra to increase health, self awareness, and consciousness. We host playa's most epic Ecstatic Dances.
We are an international camp that shares space with Naked Heart and others.

name: Colita de Rana
description: We are the friends and creators of the mesmerizing frog who glides around the playa in his dapper top hat. Become hypnotized by his glowing aura and find yourself transported to a new destination.

name: Combat Zone
description: We serve the best late night food on the playa. Come see us at 4 am for dan dan noodles and chill beats all week.

name: Comfort & Joy
description: Step through our glowing portal into a queer wonderland of dayglo art, towering flags, and immersive light. At the heart of camp, Afterglow is a 24 7 space for connection, intimacy, and exploration, while our vibrant courtyard hosts performances, workshops, and high energy dance. Visit the Pink Gym, a fully equipped outdoor gym and home of Naked Oil Wrestling. Join us for drag shows, participatory events, and spontaneous moments of play. Whether you come to connect, express, or transform, Comfort and Joy offers an open, welcoming space for all adults to engage, explore, and belong.

name: Coming Home
description: Art Installation "Coming Home"

name: Congee Central
description: ( Fresh HOT Congee)

name: ConTent
description: Jiggle your bones at the "Dome of the Dead", or enjoy the "Volleyball Court for the Deceased"!

name: Contraptionists
description:
Join us, 1 to 3 PM, for our afternoon parties with Snowcones and FireFries.
Over heated kids can ask if we have ice anytime to cool off their little Brains. (Any age in destress will be helped.)
Check the schedule for having your reading done.
or just come cool off in the shade and watch the world go by.

name: COOLSVILLE
description:
An art support camp made up of builders, fabricators, and artists who come to Black Rock City to help bring projects to life. Many camp members are involved in Honoraria or placed art installations, and the camp functions as a home base for people spending most of their time working on art across the city.

Our street frontage includes a few small interactive elements including Rat Trap, a playful bar cart with a giant mousetrap, The Wave, a light up sculptural wave that people can step into, and The Living Room, a cozy listening space on playa with a rug, vintage couch, lamps, and a hi fi stereo playing an eclectic mix of music.

We're fun! Come hang out at COOLSVILLE

name: CornHub
description:
Do you love corn as much as we do? Come experience the entire gamut of the beautiful vegetable slash grain! Vegetables are a scarcity on the playa, so come join us for our fresh corn daily and build your own flavor popcorn bar to get your fibre on! Pooping is a problem out here, so make sure you get in and out of that little plastic box of a toilet as fast as possible.

If you've got your fiber fix already, come hydrate with some iced beverages!

After you're nourished and hydrated, climb up our 15' mushroom art piece and pop your head out the top for a view of the playa, if you dare!

name: Cosmic Giggle
description:
Welcome to Cosmic Giggle! We are burners spanning from NYC to the Bay and crossing continents to London and Beirut. Our name is inspired by an experimental documentary that explores the expansive energy field that we, together, create...and one thing is for sure, it can get pretty random! Here's what we have in store for you this year:
 
We've got a gym! Who said being Playa meant missing out on your pump up?
We've got classes! We work out your externals, navigate your internals, and will get you giggling!
We've got a bar! Rehydrate with electrolytes. Dehydrate with booze. Though beware: we may make you work for it!
Looking to keep your heart rate mellow? We've got cosmic croquet and an oasis lounge.
OH, and meet Freddy, our resident GODZILLA!

 So come on: Enter our cosmic chaos. Have a Giggle!

name: Cosmic Llama
description:
The Cosmic Llama Guardians are sworn to protect the ancient secrets of the Dali Llama lineage. The Cosmic Llamas have been charged with creating the highest vibrations of Harmony & Resonance?Without our camp offering beats, music, rhythmic dance (and llama puns)?the Cosmos would fall dangerously out of balance! 

In the whimsical world of Cosmic Llamas, every step resonates with rhythm, every word hums with harmony, and every heart pulsates with cosmic frequencies. Together we weave the melodies of unity and vibrations of joy that reach the farthest corners of the cosmos, one llama leap at a time!

name: Cosplay Central
description:
The most awesome Cosplay/Larping experience on earth! 
Come and play in our Barbie/Ken and Burner girl boxes - you will dance like crazy.
Come by and get involved in some fun activities in the Cosplay world - we have costumes and props.
AND For sexy and adventurous couples- We have a Barbie theme and naturally Ken being a dickless doll will be fitted with a male chastity cage and Barbie will hold the key!!!

name: Costco Soulmate Trading Outlet
description: The playa's original and longest-running soulmate trading outpost. Come experience our unparalleled matching system, honed over 27 years of no-frills soulmate trading. Trained interviewers dig deep to find your perfect match ? whether that's a new best friend, a kindred spirit, or someone who challenges everything you thought you knew. Interviews & Shenanigans Monday through Friday. Bring a soul to trade.

name: Counter Culture
description: We are the BRC Census support camp. Drop by anytime to learn about what Census does and the information we have to share.

name: Cozy Cat Camp
description: Join us Cozy Cats in the shade! Snuggle in our cozy lounge to escape from the heat and catnap. Enjoy chill music and find cat games in our Curiosity Corner. Climb our Cat Tower for the purrfect playa view. Don't miss our Cat Party! Meow!

name: Cozy Dinosaur
description:
a safe and cozy place to party, relax and meet new friends!

During the day, come escape the elements in our cozy shade structure where we'll be serving ice cold flavored seltzers. Kick back on our comfy seats, take a moment to reflect, or join one of our talks.

Come by in the evening to listen to music and dance at our nightly party.

name: CrazyCamera & Christmas Every Day
description: Where you can make crazy picture, burn the wooden frame for it and celebrate Christmass

name: Crepes and Tonic
description: Follow the music and you'll find us. We serve crępes and a perfected tonic ritual, but that's not really why people come. It's about the vibe, the people, and those unplanned moments that turn into something bigger. Expect dancing, connection, and a space that pulls you in and doesn't let go. Come for a minute, stay for hours

name: Crepiphany
description: The Crepiphany café offers a typical Parisian-style experience with chef-cooked crêpes and puzzles.

name: Critical Connections
description: Connections make us a collective being. They are all critical to us. And Puppets.

name: Cuddle Oasis
description:
Too hot? Too Cold? Partied out? Need a break? Need a cuddle or two? or Ten? You have come to the right place! Come relax under our many shade structures. Enjoy afternoon Sound baths. Come by after a night of parting on the Playa and relax on our rugs to healing electronic sounds.

Follow the large lighted Palm trees at night and come enjoy a drink at the bar and ask about our daily activities.

name: Cult of the Magic Lady
description:
Come to our Cult, we have snacks! The snacks are babies, but don't worry, they are alcoholic. We also have a church, for your physical wellbeing and personal gains. And we feed on your shame. 

We also have a library.

name: Cuttlefish Homebase
description: Come find the Cuttlefish (and Flash the Tortoise) back at their lair and say hi!

name: D'JUNGLE
description:
D'JUNGLE is a day-to-night camp blending wellness, music, and social connection in a multi-zone jungle-inspired environment.
By day, the camp operates as an open wellness space offering yoga, meditation, consciousness talks, healing sessions, and massage experiences - inviting participants to slow down, reconnect, and recharge.
By night, D'JUNGLE transforms into a vibrant cocktail lounge and music gathering with curated DJ programming, immersive lighting, and a welcoming social atmosphere.
Across the esplanade, our multi-level metal stage hosts large-scale DJ sets while creating elevated spaces for sunrise and sunset moments overlooking open playa.
D'JUNGLE invites participants to move between reflection and celebration - to rest, connect, dance, and share meaningful experiences.

name: D.F.C.B.(Don't Fckn' Care Bear)
description: Welcome to "(Don't)_Care_A_Lot" the official home for the Don't Fckn' Care Bear art car. Please be quiet around here because the little bears are sleeping...

name: Dacha
description: Experience a fateful encounters with strangers via our "Spin of Fate" game. Dance your ass off with our DJs spinning at the night with bar and hookahs provided!

name: Dark Heart
description:
Morning community dance followed by small, intimate heart-share pods? Incredible afternoon expansive workshops? Sunset rituals? Fire art? Fire DANCE?!? Nightly temple celebrations of intimacy and joy? Yes, yes, yes, yes, yes!

Start with our Cafe on the Edge, where you can look forward into the mystery and consider what you're going to leave behind. Take the leap into our Dark Temple, where you can plug into the void and remember what all-is-love really feels and looks like and how to bring that heaven to the heart of the playa - you! 

Come drop in with our camp of experienced, international burners who are focused on creating a loving, tight community and flowing the love out to all of you BRC citizens! We love you!

name: Darkwad Patrol
description:
The mission of our theme camp is to increase nighttime safety in BRC by reducing the number of injuries and damage caused by collisions with inadequately lit burners, bikes and structures. To accomplish this mission we gift lights to dark burners and their bikes and engage in community outreach efforts to promote the importance of remaining visible at night. 

Darkwad Patrol hosts lighting workshops about the many ways to accessorize your bike and body with lights. We also provide a 24-hour Light-Share Drop Box where burners can gift lights to fellow burners and dark burners can take the lights they need.

name: Davey Jones Locker Pirate Cove
description: The Davey Jones Locker is docked in pirates cove this year!  Come climb aboard the top of the ship via the fishy climbing net off the side!  Sing some sea shanties with us, relax in the shade on the roof deck or enjoy some weird wacky and wonderful music, which half comes from boxes of records!  Come come pick some music and play!

name: DayCare
description: Burn Scouts are the OG rad scouts, sometimes audacious, always fun, lovable and welcoming. Scouts honor!

name: Daydream
description: Welcome to Daydream, a sanctuary in Black Rock City designed for radical inclusion, creativity, and connection. Step into our Dreamers' Lounge, an immersive space to relax, recharge, and meet fellow Burners away from the chaos of the playa. Start your mornings at our coffee bar and interactive talks, then linger in the lounge or cuddle puddle for spontaneous social and creative interactions. In the afternoons, join intimate workshops and reflective activities that spark inspiration. As the sun sets, our lounge comes alive with ambient projection art, creating a visually immersive experience. Daydream is a place to dream, connect, and embrace transformation together.

name: Death Guild Thunderdon't
description:
Have you seen our dome? 
We haven't.

name: Deco Fish
description: The DECO FISH ART CARS ARE exotic creatures of the deep. Bright rainbows of glorious PSYCHEDELIC illumination, with powerful FIRE effects and rockin' sound systems laced up with intricate ART DECO styling throughout. Come and say HI! And we'll give you a ride you won't forget.

name: Deep C
description: Deep C presents: HypnoDrome — a dazzling 26-foot dome lit by over 25,000 LEDs! Step into the light and get lost in an immersive sea of color, rhythm, and movement. By day, it's a shaded oasis to relax, chill, and connect. By night, it transforms into a vibrant beacon of sound and light—perfect for dancing, lounging, or just being hypnotized by the show. Come drift in the Deep.

name: Deep Eat
description: Get ready to Deep Eat with delicious food and feast your eyes on Lucifera, while enjoying respite from the playa.

name: Deep Ohm
description: Deep Ohm is a place for centered connection, friendship, and fun. We enjoy spending time in our cozy home on the playa and invite all wanderers to come rest in our shade and share their stories. We are a theme camp that is focused on creating a safe space for anyone who desires to connect with others in a meaningful way while making origami paper cranes and festive stamps to commemorate your time with us. We also serve delicious drinks all day long!

name: Deep Playa Simulator
description: Over are the days of having to haul your ass all the way out to the trash fence to enjoy the deep open playa! Now for the first time ever experience the joys and wonders of deep playa from the comfort of the city!

name: DeMentha
description: Mojitos, Music, Shade, Mist & Dancing served up with a warm DeMentha welcome.

name: Deoxidized
description: We are a global community of artists, builders, entrepreneurs, and explorers who come together to create a welcoming neighborhood on the playa. Our theme, the Global Neighborhood Oasis, reflects our belief that connection and participation are at the heart of Black Rock City. By day, we host our Soul Series in our shaded Oasis with guided talks, workshops, and reflective experiences. By night, our bar opens, and music, dancing, and celebration bring the neighborhood together under our glowing parachute. Stop in for conversation, shade, or a moment of inspiration and connection!

name: Desert Dragon
description: Pink Dragon is a dragon themed sound camp centered around a large Dragon Head DJ stage that brings together art, music, and nightlife in Black Rock City. Our frontage features nightly DJs, a shaded dance floor, immersive lighting, lasers, and flame effects, creating a high energy space for participants to gather and dance. In front of the stage, our 24 hour lounge offers soft seating and non alcoholic dragon themed drinks, giving people a place to relax, connect, and enjoy the vibe. Pink Dragon is all about great music, a striking dragon stage, and a welcoming atmosphere.

name: Desert Healers
description:
A welcoming sanctuary will provide a great refuge for those seeking to rest, meditate, decompress or rejuvenate.
Experience Reiki Sessions with Desert Healers

name: Dickhead Camp
description: Camp Dickheadery is at your service providing shitty jokes, bazar drinks and all-around good times. We will be providing an interactive neighborhood bar with inappropriate reading material and creative art experiences such as learning how to draw a dick, or possibly boobs.

name: Dilated Peoples
description:
The Eye Spa at Dilated Peoples

Dust in your eyes? Step into the sanctuary of Dilated Peoples for a total sensory reset.

Surrender to a choreographed journey designed to expand your inner vision. Sink into a reclining chair as we indulge your senses with chilled cucumbers, cooling gel masks, and the restorative scent of weighted lavender. Our camp family anchors the experience with caring touch and an immersive soundscape to help you truly let go.

Offering tranquility and sensory restoration Monday?Wednesday afternoons.

name: Dilla's Den
description: We support the Quesadilla Armadilla mutant vehicle so that she is good to go for playa exploring and artistic photo ops. You can often find us randomly at sound cars in deep playa serving quesadillas at sunrise. The Dilla's Den is where we rest and recharge and you can come by to dilla dally with us anytime. See you in the dust.

name: Dinosaur King
description: Welcome to Dinosaur King, where prehistoric power meets the playa. Our camp is anchored by the Dinosaur King art car -- a full-body dinosaur skeleton mutant vehicle approximately 30 feet long and 12 feet tall, fabricated from steel and covered in thousands of programmable LEDs. A live DJ booth is built directly inside the skeleton's body cavity, where performers spin sets from within the belly of the beast. By day, the skeleton commands attention as a towering playa landmark. By night, it transforms into a blazing, glowing creature that pulses with music and light. The art car roams Black Rock City and returns to camp as an open dance floor for all Burners. No tickets, no guest list -- just good music, open space, and the freedom to move.

name: DIPTOWN
description: Discover the essence of Eastern Europe at BARBORIS, where we serve only the finest Russian, Ukrainian, and Eastern European vodkas. Our cozy, intimate bar offers a unique experience with dozens of vodka brands, each served in ice-cold shot glasses for the perfect chill. Immerse yourself in the authentic atmosphere, savor the rich flavors, and participate in traditional drinking rituals. Learn what sets traditional vodka apart from the rest. Join us at BARBORIS for a journey of taste and tradition, where every sip tells a tale

name: Disco Mushroom
description:
We are Disco Mushroom's humans. 
We love disco anything & everything! 
Come say hello!

Love,
Alpine Artists Collective

name: Disco Space Shuttle
description: Home of the Disco Space Shuttle Mutant Vehicle and Camp. Board with us at 10pm and take a ride around the Universe and Beyond.

name: Discosmos
description:
tired of having fun in the sun? take a momento for downtempo.
come chill with us at Malio's, the bar with the best view on the playa

name: Discotique Pancake Boutique
description: The most sizzling spot on the Playa, serving up a symphony of pancakes Sunday to Saturday from 10AM-4PM daily along with Live Music, Open-Bar and a chill lounge with classes and workshops. Bring your plate and dancing shoes and let's get this pancake party flipping!

name: Discrace
description:
Do you know how much beer can fit inside a frisbee? Join us to find out, play ultimate frisbee, and other fun competitions with fellow burners!

Ultimate Frisbee is an inclusive, spirited community based around a self-officiated "sport", with events primarily organized by players themselves and gifting each other silly things. Sure feels a lot like Burning Man to us.

We're here to share ultimate frisbee with Burners, and also maybe drink those 54 ounces of beer. 

See you on the Dusty Disc(o) Playground!

name: Disfunktion
description:
Come join in with our wobbly world of Weebles , Music, Fire and Mayhem
Evenings eclectic music , slushy's, fiery chill out areasMain event Pyjama party with funkiest PJ giveaways and Sounds

name: Disorient
description: Disorient has been setting Burning Man ablaze since 2001. We are art-centered, compassionate, open-source, and, above all, Pornj. We greet you with love, both playful and sexy, and awaken the Disorient within you, spreading our spirit far and wide: Do it yourself. Do more. Do it all.

name: DJ University
description: Step into a participatory music campus where beginners become DJs and strangers become collaborators. Start in the rhythm circle, learn the fundamentals of mixing, build your own set, and take the stage for a live showcase supported by the community. Open deck hours, guided workshops, and an optional music creation lab invite you to move from observer to creator. Whether you have never touched a DJ controller or are ready to refine your sound, this is your chance to contribute to the pulse of Black Rock City. Walk away and return, saying, "I DJ'd at Burning Man!"

name: DK50 Trash Fence Camp
description: Hi, we are an art support camp supporting the Trash Fence Souveneirs project - come find it on inner playa and share your art. We love you. And stop by camp to also create a moment of art immersion.

name: Do Baskets Dream
description: We are the art support camp for the "Do Baskets Dream on Shore or Sea" art piece on playa!

name: Do not confuse here
description: Not confusing area. We support the Beacon of Confusion.

name: Dogs N Recreation
description:
Neighborhood Mini-Rec Center offering badminton/outdoor games, vegan and hot dogs, live postcards and board games.

Chill, on the outer roads, filled with a little chaos.
Grab a dog! Grab a chair! Let's play!

name: Dome on the Range
description: Yeehaw! We're your Dome away from Home! Slingin' mystery drinks and curious cures for all that ails ya. We're the weird neighborhood waterin' hole you keep comin' back to. Whether just starting your night or wandering your weary way home, come saddle up to the bar; we've got a cure for all that ails ya.

name: Dome Sweet Dome
description: A group of long time burners happy to be in Black Rock City. Come by and visit and check out our Mutant Vehicles.

name: Don't STOP
description: Black Rock City is a place where small things can derail your day or night and we want to support our fellow burners by offering small necessities [ex. tampons, condoms, sunscreen, or glowy things] from our Don't STOP Gift Box, or a drink with inspired conversation. Additionally, we offer opportunities to restore through Yoga and breathwork and learn how to repair your bike.

name: Down Low Club
description: Host of annual LGBTQ+ MEET & GREET on opening Monday night since 2012, LITTLE BLACK DRESS PARTY on Tuesday evening and TV/MOVIE THEMED PARTY on Thursday afternoon. Also, since 2009, hosting the 24/7 interactivity in our DOWN LOW CLUB TENT, providing a discreet, enclosed and air-conditioned space for erotic play between consenting 18+ adult men & male-identified individuals.

name: Dr. Carl's Collection of Depts.
description: Dr. Carl's Collection of Departments returns! Come play our legendary Dept. of Collections game, where we will give you a semi-fabulous prize if you can do, are, or tell us about a thing we list on the board of tiles. Enjoy a homebrew at our Dept. of Dumpster Dive Bar. Learn and play Go in our Dept. of Strategy, enjoy our blacklight Hissing Booth, or let fate decide at our luscious pink Kiss-Met randomizer.

name: Dr. Playa's ENT Clinic
description: Dr Playa's ENT Clinic helps Black Rock Citizens clean out their head holes daily. Open 12PM-3PM. Since 1792

name: Draft Punk
description:
In the future, Daft Punk steals OUR name, "dRaft Punk".
We're here to steal it back.
And we brought a LOT of ice-cold beer with us.
Grab a cold one on the go, or hang out with us for the day.

name: DragonCamp Armory
description: This is a HIGHLY participatory workshop where women will learn to make and decorate their own sexy Armor Bikini to keep, wear, and share on the Playa. Recyclable aluminum is used to hand hammer a custom fit costume using traditional hand metal working techniques used for props in films and space operas. Patterns are provided in a variety of sizes. The thin sheet aluminum is cut by hand and then pounded into custom form at our special work stations. When done, the armor can be decorated with various baubles, bangles and jewelry bits which we supply, Bikinis are secured with nylon thong. We have offered this workshop for several years and they are amazingly popular. Many have told us it is their favorite thing they have done at Burningman. We also offer Body painting and Dinosaur Rides.

name: Drawn Inn
description: Drawn Inn is a studio space and lounge where you are both the artist, and the art. Come flex those artistic muscles at our Figure Drawing classes and even try your hand at being one of our models! We will have open studio hours. And, themed events where we offer whimsical props, body paint and creative atmosphere to help you become your most inspired self.

name: Dreamery
description:
Dreamery is a camp to discover, share and experience dreams. It is an interactive space to read and write dreams and fantasies, happy or scary, random and crazy, sensual or sad.

What dream would you ask for if you could?
If you could go anywhere in a dream, where would it be?

At Dreamery, you might also meet someone special. You can see if you want to hang out for just a bit or maybe become lifelong soulmates.

Got any bad dreams you want to get rid of? Drop them to the Dreamery Alter to be ceremonially burned at The Temple Burn.

Have any happy dreams or exciting tales to tell? Jot them down in The Book of Dreams. Flip through the pages to discover stories and dreams from people from around the world, and you might even find new dreams to call your own.

name: Drink and Drive-In
description: At our camp we condone drinking and driving-in to enjoy a movie and a drink with us! We have chairs, and games, and whit. If you've got nothing else to do, and you've had a few too many, PULL UP.

name: Duane's Whirld
description:
DuanesWhirld is enjoying our 20th consecutive year en Playa, with many of our campers trekking from Vermont.

Our camp supports the mutant vehicle Fluffy -- accessible public transit masquerading as a cloud wafting across the playa. A wheelchair lift and Braille rails accommodate that many more Burners into the artcar experience.

We enjoy mass-gifting our fellow Burners with Deep Playa Beer Delivery (quenching the late afternoon thirst in the heat) and 'Smores (late nights in deep playa to ease the chill with warm gooey treats.) Each of those gatherings generates micro-community among those Burners brought together. Look for Fluffy!!

name: Duckbutt
description: Waddle on over and quack yourself up with our ri-duck-ulous games.

name: Dune Dwellers
description: Mutant Vehicle Support Camp for The Wandering Playhouse

name: Dusk
description: Psychedelic techno/tech-house inspired by the original sunset parties in Venice Beach, CA.

name: dust & stars
description:
WE WELCOME ALL WHO DARE. this is dust & star's twelfth year as a theme cult. that's right: we're a cult. since the dawn of us, we've donned black robes and warned other burners the endless night was on its way. 

to tell you the truth, we're starting to think the night not actually be endless. ln fact, the horizon is getting brighter...and from what we've glimpsed, there's a breathtaking new dawn on the other side. literally breathtaking, and shiny. blinding, even.

name: Dust Circus
description: We are a multicultural and multinational group of people with various backgrounds and lifestyles who decided to create a special space on the Playa. Come to us to have fun and participate in all our activities - Jousting game, New Year celebration, Video-Art Installation. And do not hesitate to hop on our beautiful Mutant Vehicle, the ShroomVroom when you see it gliding on the Playa, let's experience the beauty of the Playa altogether.

name: DUST STARS COLLECTIVE
description: Stop by for a refreshing boost in the dust at our dual hydration station. We offer fresh iced coffee to jumpstart your mornings and spicy micheladas to celebrate the midday sun. Relax in our comfortable shaded lounge while enjoying chill beats and great company. Our space is a welcoming gift for all citizens looking to cool down and connect with the neighborhood.

name: DUSTFISH
description: DUSTFISH, serving Love and Pho all week.

name: Dustmight
description:
Art support camp for Voxelite, a volumetric light sculpture.

Previous projects have included Popstar, the mobile popcorn stand!

name: Dusty Beavers
description: We are the Dusty Beavers. We are a camp at Burning Man. We are from Québec, Canada and France. We bring love, joy and maple goodies to Burning Man!

name: Dusty Bunnies
description: Camp Dusty Bunnies - get a new outfit at the Boutique, taste strange foods at Bunny's Deli, dance and mingle with your new best friends in our Lounge. Plus, watch for Bunny's Pop-up Bistro to randomly appear on the Playa.

name: Dusty Delight
description: Come cool off with fresh playa-made ice cream while dancing to our incredible melodic techno DJs spinning atop our sexy art car Double-D! Join the festivities Tuesday-Friday 1-5pm.

name: Dusty Dillas
description: Experience the Wild Wild West at Dusty Dillas, a Western themed bar and quesadilla saloon. Here you'll find comfort in assless chaps, refreshing libations, and some cheesy goodness. Come on down for a dusty good time and a chance to spin the wheel to determine your luck in the dust.

name: Dusty Dreamers
description: At Dusty Dreamers we believe Burning Man is a dream in which we get for a week the opportunity to be completely free, to let our imagination go wild, to try new things and make new friends and that's why we are building the Home of the Dreamers at BRC. Our core theme is Celebration and Liberation. We are also a European camp, with our burners coming primarily from France, Sweden, and Spain. We are very easy to find, just look out for our 28ft tall Eiffel Tower, et voila!

name: Dusty Mule Saloon and Playground
description: We offer the vibe of belly laughs all day, everyday. Inside our vibrant dome with misters, you'll find a welcoming bar offering boozy cocktails or one of our chilled non-alcoholic options with a boogie music theme. Dome interior games include Yard Yahtzee, Pin the Man on the Ass, Truth or Jenga, Cards Against Humanity, Monopoly, etc. Venture through tunnels connecting smaller domes to our main dome for added adventure. Our playground features an array of interactive games sure to entertain all, from large-scale Connect 4 to Rubber Ring Toss Your Cookies and Shut Your Cornhole. LED Tetherball and hydraulic teeter-totters in What Goes Up Must Come Down add to the carnival-like atmosphere. Laughter is the universal love language of friends.

name: Dusty Scouts of Camp Campy Camp
description:
Camp Campy Camp aims to create the CAMPIEST experience at Burning Man. Imagine a summer camp created where RuPaul with Josephine Baker and Alexander McQueen as the head Camp Counselors. A summer camp where you can explore the realities of Burning Man by asking: how do we collectively construct our reality here?

At Camp Campy Camp, we celebrate everyone in their finest form. We pay homage to the LGBTQ+ BIPOC originators of drag and ballroom. Our goal is to create a space akin to what ball culture has done - a space where anyone can be themselves, a space to fully celebrate each person for who they are. 

Our offerings will include traditional camp activities with a twist (merit badges, friendship bracelets, knitting, ropes course). Stop by any afternoon Tu-Fri to see what we have on deck!

name: Dusty Speakeasy and Sanctuary
description:
Step into a 1920s Speakeasy...the legendary home of the dick whistle...mysteriously transported through time to the dusty playa. 

Sip on refreshing Bees Knees, whiskey & pickles, and other vintage cocktails while joining in the fun: Saloon Day, a Silent Disco, Dick Whistle Races, and don't forget to grab a cup of your own!

Seeking a moment of reprieve? Find our Sanctuary, a cool oasis with hydration, light conversation, and a space to rest and recharge

name: Dusty Taint
description:
Dusty Taint Juke Joint is the Shadiest Bar in Town! Inspired by 1940s Negro Juke Joints, our space blends music, games, nostalgia, and drinks...where passersby can unwind on the porch or in our cozy neighborhood style bar. More than a party-its a refuge from crazy weather. Its multi-cultural, sexually diverse gathering that sparks conversations and new friendships.

Vibe out on the porch. Dance to some curated playlists. Toast to connection and authenticity. Cards, darts, games, and themed gatherings keep the vibe lively in a relaxed, informal setting.

In a world of hate and noise, we stand for authenticity, love, and unity, celebrating cultures, embracing differences, and learning from one another. At Dusty Taint Juke Joint, we don't just party...we strive to build a better Burning Man community.

name: Earth Guardians
description: Earth Guardians are an outreach and communications volunteer group whose mission is to educate and inspire Burning Man participants to Leave No Trace (LNT) at the event. We can go beyond leaving "no trace" and leave instead, positive traces on the land. Come see our many bike nature and geology tours, sustainability speakers, DIY workshops, Aztec Burner dances, or volunteer training and gatherings! Come and volunteer on our LNT and compliance outreach teams or participate in a Gerlach LNT our hot-spring patrol, or jump on our MOOP train.

name: EBB & Glow Village
description:
Come get your glow on at EBB & Glow Village! 

Enter the BRC Piano Bar and quench your thirst, enjoy live music or get on stage yourself for karaoke or a jam. Learn how to ride a OneWheel at Keeping it Wheel and join our group rides. Resource with Yoga practice or evening cocktails and DJs on the SkyDeck. Get your gorgeous playa portrait shot by pros at Just Shoot Me in the Dust photo studio. Broken bike? Cranky and Sons Bike Repair will help you get rolling again. Hop a ride on the Peter Panda mutant vehicle. Refresh in the mid-day heat with Snow Cones. All this and more!

name: Edna's Oasis
description: Edna's Oasis, where the elephants instinctively flock like the bassheads of capastrano. Feel the rumble of every step. But be cautious because she is a B.I.T.C.H.

name: Eitherlight
description: A place to dream and connect with light lovers and sonic connoisseurs.

name: El Pulpo Magnifico
description: This is where the giant, flaming metal octopus lives.

name: Elements
description: Elements is a first class experience in the desert. Solar Axis, our kinetic sun catcher installation, lights up the arrival into Black Rock City with cascading color and light. Inside camp the Sky Net hangs above our dance floor, Playa One waits to take you on a nightly flight into the deep playa, and cocktail hour happens every sunset. Everyone is welcome aboard.

name: ELEMENTUM
description: Earth. Air. Water. Fire. The place to nurture your nature. Experience the balance and amplification of the four elements through yoga, workshops, sound, and dance parties. We offer a non-alcoholic bar serving matcha & elemental elixirs daily. We provide flow, connection, and restoration for people of all identities and points of view. Home of the Space Cow People and the MIDNIGHT INFERNO PARTY on Thursday. Magic happens here.

name: Elixai Dust Tribe
description:
We are a welcoming dance and lounge camp offering a shaded daytime gathering space and curated electronic music experiences in the evenings. During the day, our frontage functions as a comfortable rest and connection zone with seating, hydration, and open conversation. In the evenings, we host thoughtfully programmed DJ sets focused on melodic house and groove oriented sounds in a contained and respectful environment.
Our camp is open to all who wish to participate, dance, or simply relax. We prioritize inclusion, consent culture, and sound awareness while creating an energizing but intentional atmosphere. Stop by to move, meet new friends, and share the moment.

name: Elsewhere Institute
description: Interactive science museum that finally explains why we remember experiencing history differently, known as the 'Mandela effect'

name: Embers
description: Our Desert Oasis Bar and Lounge offers craft cocktails alongside our popular self-postcard station, where participants write messages to their future selves that we mail before ticket sales as reminders of playa magic. Join us for daily morning yoga sessions, smutty poetry readings, and UV paint dance parties under our powerful blacklight system. Stop by our Playa Confessional booth to record your deepest burn revelations, then return for Absolution Happy Hour where we broadcast the previous day's confessions while serving themed forgiveness cocktails. NEW THIS YEAR come for the drinks stay for the hotdog glory hole, you know you're curious...

name: Emergence with  Buddha Lounge
description: Facebook Emergenceartcar

name: Empire of Dirt
description:
At Empire of Dirt, we don't just build mutant vehicles...we launch dreams into orbit. Our camp is a hub of performance, creativity, collaboration, and full-on playa absurdity. We're proud to be a returning Burning Man camp based in Oakland, California, with a long tradition of mobile art, DIY ethics, and radical participation.

Interactivity is Our Mission

name: Enchanted Booty Forest
description: We love hearing that we're the most welcoming camp on playa, and we hear it a lot! We offer whatever our campers feel called to offer, so it's an eclectic mix of things including workshops, grilled cheese, dance parties, mini golf, and more. Come visit us, but be warned you might never want to leave...

name: End of the Line
description: We welcome all Dusty Burners, and whiskey-soaked ghosts of the Old West. We offer mischief and laughter to rattle your bones - consensually, of course. Or perhaps you'd rather just belly up to the bar, trade tall tales, and plot a Burner takeover of the Default World.

name: Endstation
description: Camp Endstation is your last stop before nowhere. Grab a ticket from our dispenser, find a seat, and see what happens. Some days it's a conversation workshop with strangers, other days a tarot reading you didn't plan on. When night falls, the Disorient Express takes over with beats, incense, and tea. Or catch the Loco Motive for a sunrise party before the heat hits. Between events, the tent is open, the tea is hot, and there's always a seat.

name: Enrichment.Institute
description:
The Aperture Science Enrichment Center ("Portal") has joined forces with The Institute ("Fallout") to form the Enrichment.Institute

The Enrichment.Institute reminds you that the Weighted Companion Cube will never threaten to stab you and, in fact, cannot speak. However, any advice it does give you should be radically included.

The Weighted Companion Cubes are from the computer game "Portal"; this year there will be two, one companion cube and one steampunk cube. They are single rider, mutant vehicles, mobile art pieces, a 3 foot square cube, with sound and lights.

Remember, the cake is a lie!

The Portal Enrichment.institute hosts the Weighted Companion Cube Mutant Vehicles. 

The entire camp is Synth Free. No radiation!

Home of the Apocaloptimist, the Agnostic Pope, but you can't prove it.

name: Entheos Community Village
description: Members of the Entheos Community organize one of the most diverse theme camps placed at the annual Burning Man event in the Black Rock Desert of Nevada. Friends and members of the Entheos Community come from over 43 countries to contribute their effort, skills, and resources to the creation of Entheos @ Burning Man. The camp creates extensive 24/7 interactivity for all ages as a gift to the citizens of Black Rock City, functions as a pilgrimage home for its members, and serves as a nexus to meaningfully connect people from around the world across national, religious, and ideological lines. As part of Entheos' commitment to radical inclusion, we hold a significant portion of our camp capacity open each year to welcome people who are new to Entheos. Come play on the giant Trampoline Arena.

name: Erotic Inclination Photo Studio
description: Step into the realm of sensual allure: Swing by to EIPS (Erotic Inclination Photo Studio) to create one of a kind photo memory of yourself and your loved one with the help of our resident photo artist.
