Singles, couples, and groups are welcome to experience unique photoshoots on the outskirts of Black Rock City, where the good old Razorback Mountain sits patiently, providing a stunning natural backdrop for the art you’re about to create using nothing but your body and the unique light of the high desert. We will provide a discrete environment to have your intimate photos taken in our photo tent or you can choose a photo session outside in the walk-in camping area catching the light of the golden hour of the late afternoon. All walk-ins are welcome! Hours: Mon – Fri, 9:30 – 5

name: ESD Rampart
description: Rampart is the main medical clinic staffed by  licensed medical professionals able to provide advanced care to the entire community. Doctors, nurses, paramedics, x-ray techs, lab techs and pharmacists on staff 24/7 along with ambulances and aircraft provide care at the highest level under permit from the State of Nevada.

name: ESD Station 3:00
description: ESD Station 3 supports the Medical station at 3 & C, it is also the home to the Black Rock City Fire Department. For 25 Years "Fire Camp" has been the playa home for ourESD Fire, HazMat, Tech Rescue and medical volunteers.

name: ESD Station 9:00
description: ESD station 9 supports the ESD Medical station at 9 & C, it also the playa home to many  ESD medical volunteers.

name: Extinct Oasis
description: Trust your senses, this is not a mirage! Extinct Oasis is a shaded, mist-cooled, prehistoric-themed space mixing up refreshing drinks and tasty beats. Get a break from the sun, hydrate with a tasty cocktail/mocktail, dance to music (with words), or just lounge on our comfy oversized blowup furniture.

name: EYERIS
description: Last year we did IRIS photography and had so much fun!! The only change we are making is added a few more members to help us get to more IRIS PHOTOS!!! Come on down and make some crafts while you wait for your turn to get an image of your IRIS! (SOMETIMES we even add something special into the PUPIL!)

name: F.U.Ego Stage Bar & Lounge
description: Egos at the door, snow cones in hand. F.U.Ego is back on the 7:30 B Plaza with our legendary No Mercy Stage. Sing your heart out, get gonged, and get rewarded with access to our A/C VIP Sanctuary. Whether you're here for the fire-breathing art, the 24/7 hydration station, or a top-shelf drink at our newly redesigned lounge, we're your home for high-energy interactivity and low-ego vibes. Come get gonged.

name: FAFA Camp
description: Welcome! We are an international camp and look forward to seeing you at our friendly, cozy camp. Come round mornings and afternoons for our interactivities or to just sit in the shade on our front porch.

name: Fantastic Sams
description:
Camp Fantastic Sams serves breakfast in the morning, debauchery in the afternoon, and drinks in the evening. 

We are a LGBT+ camp, and we have a comfy "cuddle puddle" for after dark (and during the daytime).

name: Fantastica Music Healing Camp
description: Reset with us in a space where the magical sounds of live guitar gently guide you into relaxation and inner balance. Here, you can pause, release tension, and simply be. Our camp creates an atmosphere of calm, comfort, and mindful presence. Open to all who seek restoration and a deeper connection with themselves.

name: Fast & Bi-Curious
description: At Fast & Bi-Curious, you can have any ice cold beer you want, as long as it's a Corona. Stop in for an ice cold Corona (non-alcoholic available) and watch our favorite film series with us.

name: Fat Panda
description: Art support for Jeremiah, Sunrise Sentinals, and Refrenda

name: Fatwatt
description: Experience Ego Death, an interactive electric chair.

name: Fauxliage
description: Our fake greenhouse offers a temporary refuge from the harsher elements of the playa. Come take a break in our cool misted space and relax to a nice soundscape. Stick around for some spontaneous DJ sets! At night, look for our 11' LED sign, colorful up lights, silhouetted plants! We'll also have an interactive 20 foot circular LED art piece that has some custom low resolution panels that light up with more participants and pulse to the beat of the music or the movement of the people in the circle.

name: Favela Culture
description: Welcome to Favela ArtCar & Camp, inspired by the spirit of resilience, community, and creativity found in Brazil's most vibrant slum neighborhoods. Here, we celebrate connection beyond social labels and our iconic skull-shaped Art Car is a moving symbol of that message: a reminder that beneath it all, we are all equal. Come dance with us, share stories, and experience a space where differences dissolve into unity, art, and radical inclusion. In the Favela, everyone belongs.

name: FDA: Food & Dance Administration
description: If you're on the hunt for a warm bite to eat, a drink, and a chill spot to groove to some kick-ass beats, your quest ends here! Report to the food & Dance Administration and make new friends at our daily themed Beats and Eats events. Back for a 4th year of valuing self-expression, openness, and an infectious vibe of fun, we guarantee genuine connections, thought-provoking ideas, and unique themed parties.

name: Feed tHE ARTists
description: Started in 2007 with Larry Harvey's blessing and support, FTA has fed tens of thousands of artists, musicians, dancers, builders, makers, dabblers, and generally curious wandering travelers. FTA actively models the concept of creating community through the sharing of delicious meals at BRC and all over the world. We are striving to elevate food to an art form, serving as a primary resource for playa food safety, kitchen design, and unforgettable cooking. You never know what we'll be cooking up next - and, whatever it may be, you are invited to prepare it with us and share a meal of some of the finest food ever gifted on the playa!

name: FELANGY
description: FELANGY, work support camp, we're doing it wrong.

name: Fermented Reality
description:
We celebrate fermentation in all its forms - of foods, drinks, the mind, and the body!

Come by any weekday afternoon (~2-5pm) to participate in rowdy and eclectic games: Are you ready to kneel before the Pickle Glory Hole? Maybe you just need a prescription from our Pickle Clinic to cure what ails you?

We hail from 10+ countries and 7 states, and would love to make fermented playa magic with YOU!

name: Fingerbang
description: Fingerbang is a rowdy crew of cheerleaders, athletes, and coaches who love to play, dance, and cheer for YOU! Come grab a megaphone and heckle from the top of our Bleachers. Join us for Hoppy Homecoming, naughty cheers, riotous games of Burner Family Feud and Porn Spelling Bee, cold drinks and dancing at the Go Fuck Yourself Saloon, and our Cheer Gear and Couture Jockstrap Boutique. Don't miss our truly epic Wednesday Pep Rally, complete with pom-poms, whistles, cheering, dancing & general mayhem.

name: Fire Camp
description:
Fire Camp is a home for fire spinners and performers of all kinds. Come by for a fire jam or to play on the aerial rigs & poles, or just enjoy the music and entertainment! Try to find out who the swag keeper is and get your stickers or patch!
If the buttons with red lights are on, you can press them...

name: Fire Conclave Convergence
description: Fire Conclave Convergence is where Fire Performers, Ambient Drummers, and Documentarians who will be performing in the Great Circle will be signing in and receiving procedural information. Those with a Black Rock passport can also get their passport stamped.

name: Firefly Solar
description: Our camp is founded on clean energy and we are committed to helping Burning Man become a community energized by renewable resources. This year, we are expanding Firefly Solar, 100kW solar system with 372 kWh battery storage. We also plan to host a panel discussion on sustainability & renewable energy for the Burning Man community. Have an interest in solar or need to charge? Come check us out!

name: Firelight & Lemonade
hometown: Eugene and Bend, Oregon, and California
description: Firelight and Lemonade is a welcoming oasis where you can cool down with cold lemonade, warm up by the fire, and connect with others. Stop by to pause, reflect, recharge, and share conversation.

name: Fjörgyn's Lair
description:
The Viking Longboat was a potent symbol of life, livelihood, one's journey through life, the afterlife, and was used by the Norse for transport, in trade, in warfare, and as a burial vessel for centuries.
Fjorgyn is a personification of earth in Norse mythology, and the mother of the thunder god Thor, the son of Odin.

name: Flat Tire Cafe
description:
Welcome to Flat Tire Cafe, your oasis in the dust! Join us every weekday from 10AM to 2PM for iced coffee and expert bicycle repair services. Nestled under a vibrant, colorful shade canopy, our camp offers a haven of relaxation and fun, day or night for all ages! Dive into our interactive game lounge, where laughter and camaraderie flow as freely as our coffee. Whether you're seeking refuge from the sun, a quick bike fix, or just a place to chill and meet new friends, Flat Tire Cafe is your go-to spot. Open to all burners, we're here to make your journey smoother and your days brighter. See you under the canopy!

Note: We do not fix electric bikes. Sorry OG bikes only!

name: Flybynyte
description:
Serving exquisite coffee drinks at the Airport from 8am-noon, Mo-Sat.
Come and enjoy our live music and Rainbow Roots Cafe atmosphere while waiting for a flight.
Mo-Fri 10am-noon we will have aviation ground school. Our instructors will give you an introduction to aerodynamics, weather, radio communications, avionics, airspace and all things aviation. We can go as easy or as deep as u like - let's learn about flying in a playful way!

name: Flying Pegasus
description:
Fulfilling Fanciful Flying Ferry Function (for a Fucked-up Flat-Foot)

Wire-art Pegasus 'flying' mutant vehicle presenting in MOBL form providing fanciful transportation and refreshments

name: Foam Home presents FOAMADELIC
description: Foam Home presents FOAMADELIC to Black Rock City!! The Foamy Homies will foam blast & rinse sparkly clean burners, and collectively activate an altar for humanity & all life! Complete with mandatory consent training, practicing true Inclusivity for everyone! - Groups of 60 at a time for a total of 2000 people a day. Wednesday through Saturday from 12-1pm for families with kids, and 1-4:20pm for all.

name: Fokaround
description: Camp Fokaround is a welcoming, high-vibe lounge camp offering a space for connection, conversation, and creative expression in Black Rock City. By day, we host relaxed gatherings and intentional interactions. By night, our illuminated art car transforms into a roaming light sculpture that invites participants to cruise, pause, and share meaningful moments on the playa. Rooted in participation, consent, and communal effort, we create an inclusive environment where everyone is welcome to rest, connect, and contribute to the magic of Burning Man.

name: Fomo Playalounge
description: Phasmantis brings snow cones, pop tarts, and dank beats to the playa. Stop by on a hot day and grab a drink and some saucy snow cones to cool off.

name: For the Glory of The C Ship
Foreskin
description: Camp Foreskin... not what you're thinking! We provide facials throughout the week For Your Skin! Great group of people just wanting to give back to our community. Come chill with us anytime and you might be in for a skin-gasm.

name: Freeloader Pizza Kitchen
description: Freeloader Pizza Kitchen (FPK) is a small art effort that emphasizes high quality coal fired pizza at Burning Man. At FPK, we love fostering a sense of community by sharing and making pizza with intention. Our ethos is that good things happen when you put in hard and heartfelt work. But it doesn't always turn out the way you planned and sometimes things get burnt!

name: French Fruits
description: French Fruits is a small camp with a simple and heartfelt mission: bringing fresh fruit to the playa every day as a free gift to Black Rock City. In a desert environment where cold, hydrating, and nutritious food is rare, we believe in offering ripe pieces of fruit. We bring our love of French cuisine and food culture with us to the desert. When you stop by, you will not only get something refreshing to eat, you will also learn the name of that fruit in French, hear a little about how it is used in French cooking, and leave with a small taste of the culture and warmth that we carry from home. Get off your bike, sit down in the shade, enjoy a piece of fruit, and let us share a little bit of France with you. Everyone is welcome, always.

name: French Maid Brigade
description: The French Maids are a playful, meaningful, health and wellness camp that is excited to offer Ayurvedic Massages, Scented Oils, Yoga, Breathing, Happiness and Art workshops to express any Burners creative skills...Come chill and add to your experience on playa with the MAIDS!

name: French Manila
description: Our camp is inspired by the melting pot of different cultures and backgrounds of our camp members who are from America, Canada, France, and the Philippines. Our founding crew met in Manila and San Francisco many years ago and we bonded over art, good food, and exploring these cities together. As our family grows over the years, one thing stays true, on playa we love hosting late afternoon themed happy hour parties with scoops of interactivity mixed in.

name: Freqz of Love
description: Our camp is a cozy, heart-centered lounge where burners can relax, reset, and connect. We host interactive experiences like breathwork, oracle pulls, numerology, movement sessions, and playful recovery activities for dusty travelers. Stop by to add a message to our wedding and affirmation backdrops, grab some shade, and join whatever is happening in the moment. With ambient music, comfy seating, and a welcoming crew, our space is made for slowing down and meeting new friends. Come recharge and share the love frequency.

name: Fresh Squeezed!
description: Art & Lemonade since 2006. Come join us for ice cold lemonade and group painting.

name: Friendlandia
description:
We have many customs and traditions for celebrating and recognizing romantic relationships. However, friendships are often longer lasting and as strong as many marriages, and yet we often don't spend the time to celebrate and honor those relationships.
Friendlandia is a place to celebrate new and long-time Friendships in ceremony by sharing vows, exchanging Friendship Bracelets, and expressing dedication and love for the friends in your life. Come have a ceremony at our Temple of Friendgagement, exchange vows and Friendship Bracelets, and become BFFs--Burner Friends Forever.

name: Frizz
description: A chill cafe & bar to come retire at!

name: From Mars With Love
description: Home of the Serendipity Mars Rover

name: Frozen Oasis
description: Home of the Dust City Symphony. Shelter from the storm and relax under the misters with a yummy frozen slushy drink and a live classical music performance.

name: fruitPOP
description: Founded in 2019, fruitPOP is a LGBTQ-centered theme camp dedicated to radical self-expression, inclusivity, and pure, unfiltered queer joy. We create a vibrant, consent-driven space where playful absurdity meets delightful connection. Whether you're a longtime fruity member or a first-time guest, you're part of our ever-evolving, radically welcoming community. Join us, participate, and let's make magic together on the playa!

name: Frybread and Friends
description: Stop by and share Frybread treats and relax in our lounge area open bar Throw axes at our ax throwing targets. We also feature non alcoholic drinks.

name: Fucking Joe Camp
description: Welcome to Fucking Joe Camp! Where everybody knows your name, and we're always glad you came!

name: FUN-DO BAR
description:
Looking to get melty while having a booty shaking good time?! Look no further than Fun-Do Bar! Our delicious Swiss cheese and chocolate fondue paired with ice cold wine is sure to make your taste buds dance! Join us for our dance party happy hour (4p-6p or until we run out!). Our servers will be scantily clad wearing nothing but aprons, so come on down and melt with happiness while shaking your booty to the beats!

Soup Sluts will be serving two nights of soup magic for thirsty and hungry Burners. Night 1 (Tues 10p-12a) will be vegan pozole- spiced sauteed jackfruit and hominy, topped with cilantro and lime juice. Night 2 (Thurs 10p-12a) will be vegan tom kha soup.  Nothing like a spicy, hearty and delicious soup to help rejuvenate people for their night out.

name: FUR
description: FUR is a theme camp of furries, who come together to collaborate in the shared theme of Anthropomorphic Art, Costuming, and Culture.

name: Fusion Valley
description: Fusion Valley, founded in 1999, is a long-running playa living room where sweet and slightly surly geeks and artists gather in the dust. Stop by to cool off in our shade, play board games, charge up, weave through our human slalom course, or grab the mic during a pop-up radio moment. By night, roll up to our drive-in for delightfully questionable cinema. Come for the mischief, stay for the connection.

name: Future Turtles
description:
The Turtles are a chaotic bunch of friends camping together at Burning Man since 2018 without any drama, death, or injury. Visit the Turtle Café for a cold (or hot) drink to make new friends and meet old friends. Check out the view from our observation decks.

We are, mostly, happy mutants: nerds, engineers, programmers, gaymers, creators and artists, scientists and philosophers. A lot of us know our way around Python, Monty Python, LED circuits, and computer science. 

We are a gay camp. Everyone is welcome, but we work actively to create a safe gay haven in a heteronormative world.

Participation is our number one value. We don't have spectators, tourists, or sparkle-ponies.

name: G
description: Welcome to our living room, g. Grab a croissant and dance for an hour or ten. We're grateful you're here.

name: Gaian Airship
description: An immersive journey into the thriving future. We play a game to create a unifying vision of the thriving future around the Time, Water, Fire, Air and Earth elements.

name: Galactic Cruzaders
description:
A JOURNEY OF TIME AND SPACE 
Galactic Cruzaders - the true international camp bringing in folks from all over the world. Stop by for Wednesday Night cocktails in formal attire. Sit your ass down and get warm around the camp fire on every night. And stop by and listen to what our DJ's are spining, or join in with the live band when they play.

name: Gallavant
description: Ahoy from the Pirates of the Playa (infamous creators of the oldest pirate ship on the playa the USS Nevada)?look for us "Gallavanting" around the playa spreading fun and adventure and hop a ride with us! ! Our mighty USS Nevada will be doing 2+ tours around playa daily from our home port so come visit us, enjoy our signature grogs concocted with rum in an awesome full-fledged pirate bar, The ArrghBar. pARTicipate in our 2+ daily theme parties 10am and 2pm, come get your drink on, play games, and then relax in our Pirates Den ? an amazing chill space with couches. Visit our Wayward Wenches Bazaar, because we got what you forgot. Come party with us....It's sure to be an adventure.

name: Garage Mahal
description: Garage Mahal

name: Gauchos del Fuego
description:
The home to Argentinean burners in BRC since 2014. Come by to enjoy some mates in the morning and may be you might end up taking your own mate kit home.

We are also home of Fuego Austral, our regional burn. We'll have information and postcards for you to take home about the only regional burn in Latin America.

On Thursday show your Gaucho's skills at the Guacho Partuza, a Pampa's Rodeo BRC Style and the Alpha Whore competition.

name: GDI's - Gawd Damn Independents
description: We're the GDI's (Gawd Damn Independents) and we're all working for the Man. We're Nevada Burners, plus one gawd damn Canuck - all with "Playa MacGyver" skills. So; drop in - late afternoon or late night as you might catch us enjoying a hot coffee or cold one...after work. Walk up; dust off a chair and share your best "There was this one time at Burning Man" story around our fire-pit. We might trade a trinket, a laugh, or one of our stories for your damn effort. We have Burned forever, and we long the days of Cacophonic playa snark; however - if speed past our camp on a 'lectric bike - we'll yelling at you "SLOW the F*** down...". Dusty hugs and squinty eyed smiles back at yah; "In Dust - We can Trust". Peace, Love & Hugs - the GDI's. (insert tools, smiley, dust and campfire "emojis")

name: Gears & Beers
description:
If your Art Car, Mutant Vehicle or Mobility device needs repairs, welding or diagnosis, we're your on-playa repair camp happy to try and get you safely burning again!

We have a curated inventory of often-needed parts in-stock plus raw materials, specialty tools and field experience, we'll fix your clapped out rig and get you back on playa for everyone to enjoy!

Repair Shop is open during build week, Mon/Wed/Thurs. Hours vary and mechanics may be out on field repairs. Walk-in only. No working during drinking hours.

Our dive bar serves ice-cold microbrews on tap paired with 80's New Wave music, Bar is typically open afternoons and evenings so please come over for repairs, or a beer... Or both!

WE DON'T DO FUCKING BIKES!

name: Gender Blender
description: Welcoming home our trans, non-binary, BIPOC, and gender non-conforming community on Playa!

name: Giants Workshop Saloon
description: We could be anything—including a dusty saloon run by Giants, come by for our nightly Sunset Socials for a variety of offerings of music, food, and drinks! Our saloon doors are open 24 hours, stop by anytime to see if the bar is open or just to rest your weary boots. A variety of workshops will be happening throughout the week, roll on through and see what we're up to!

name: Gigsville
description: Gigsville embodies decades of Burning Man history, mixing a spirit of playful anarchy with a deep commitment to inclusion. Renowned for our legendary fuckery, we create a space where creativity and rebellion flourish. Here, every form of individuality is celebrated, from seasoned burners to wide-eyed newcomers. Our ethos is built on challenging norms and embracing everyone with a penchant for mischief and a heart for community. Expect the unexpected: from mind-bending installations to spontaneous performances, all wrapped in our trademark humor. Gigsville: where history, hijinks, and heartfelt acceptance collide around the Car-B-Q

name: Giraffelot
description: Like Lancealot, Camelot, you know?imagine walking through the dusty roads of Black Rock City and coming across a Renaissance Faire? but giraffes.

name: Giraffè Caffè
description: We blend the invigorating spirit of Burning Man with the universal love for coffee. Each day, we serve up an eclectic mix of fun, innovative coffee creations that awaken the senses and fuel the soul. From espresso-infused adventures to creamy concoctions that defy the ordinary, our camp is a haven for coffee enthusiasts and curious souls alike. Join us for a cup of joy, connection, and creativity as we celebrate the magic of Burning Man one sip at a time.

name: GLAMCOCKS
description: GlamCocks is a global family that was started at Burning Man, and is dedicated to creating extraordinary experiences that celebrate and encourage burner principles, GlamCockery, bringing people together to find inspiration and creativity, and to express their fabulous, authentic selves. We believe that creativity, authenticity, and love for yourself and others are critical to having meaningful connections that make life fulfilling.

name: Global Camp
description:
Global Camp - Founded in 2018 to support the large amounts of new burners coming from abroad, we come together every year from all over the planet and share in joy, laughter, good times, and share common respect and consent at our home on the Playa. 

We have many veterans who come back year after year but also we keep the door open to anyone or possibility - 

If you're a world traveler, internationally minded curious, or want to speak other languages beyond english on playa, then Global Camp may be a good camp fit. 

We do nightly fun dinners, provide ample shade and structure for everyone to have a burn where they don't burnout.

name: Glorious Gilded Alchemy
description: Back for more gloriously gilded shenanigans. IYKYK.

name: GlouGlou Art
description: Glou Glou Art is a camp shaped by the spirit of natural wine. Open day and night, it invites you to discover artists connected to natural wine culture. Come add your touch to a collective artwork, then meet French natural winemakers over generous tastings, moments to share, listen, and learn about natural wine together.

name: GlowMeUp
description: Come as you are and leave more luminous than you arrived. We are a consent-forward glow-up lounge offering UV body painting, a 24/7 costume repair station, and the Grandma's Letters Archive, a living collection of real stories about the fabulous women who came before us. Drop in for a Smut Bath, where our wholesome historians read history's most unhinged erotic literature over a live sound bath. Write a letter to a future friend, inherit some jewelry, and stay as long as you glow.

name: Glowskull Asylum Int'l
description: Glowskull Asylum Int'l brings extreme metal radical inclusion to the playa. Are you craving some good headbanging and want to meet exotic misfits from random places all over the world? Our bar, Skøllushery, and art car "Castle Glowskull" will be hosting mischief, ultra-violence, and twisted METAL (and other deranged forms of terrible music) daily. All varieties of humans welcome!

name: Gnometopia
description:
Stop by any afternoon to partake in some Gnometivities:
Sing some Gnome songs
Hear a Gnome talk
Become a Gnome!
Get a Gnome massage while listening to Gnome harp
Trade Gnome outfits
Complete a Gnome Quest

Join us for Gnome Night on Thursday night as we explore the playa together as a flock of Gnomes.

There's Gnome telling what will happen at Gnometopia!

name: Golden Gate Project
description:
The easiest way to describe our camp is like giving directions to someone who's never been to San Francisco - look for the Golden Gate Bridge.

At Burning Man, our camp is anchored by a 60-foot-long, 26-foot-tall replica of the Golden Gate Bridge, making it one of the most recognizable landmarks on the playa.

name: Good Question
description:
What can you expect from our camp? Good Question!

Stop by our shady oasis to deepen your connection with your friends and loved ones, or meet a new friend entirely in a cozy, intimate atmosphere. You'll leave feeling more connected to others, and having formed a deeper connection with yourself.

Come by in the afternoon when we will be serving tea, Dosas (Indian breakfast like a crepe) and batch tea cocktails, or stop by late at night to warm yourself by the fire. Additionally, we will be hosting 24/7 self-guided deeper connection activities in our cozy frontage. 

There are no wrong answers, only Good Questions!

name: Grateful Burners
description: Grateful Burners - your neighborhood pit stop. We're serving up mid-day iced coffee and providing a high-pressure "Dust-Off" station for weary travelers. Come evening, relax in our shaded plaza for classic concert videos (i.e. Marley, Dead, Talking Heads, Pink Floyd etc.) and chill visuals.

name: Gravity
description: Camp Gravity sets sail to the heart of the sea through art installations, activities, and workshops. We make our space to be fun and engaging as well as an amazing place to dance with top notch music! Visit us!

name: Great Vibrations
description: Welcome to Great Vibrations. Our camp is a sanctuary of movement, relaxation, and high-frequency energy, dedicated to restoring and elevating Burners through the power of vibration. We offer 24/7 zero gravity massage chairs, daytime spa services (12pm-5pm), and a Tuesday morning sunrise dance party you will not want to miss!

name: Gritty Garden
description: Gritty Garden is a diversity driven camp offering a wide variety of workshops. Monday Craft Maker's Day, Heart-to-Heart hug workshop, the Joy of Cunnilingus, and How to Give Good NO. Sunday - Saturday refreshments Bar and ice cream.

name: Groove Oasis
description: Groove Oasis is your refuge in the dusty desert to rest or move your body. We are hosting dance workshops and parties throughout the week so check the playa schedule and come get your groove on!

name: Groundhaus
description: Groundhaus is a community camp featuring BRCGC spinning Industrial, EBM, Cold Wave, Dark Wave, Deathrock, Synthpop, RETRO, New Wave, and more.

name: Guano Loco Lounge
description: We are a sanctuary for those who embrace the mystique of the winged wonders that navigate the darkness. Take a break from the stimulation of BRC with a visit to our Bat Cave, a sensory deprivation experience featuring sound blocking headphones and inversion tables inside a cooling cave environment. "Hang out" in our lounge equipped with surround sound, moody lighting, and espresso martinis for 21+ Burners. We encourage a sense of unity and Radical Inclusion. Sane or Bat Shit Crazy, with wings or without, it doesn't matter to us. All creatures are welcome in our colony.

name: Gypsy Monkey Carnival
description:
Gypsy Monkey Carnival welcomes you!
Come and adopt a mutant monkey, play games, and win prizes. You can ride the biggest cock on the playa. The Gypsy Monkey Carnival lounge is shady during the day and black-lighted at night, and always welcomes the weary traveler to rest and enjoy our ambiance and snark.

name: GYST
description:
WE are your burniest, neighborhood compost collector.
Accepting your DRY, contaminant-free, compost daily from 3pm to 6pm.
Check out our BAR and LOUNGE for drinks and trash talk! 
DJs and theme parties all week!
Axis your Mundi at our DINKO game! 
Dinko Plinko is an exciting game of chance where players drop a disc or ball down a pegged board, with the outcome determined by random bounces.

name: Habitat for Insanity
description: We create novel burner technology and use it to bring new experiences to Black Rock City. This includes shave ice machines invented by camp members, HVAC/refrigeration adaptations for our new installation "The Tundra," and geodesic dome design by one of the Burning Man old school masters.

name: Hack-a-Cola
description: A visit to Hack-a-Cola is a reprieve from the heat empowered by a sampling of a wide variety of unique, handcrafted flavors of soda. Hand us a cup and we'll mix cold carbonated water with one or more of our syrups to make a refreshing soda on the spot. We may even put a scoop of ice cream in your soda to make it a float! We tweak our recipes and invent new flavors throughout the week. Inquisitive visitors can learn how to fulfill their own soda making dreams with the guidance of our knowledgeable, helpful soda jerks. We aim to provide a welcoming space where everyone will feel comfortable to stay a while and enjoy the company under our plentiful shade. You may see our food truck, The Purple People Feeder, in our camp or out and about on the playa.

name: Hair of the Dog (HOTD)
description:
HOTD (Hair Of The Dog) is the longest running bar at Burning Man. We hold a piece of the original fire. HOTD gives raw performances and spontaneous acts and entertainment powered by you! HOTD is a donation bar ran on participation and gifts by burners like you! 
If you bring the booze and the music, then we supply the music and the booze!

name: Hakuna Matata
description:
Building art objects and art cars to light up the Playa Nocturnal Kaleidoscope!
Promoting mindful and safe cruising.
 SLOW DOWN!!!
Leave No Trace

name: Half Baked
description:
Make your Official 2026 Solar Shrink-Art necklaces, earrings, keychains, bike tags & hat swag using our solar ovens. All art supplies and ovens will be provided. You COLOR it. You watch it SHRINK. You WEAR it! Walk away with some cool, commemorative, self-made swag, along with a greater understanding of the wonderful world of solar baking. 

Also, try our Tabletop Tug Challenge. You've always wanted to do it at a wedding. Practice here first. Try your luck at successfully pulling a tablecloth out from under a full table setting.

Do you remember Pat-A-Cake? Come learn (or maybe even teach us) some fun childhood clapping games.

name: Halloween Camp
description: Halloween Camp presents brings out the inner child in all of us BOO-urners, taking us back to the delights of that special day, where anybody can be anyone. Stop by our Diskull Lounge for a moment of respite, dance, and connection!

name: Hammered and Sickled
description: Hammered and Sickled is an international camp compromised of members from 30 plus countries of origins. We run a flavored Vodka bar as well as other libations and our mantra is "No one leaves our bar thirsty or walking in a straight line". We offer the weary desert travelers an oasis where they can take a break, relax and kick their shoes off. Our campers come from different corners of the world, backgrounds and offer a variety of insights and opinions to liven up any conversation. We have our in house DJ's spinning lounge and mashups through out the day.

name: Hang-Out, the
description:
Nestled in the heart of the desert, between Home Brew and the lovely sounds of the Playa Jazz Cafe, you will find the Hangout. This will be your ultimate sanctuary for connection, creativity, and good vibes. We're a vibrant community where artists, explorers, and free spirits come together to relax, share, ignite their inner fire and recharge their depleted bodies in our two dozen shaded hammocks. 

Come as you are and leave with your cup full!

name: HAPPINESS AND JOY TOUR MASSAGE
description: The Happiness and Joy Tour has been all over the world spreading the message, and here at BurningMan the message is MASSAGE! Our name says it all. Come by in the middle of the day - it's too cold at night and too hung over in the morning.

name: Happy Hair Salon
description: Happy Hair Salon is your playa rave braid headquarters. We offer full hair extension makeovers with rave braids, bubble braids, and beard braids. We are a transformational hair salon where we showcase hair extensions as performance art. Come hang out in our antigravity chairs in the shade and watch the transformations. Burnt out? Playafied beyond belief? Come to Happy Hair and we will help you get your groove back with a brand new look.

name: Happy Hanuman
description: Get ready for a wild ride with Happy Hanuman, the grooviest mutant vehicle support camp around! We're a global crew of creative crazies, zooming in from every corner of the planet to unleash our wacky imaginations on the Playa with some seriously epic Mutant Vehicles. But wait, there's more! Our camp is packed with fun goodies for you to explore...like our totally awesome calligraphy wall! Picture this: a giant white canvas where you can splash, scribble, and paint with water that magically vanishes as it dries. Swing by, say "hi," and let's make some Playa magic together!

name: Happy Hour
description: Hard day on the playa? Unwind at Happy Hour, where you'll be greeted by one of a kind refreshing spirits served with smiles! Enjoy our lounge, bar, and dance floor! Start your day with Happy Hour!

name: Happy Seats
description: Decorate your bike! - seat cushions upgrades, handle bar tassels, DIY license plates, and fun time with new friends under a cool canopy

name: Hard as a Rock
description: A rag-tag bunch of geologists with a passion for sharing geology - including the geology of the Black Rock Desert! Join our geologists for rock talks, get creative with rock painting. Dig up your best rock puns and strike fools gold and other rockin' gifts!

name: Harmonic Convergence Camp
description: Come by for our Welcome Pumaccinos on Monday or Farewell Pumaccinos after the Temple Burn. And if you're looking for a good party before the Man Burn, then stop by our College Football Tailgate & Viewing Party. And we will do Group Hands-On Energy Healings on Tuesday and Thursday mornings...we can teach you how to do it.

name: Harmonic Drift
description:
Everything is an instrument. Everyone is a musician.

Harmonic Drift is a mobile sound installation and open jam experience built on one belief: music belongs to everyone. Our hand-pulled trailer carries 35 gongs, found object percussion, and things that don't have names yet. Wherever it lands, it becomes a stage for whoever shows up.

When we're not on the playa or at Center Camp, we're parked out front and open to all. No experience necessary. No wrong notes. At night, the installation glows as a beacon for the curious.

Come make noise with us.

name: HAVANA NIGHTS
description: Experience the essence of a vibrant Latin dance party infused with the relaxed vibe of Miami. Encircled by palm trees, our spacious, shaded dance floor beckons. Relax on our plush, elevated chill pads or sway in hammocks. Savor the night with bottomless, hand-muddled frozen mojitos as world-class DJs deliver an electrifying mix of Cuban and Latin rhythms. Immerse yourself in culture with daily dance lessons and indulge in complimentary cotton candy. Join us on Thursday, from 10 PM to 3 AM, for the iconic 10TH ANNUAL HAVANA NIGHTS, the pinnacle of our week-long dance celebration.

name: HealAF
description: HealAF is your sanctuary for physical and mental recovery on the playa. We offer air cupping sessions to relieve your exhausted muscles. Simply lie down on a comfortable mat and tell us your areas of concern. While the air cups work on your physical tension, our practitioners provide soothing sound healing to wash away your mental fatigue. Stop by to heal from the inside out and get back to your burn completely refreshed.

name: Healing Foot Wash Life Truth Love
description: Life, Truth, Love: Come sit under our cooling shade canopy and get your feet washed, dried and moisturized in a tranquil and calming environment. After you have received this gift, you are invited to participate as well. We are actively building world peace and community.

name: Heart Fusion
description: Heart Fusion invites you to step through its pulsating hearts into an LED-lit bell tent of reflection, mindfulness, and wonder each evening. Join us to share a relaxing beverage, and take a break in the immersive LED tent. Daytime activities throughout the week will provide additional spaces to relax under soothing sounds, stretch and recover your body, and create with your fellow BRC citizens in guided craft activities. Come find your connection with others, relaxation in your own mind, and creation with those around you!

name: Heart of Parkness
description: A lush green oasis in the middle of the desert, open 24 hours a day, anchored by a shade tree, carpet meadow, benches and shade. There are frisbees, chessboards, cornhole, horse shoes, chess, giant connect 4, etc. We provide electronics repair services M-Tuesday and S'mores, Shots and Soul music at sunset, W-Thursday 6-9.

name: HeeBeeGeeBee Healers
description: We are BRC's long-standing oasis for nurturing, grounding and healing. Stop by to hang out and chill, take a class, or to receive a healing session for the mind, body and spirit.

name: Hel's Diner
description: Hel's Diner is a food serving, flame throwing mutant vehicle creation that's part of Camp Porta!

name: Helios Hideout
description: Helios is a symbol of rebirth after hard times. It is a celebration of humanity and an invitation for us all to stand together in the challenging times ahead.

name: Helioz
description: At Helioz, we worship the Sun god. To honor our god, we roast delicious animals and share them with all guests. Come by in the late afternoon and evening for some tasty treats, and drink a sun-god libation.

name: Hello Mom!
description: Celebrate the motherly or fatherly figure in your life, whoever that may be! We provide stationary, stamps, and Polaroid pictures to help you write a letter home, which we then mail from the BRC post office. We serve Mom's apple pie and Dad's fresh watermelon from our cozy living room to snack on while you write. Or, if writing isn't your thing, stop by for a bit of motherly/fatherly advice or even just a shoulder to cry (or celebrate) on. We love parental figures of all types!

name: Hello, Brooklyn
description: Hello Brooklyn is a vibrant and eclectic camp where urban cool meets whimsical creativity. Our Playa neighborhood combines the charm of Brooklyn with the playful flair of a Florida Panhandle trailer park. With radical inclusion, spontaneity, and community spirit, we create a welcoming camp filled with connection, creativity, and endless surprises.

name: Here
description: Here-n-Burn Drive Thru: The playa's best breakfast sandwich and wedding drive thru

name: Hibernaculum
description: Care to get shot in the box? Get dizzy on the Bat Go Round? Savor Bat Bacon? How about a late night movie or licking your lips with Bat Blueberry Pancakes? At the Hibernaculum, serendipity rules! Know what a Hibernaculum is? Come find out.

name: Hiburnia
description: Serving delicious honey, Agave & Clove, infused hot Teas at sunrise and sunset every day. Temple Builders Drink for Free

name: High Maintenance Entertainment
description: Somewhere between cocktail hour and the open Playa, you'll find us - a loose constellation of builders, wanderers, and night owls hailing from the SF Bay Area, Colorado, and Australia. We gave life to Noetica in 2017 and Spark: A Burning Man Story in 2014. Now we keep the Bioluminescent Slug glowing, the drinks flowing, and our doors open to anyone who wants a ride under the stars. High Maintenance? Only in the best way.

name: HIGHKU
description:
Push through our glowing torii gate and drop into a solar-fueled zen oasis humming on pure sun power; no roar of generators, just clean, quiet relief. Mist-kissed shade with rippling silk skies and angled tarps welcomes you to endless icy lemonade, coconut water, and a gentle train that chugs surprise gifts...cooling bandanas, glow bits, playa vitamins; straight to your dusty lap. 

Sink into the vibe with smooth beats, soft programmable LED dreams at night, and spontaneous serotonin sparks through flow, chats, and soul-deep workshops. This is your midday (and midnight) haven to exhale, recharge, laugh, and remember why we come to the dust. 

Come find your glow, we are waiting.

name: Hippocampus
description: Dust off your goggles and follow the scent of sizzle to Hippocampus, where the griddle is hot and the coffee is bottomless! We're serving up fluffy flapjacks and radical connections to fuel your morning art adventures, so bring a plate and leave with a new playa family. Once the sun climbs high, return for Liquid Courage Karaoke to gift your wildest, dust-filtered vocals to the desert sky. Whether you're flipping cakes or belting out anthems, your participation is the magic that makes this camp come alive. Join us in the dust - where the syrup flows as freely as the songs!

name: Hobo Camp
description: Hobo Camp celebrates train-hopping culture and its community and resourcefulness. Our ambience and events include dust-bowl era music, attire, and vignettes. We are LGBTQ+ & allied.

name: Hodge Podge
description:
Hodge Podge - Come chill in our cafe. Come sip on espresso drink! Bring your own milk and we will make you a latte. 

Sporadic horse racing, doodling, and poetry fights.

name: Holy Babel
description: The Art of Such n Such is returning to BRC. This time, we are an art support camp, led by Charlie Blackcat Smith who will be working on a collaborative. fire based art piece that will serve as a memorial for Brian Doherty who met a fast fate in March. Brian literally wrote the book on Burning Man titled "This is Burning Man" in 2004. This will be a small camp centered on erecting and managing the memorial art piece and keeping it safe and running during the event. In previous years, this camp has also been known as A.S.S. Camp. Come and find a bunch of crusty Burners here.

name: Homebrew 4A Homebrew
description: We are a daytime bar with cold home brewed beverages, games and a friendly welcoming atmosphere. Enjoy a cold beer (incl. non-alcoholic), cider, mead, soda, and gluten free served daily from 10am until after dark. We have a pool table and daily events including our Playa famous pickle party! Bring your keg and we will refrigerate and tap it, or bring a bottle to share. We have daily pop up events that happen based on the hosts spontaneity. We are adding table games into the mix this year.

name: Homeslice
description: Drop in for a cheerful "Slice of Home" - Playa-style. Participate in our Experimental Grilled Cheese Theatre, climb the sky-high HomeSlice Tower's inverted pyramids, or re-engineer your Playa duds and gear at our Radical Alteration clinics.

name: Honey Pot Tea House
description:
Come sit by our fire, enjoy a cup of tea, and enjoy a side of Burning Man that is connective, whimsical, and grounding. 
Sunset-sunrise tea service. Cozy fire pit. Open mic. Daily workshops.

name: Honey Puddle
description:
Honey Puddle gives you that warm, sweet, exhilarating feeling of being enveloped by love and friendship. And music and mead and
dancing and light. We're not a quiet camp, we're not a not-quiet camp. We're just right...and we'll be here when you want us. We fit like
warm pajamas.

name: Honkers Harbor
description:
Calling all curious birds, early risers, and soulful squawkers.
If you've been flying solo or searching for your flock, Honkers Harbor might be your next cozy nest.

We're a neighborhood sanctuary for honkers, wanderers, and high-flyers - rooted in connection, ease, and a little morning magic.

Perch beneath fluttering fabrics. Start your day with a warm breakfast or a hydrating refreshment. Settle into a soundscape that drifts between mellow, mindful, and playful.

Come as you are - sleepy, sparkly, or somewhere in between. Stay for connection, conversation, and a place to land before the day takes flight.

We invite you to gather, nourish, and share a little magic - one honk at a time.

name: Hookahdome
description: Enter our silk draped, plush, cushioned, lantern-lit, air-conditioned dome to be whisked away into an oasis from the dust and heat. Let our loving attendants ensure your comfort while we serve you house made organic shisha and tea. Be entertained by a variety of intimate world music and dance performances taking place on the center carpet. Wednesday-Sunday evenings, our outdoor courtyard, illuminated by a ring of torches ignites the dancing flame within us all as world class DJ's, musicians, and performers entertain into the night. Come spin fire or drum at the Fire Flow Jam and Drum Circle, dance the night away to one of our outdoor music and dance performances, and wax philosophical, regale your fellows with your tales, and make friends and lovers for a lifetime inside the Hookahdome!

name: Hookers & Peggers Naughty Cafe
description: Come for the coffee and stay for the fun! Test your skill on our 10' Hooker & Pegger game, or launch a dildo to drench your buddy in our dunk tank! Don't forget to take a complimentary porno mag while you're at it.

name: Hooter Tooterville
description: Hooter Tooterville is a small art support camp dedicated to bringing fun and original art to the Playa.  This year's art installation is called "Teeny Weeny Hooter Tooter", a fun set of 4 teeters powering two walls of musical pipes and fun things to look at.

name: HORIZON
description: Horizon was originally Inspired by the unobstructed view of the open playa - a space beyond the city's limits, where the sun meets the mountains over the vast and empty desert - we gather to create a community built around ideals of curiosity, art, and celebration. Over the years Horizon has moved from the outer rim to plazas and to front lines of Esplanade. No matter where we are on playa we are always thrilled to call it our home. Come dance with us in our lounge and grab a refreshing beverage at our carnival bar or enjoy one of our many workshops through out the week! We can't wait to see all your lovely smiles on playa again this year at Horizon!!

name: Horny Camp
description: Horny Camp is an arts & crafts camp with a cheeky, sexy twist. Our crafts can be appropriate for everybody, from children to the childish (but pervy) at heart. Our main craft is horn making; we teach our guests to mold polymer clay to create little horns to wear on their heads. We also offer bar night events, and have an art gallery called the Gallery of Cocks that honors all things chicken, as well as other art. Visit the camp at hornycamp.com for activities list and photos of prior year's activities.

name: Hot Noodz
description: Stop by for diy noodles, possibly leather branding and ink stamping.

name: HOT SHOTS
description:
Our camp is a tiny haven for those looking to immerse themselves in the beauty of the desert, fostering moments of connection and self-discovery via our golden hour photo shoots and late night treats. 
Join us at HOT SHOTS, where each sunset marks not just the end of a day, but the beginning of an unforgettable experience.

name: Hot Stuff
description: Drinks served from dawn onward for the thirsty traveler crossing the desert sands. All manner of chilli hot and ice cool refreshments will be on offer accompanied by music from storied DJs from across the savage sands.

name: Hotel Lobby
description: With a lavish chandelier, bellhop service, concierge desk, a lux hotel bar, and a buzzing karaoke lounge, you'll be treated to 5-star service and a dusty bev in a welcoming and weird Hotel Lobby.

name: Hotline Camp
description: Hotline invites burners to share secrets, advice, jokes, or late-night thoughts with the city. Pick up a receiver and you might hear a confession, a story, epic hold music, a stranger on the other end, or good old snark.Throughout the week we host themed daytime parties with DJs, music, and a welcoming space to gather under the shade. Stop by to get advice, leave a message, dance for a bit, or see who's on the other line.

name: House of Sammich
description: We serve gourmet, gluten-free, cinnamon-buttered toasted, peanut-butter and jelly sammiches. All that we ask is for you to provide us with a taste of YOUR flavor. Sing us a song..., tell us a joke..., confess a sin.., the dirtier the better. We also provide a moving cuddle puddle which is all about conscious conversations: opening up, connecting, and sharing what's going on inside oneself.

name: House Of Skin
description: Welcome to "House of Skin." Come get your daily rub down of sunscreen or grab some sunscreen and ChapStick to go on your next adventure. We are a safe space for all and also have many fun things to distract you from your original mission. Come sleep on our trampoline, hang out the fire, participate in our tether ball tournament, get your BRC passport stamp, pick something out from our free store, and enjoy something to drink from our alcohol free bar. I would to tell you more, but I am not going to. Come f*ck around and find out

name: HOVerlandia
description: Designated camping for riders of the Burner Express. All riders are welcomed to camp across the street from the bus depot in HOVerlandia. Share your love for mass transit with Burners from all over the world.

name: Hug cabana camp
description: Hug cabana support camp

name: Hungry Games
description: Step right up and spin our interactive game wheel for a chance to win a hot slice of fresh pizza. You might face off in a quick round of rock paper scissors or score an automatic win to satisfy your hunger. Our entire crew works together to hype up the crowd and keep the ovens firing for these spontaneous street parties. When the games take a break we invite you to sit down and relax at our scheduled foot spa. We will gently wash the playa dust from your toes so you can recharge and get back out to the burn.

name: Hush Hush Pony Barn
description: Hush Hush Pony Barn is exciting to bring two offerings to playa: Our beloved Mutant Vehicle made out of reclaimed fence board and our interactivity Gossip & Guillotines. They say you'll lose your head at Burning Man! Come see what the rumor mill and the gallery are all chatting about.

name: Hushville
description: A welcoming camp with no amplified music or generators. First time burners greeted with joy and mentored with care. We welcome campers from across the world and beyond. We've had people from every continent camp with us in the past. Many activities all week long.

name: Huǒ Fèng MV Support Camp
description:
Hu— Fèng rises as a living embodiment of the phoenix spirit. In Chinese symbolism, the phoenix represents the empress - feminine authority, grace, and sovereign power - while fire embodies transformation and rebirth. Together, Hu— Fèng becomes a vessel for renewal in motion.

With sculptural wings reaching skyward and a body glowing like flame, it captures the threshold where destruction gives way to creation. Both delicate and powerful, it moves between elegance and intensity.

More than a mutant vehicle, Hu— Fèng is an invocation - a call to rise, shed, and remember the strength within softness. It invites participants into transformation, to embody their sovereignty and emerge luminous, expansive, and new.

name: Hydration Station
hometown: Salt Lake City, Reno, New York
description: Come and get energized ! Jägermeister Bombs (And tequila and vodka ) daily from 2-4pm Sunday - Friday!! Water and Gatorade and shade available during the heat of the day!!

name: HYPERSPACE
description: We are a small LGBTQ camp that loves volunteering our time with different Burning Man departments. We were previously known for UFO lounger pods and blacklight minigolf.

name: I Love Elephants
description: I Love Elephants Camp is a gathering space celebrating art, animals, and connection. Our open Living Commons invites participants to explore interactive installations devoted to the creatures people love, from elephants to wolves, bees, ravens, and more. At the heart of the camp is the Gaia Dome, inspired by the spirit of Ram Dass, featuring visionary art, conversations, tea gatherings, and immersive projection experiences. Throughout the week visitors can join workshops, paint wooden elephant keepsakes, cool off in our misting oasis, and gather for music, storytelling, and art under the desert sky. Everyone is welcome to participate.

name: I Taste Purple
description:
Step into a world where a psychedelic dream meets a desert carnival. Look for our kaleidoscope of purples and our signature lips and tongue logo?we're a vibrant, welcoming oasis on the playa.

At our camp, creativity knows no bounds. Join us for crafting, contests, parties, our one-of-a-kind "triathlon," advice of all kinds, and other surprises we dream up each year. Whether you stop by for an activity or just to relax and connect, you'll find a community that feels like home.

Don't miss our Punk night! Lose yourself in a night of music, mischief, and mayhem under the stars.

Come share stories, make memories, and, of course, indulge in our signature purple tastings. You never know what magic awaits!

name: iBurn/Burning Man Earth
description: Gifted download of the iBurn App! Your best resource to navigate the activities, theme camps, art installations, and scheduled events on the playa -- all without wifi -- it's GPS enabled! Download the 2026 version of the gifted (free) iBurn app pre-event, or swing by our camp to download. It's like having an elf read you the What/Where/When in a dust storm! 42,000 Burners used iBurn last year -- make sure you are one of them.

name: Icarus Camp
description:
Icarus Camp
A collection of humans from across the globe, who were brought together show all, LOVE.

name: ICU:  Impromptu Crafters Union
description: Suffering from crafter withdrawal? Visit the ICU for a daily dose of creativity in the shade, cuz making Art cures what ails ya! Craft offerings change daily.

name: IcyHands Chillzone
description:
We seek out the weary, the overheated and the disconnected to offer our signature Icy Hands experience. The instantaneous sense of relief, joy and connection turns recipients into PARTICIPANTS and makes them part of a larger whole. Icy Hands epitomizes "the gift that keeps on giving" by coaching recipients through providing the experience to others. Hands are cooled to near freezing temperatures by means of a simple block of ice, then with full positive consent of the recipient, those hands are placed upon the neck and jaw, providing an immediate sense of cool, calm and connection. 

Block of Ice: $7. Memories, endorphins, friendship and dopamine rush: PRICELESS.

name: IGNITED STATES
description:
Ignited States is all about our states of mind, our states of being, our states of consciousness. It's about lighting up our worlds. It's about igniting and fanning the flames of our creativity. And sometimes, it's about igniting the fire in our bellies with a shot of fireball.

- Ignite your artful state by making a flag to illustrate the state you're in 
- Ignite your wakeful state with beverages and bad advice
- Fireball Friday Happy Hour ignites your ready-to-party state
- Ignited your playful state with our ring toss game, Heads of State

name: IHOTT: After Dark
description: IHOTT (Intergalactic House of Time Travelers) is back with a twist! This year we welcome IHOTT: After Dark, an elevated, bespoke cocktail and ramen based night time version of your old favorite time travelling camp! Grab a cocktail in our glassware from our bartender, or sit down for the best meal you'll have all week!

name: Illumination Village
description:
Illumination Village is an eclectic gathering of camps, held together by history and shared resources. You will find within the village, much like the microcosm of Burning Man, art and interactivity everywhere. 
Step into a glowing neighborhood where fire, light, music, and human connection collide. By day, find coffee, tea, a public steam bath, workshops, and welcoming spaces to rest, learn, and meet new friends. By night, the frontage ignites into a walk-through Fire Carnival of flame sculptures, interactive art, DJs, and spectacle that runs deep into the night. Dozens of LED installations keep the Village alive until sunrise, making it a beacon visible from across the playa. Come wander, participate, and see what happens when hundreds of creators build one shared world together.

name: Illuminaughty
description: Look up and follow the LED Ball to Camp Illuminaughty where naughty meets light. Join us on Tuesday and Thursday from 9pm until 2am! DJs will help save your life in front of our brilliant 18' Penrose Tile Wall. Drop by any other time for pictures with the art, perfect shade and drinks from the always going bar!

name: ImagiMorphia
description: Welcome to Camp Imorgimorphia, a space where creativity and transformation converge. Inspired by the concept of "morphing," we invite you to explore and express your evolving self through art, interactive experiences, and collaboration. Join us for immersive installations, transformative rituals, and workshops focused on personal growth and creative expression. Whether you're seeking self-discovery or community connection, Imorgimorphia is a space to shed the old and embrace the new. Come evolve with us on the Playa!

name: Imagine Nation Art Lounge
description: Remember how you felt when you were drawing on kitchen tables and living room floors? Tap back into a state of mind that embodied the purist creative version of yourself! We encourage our guests to tap into their childhood imagination again through the medium of art, especially drawing and colouring.

name: Impromptu Tomato
description: Your neighborhood coffeeshop serving The Playa's Most Adequate Coffee every morning. Bring your cup. Milks, sugars, light snacks, shade, and good conversation provided. Find us by the giant tomato - our gently cooled and ventilated chill space.

name: IN DUST WE TRUST
description: A lovely camp, which has been giving away lingerie and pasties in exchange for a good life story for over 10 years now, serving snow cones in the afternoon sun and filled with people from all over the world, whose paths to our camp are always somehow unique and worth a story.

name: Inappropirates
description:
Come for piping hot pour over coffee! Meet interesting people! Challenge the Strip Plank! A harrowing game of skill and poise, walk the plank, grab the cock all while the crowd heckles you with supportive guff (and sass!). Each time you fail, you can try again, but the price is an article of clothing! Winners get to skip the coffee line, losers lose more than their shirt... 9am to Noon, Monday through Saturday.

Watch our events chalkboard for Capers' Erotic Fiction Reading and Improv Competition! There may be puppets.

Also, our coffee bar will be periodically taken over by the mutinous Priva-tea-ers for piping cold ice tea! Join and walk the plank (with your pinkie out)! Times TBD!

name: Indigo's Speakeasy
description: Serving the finest of fermented bog water since 2010. Come sit and enjoy a dram. Tell us about your latest encounter. We love to listen to a good story.

name: InfiniTea
description: If fate finds you at our sparkling Tea Spot floating upon the vast desert ocean, come and take a sip of InfiniTea!

name: Inflatable Wildlife
description: Inflatable Wildlife is the premiere destination for all indigenous inflatables of the playa. With a menagerie of inflatable wildlife, steady stream of danceable beats and wild and wondrous interaction helping to magnify the natural syncopated basslines which undulate through us all, we will be serving Daily Spirits Tastings, Inflatable Goat Yoga, Playa Jewelry Making, our signature, 6th annual Sunrise Pre-Game Party and more.

name: ING
description: ING is a participatory camp with daily gatherings, a tea tent, interactive art, a tower for sunrise and sunset hangs, and our long-running Thursday My Tie, Mai Tai, Funk and Bass party. We serve cocktails for those 21+, zero proof drinks, and a steady mix of conversation, shade, and shenanigans all week. By night, our tower beacon helps guide dusty wanderers home. No sherpas. No spectatING. Stop by and jump in.

name: Insomnophilia
description: The Temple of Insomnotter has returned to the playa. Come pay homage to Pachi, the river otter who walks between worlds ? water and land, waking and dream, earthly and celestial. Witness the sacred arc of birth, ministry, death, and resurrection across the week. Whether you arrive by chance or by calling, you are expected. Come drink from the flowing river of Pachi.

name: Interaction Café
description: We create a space where servers get to create their ideal burning man experience by choosing interactions offered to guests who come by, and guests choose whichever of their offerings tickles their fancy. The result is consensual weird and wonderful experiences, and it's hard to leave our camp, because you never know what might happen next: one moment it's sweet and moving, and the next it's rowdy and hysterical. During self-service hours, guests use menus to engage in interactions between themselves.

name: Interzone
description: Transport yourself to another time and place as you enter Tangier's International Zone. Grab a book from our Lost Times Library and hang out in our lounge area, open 24/7. Library Loud Hours daily from 3pm-6pm with iced Moroccan mint tea and craft beer on tap!

name: Iron Monkeys
description: Home to the Iron Monkeys

name: Irrelephant Bird Camp
description: Colorful eyebrows? CHECK! Dunking Contest? CHECK! Bad Movies? CHECK! Yacht rock? Jock rock? Not rock? Check, check, and check! Trying to get a handle on what we do here at Irrelephant Bird Camp? Don't even try it. Just come by and get a little silly with us, touch base with reality, or take a nap on the beach.

name: Isla Holbox
description: Bringing island vibes to the playa- Cooldown with shaved iced, Ritual fresco facemasks, and brisa fans.

name: It's Only Natural
description: Our camp offers a safe and inclusive environment for individuals wishing to participate in naturism. The space is fully enclosed, shielding participants from cell phones, cameras, and onlookers in the city. Inside, you will find a communal gathering area, with games, music, and a daily cocktail hour. We provide a friendly, non-sexualized setting for anyone wishing to experience nude recreation.

name: Jail of Hedone
description: A lush red lounge and stage devoted to Hedone, the Goddess of Sensual Pleasure. Guests are "charged" with ridiculous crimes, tried in a theatrical court, and sentenced to spin our giant Wheel of Fate for playful, consensual "punishments". Expect the finest DJs, engaging theatrical performances, a misted dance floor, along with a stripper pole, a comfy sea of couches and pillows, and a bar serving ice water, refreshing cocktails, and horseradish?infused vodka, 4?7 pm daily.

name: Janky Barge
description: Janky Barge is an art car and all the people who made it. We cruise around the desert and have fun and play music we like. You should get on! We'll give you a ride to wherever we were already going.

name: Jelly Dance
description: DANCE in our lighted "Psychedelic JELLY-fish Forest" which responds to your touch and enjoy live music from the house band or DJ sets late afternoon/evenings. Join us for band "jam-a-longs", midnight acoustic "Jelly Jams" in the Jelly Forest , "Dust Street Hockey", or very small cocktails at our "Mini-Bar".

name: Jitters & Bitters
description: We will be serving cold brew with milk and dairy alternatives and ice! Hangout space in the shade with chairs provided to get out of the sun and get jittery. Service is in the morning and we will have 1 midnight brew session to help stay up until the sunrise!

name: Joey Glowey Bar
description: Work Access Camp

name: Johnny Tacomas at The Last Resort
description:
Here at The Last Resort motel we pride ourselves on our 5 star attitude and 1 star accommodations. 

Busted shoe? Empty stomach? Flat tires? Tired hoofs? Take a load off! 
We might possibly have what you need. Please take a number, have a seat, and someone will be with you shortly.

You can grab a bite at our playa renowned flagship diner, Johnny Tacomas. The menu changes hourly to offer a unique and unpredictable dining experience. 

When we're not at the desk, you can catch us cruising on Inky, Clyde, or Pacman, floating through the night like ghosts in hot pursuit. If you see us glowing in the distance, chase us down and hop on before we vanish into the maze of the Playa!

name: Joie de Vivre
description:
At Joie de Vivre, we're all about bringing the joy — even when the dust is thick and the tacos are hotter than the weather. 

Swing by in the morning for a rotating mix of movement, writing, or a card reading. Stick around for Taco Tuesday (yes, it's real), and spin the Wheel of Feels — our 24/7 interactive art piece — for a little unexpected magic.

name: Joyism
description: n/A

name: Joyism MVSC
description: The home of the Joyism artcar, the temple for the Joyism religion, the religion of the 30th century!

name: Juicy Rootz
description:
Welcome to Juicy Rootz, where the fruit is juicy, the vibes are juicier. Swing by and meet us, the delightfully playful, slightly unhinged, and always heart-centered Juicies! We're serving up two workshops/parties where you can get your hands sticky making wearable art out of dried, resin-soaked citrus. That's right—your new accessory is made of fruit. 
Come for the fruit, stay for the unfiltered joy, the spontaneous dance-offs, and when you're dehydrated from all that wiggling, we've got you covered with non-alcoholic electrolyte drinks at our "Juice Bar".

name: Jungle Oddity
description: A jungle oasis lost in time and space. Stop by to experience our lush soundscapes with musical performances and engaging daily workshops.

name: Just Dandy
description: Support camp for Dandy mutant vehicle.

name: KAIF
description: Step into the cool ambiance of our cozy KAIF Lounge, a haven where relaxation, creativity, and connection come to life. Unwind with a refreshing expertly crafted cocktails. Immerse yourself in spiritual practices, or sip and dance your way into bliss. Whether you seek movement, mindfulness, or just a moment to savor, KAIF Lounge is your escape on the Playa.

name: Kaleidoscope
description:
Step into a world of color and indulge your caffeine addictions at Kaleidoscope, where we bring people together over exquisite single origin coffee sourced and roasted by our campmates, prepared and brewed in front of you at our bar, one cup at a time. Our vibrant, welcoming space adorned with low tables, cushions, and ambient music, invites you to slow down, savor the moment, and encourages you to engage in meaningful conversations with your fellow Burners.

Finally, don't miss the opportunity to climb our iconic 26 ft crow's nest lookout tower. This unique structure offers a high vantage point to take in the sights and sounds of Black Rock City.

name: Kamp Kaos
description: Celebrating all that is chaotic! KAOS campers hail from across the US. We celebrate curious minds, artists, engineers, makers, and anyone with an open mind. We bring something new every year!

name: Kamp Kit
description: We specialize only in infused liquor shots, infusing all the flavors ourselves. Some are delicious. Some are too hot to handle. Some are pretty gross. No mixers, no chasers! If you're not drinking, or done drinking, you can contribute to the Playa Name Archive or participate in our open mic.

name: Karma Love Camp
description: A welcoming oasis designed for connection, relaxation, and playful interaction. We offer body art, unique experiences, dance, gifting, and a friendly space to simply be. Our camp is a chill rest stop where you can relax, recharge, and connect with new friends. Whether you're looking to join a fun event or just hang out and chat, Karma Love Camp is here to share joy and genuine community with everyone.

name: KashyyyK
description: Your favorite wookiees are back! Swing by the legendary Wookiee Bodega, open daily from 12?5PM. Modeled after a classic NYC corner store, it's stocked with playa essentials (sunscreen, tampons, reusable water bottles) and completely unnecessary treasures (bedazzled jewelry, candy bars, knick-knacks galore). This year we've expanded the magic with Wardrobi, our free-playa costume closet where you can dress to express. Come for the goods, stay for the pop-up surprises, and return at night to gather 'round our public fire pit?a cozy, low-key hang spot for stories, laughs, and maybe a snack if you catch us at the right time.

name: Kaya
description: Home of the Fire Breathing Dragon Art Car, Gon KiRin. Stop by our camp to enjoy music, meet our camp members from around the globe and experience an authentic tea ceremony by tea masters from China. We are a diverse group of burners brought together by our love for art, music and cultural exchange. Feel free to ask questions about our mutant vehicle and maybe catch a ride with us out to playa!

name: Kentucky Fried Camp
description: Kentucky Fried Campers only need one spice, and that's the spice of life. If you wanna taste it, join us any time of day or night. We begin each morning with the best hot breakfast on playa; a shot of Kentucky bourbon served with a fried baloney sandwich. Afternoons you'll find us relaxing in our Olde Kentucky Dome, crafting, napping, match-making, and lots of watching the Black Rock City whirled go by. Evenings are for dancing, officiating wedding ceremonies and sending folx off on their psychogeography honeymoons. Look for the KFC sign high in the sky and then spot our gingham-wrapped dome. Kentucky Fried Camp; In baloney, united we stand!

name: Khaleeya
description: Come immerse yourself in a world of Moroccan bliss at Khaleeya —where the hive thrives in harmony.

name: Kidsville
hometown: Kidsville honestly does not have a home town.  We started on playa with families from all over.  We are truly from everywhere, however if we have to pick a hometown: Our Mayor is from Austin, TX.
description: Kidsville is a playful family village where young Burners and their grownups can find adventure, community, and a touch of magic on playa. With trampolines, playgrounds, kid friendly treats, daily activities, and plenty of opportunities for fun, Kidsville is a welcoming home for families with Burners under 18.

name: Kinky Pizza
description: Hot slices, Hot flogging, and Hot fire. It's only kinky the first time...

name: Kinsey Walhberg Field Lab
description: Welcome to the Kinsey Walhberg Field Lab. This groundbreaking camp, developed by the esteemed Lindsey Kinsey and Remy Walhberg, stands at the vanguard of art analysis, offering training for those interested in their unique and comprehensive framework that transcends conventional critique methodologies. Enter KWASI-3. KWASI-3 is not just an assessment tool; it is a revolution in understanding art. Our instrument delves deep into the realms of artistic creation, exploring various dimensions such as Dimensional Topology, Activation Shape, and Materiality. This multidisciplinary approach allows for a holistic understanding of art, enabling critics, artists, and enthusiasts to engage with artworks on a deeper, more meaningful level.

name: Knot Sure
description: Come to Knot Sure and play our spinning wheel game hang out or get a decorative rope top.

name: Knotty Peckers
description: Come get knotty at our woodland scout-themed camp blending playful nostalgia with sexy human connection and participation. Enjoy the welcoming forest outpost where Burners can gather, learn, laugh, and earn bespoke scout-style badges by participating in camp activities like: S'mores, Axe-Throwing, Paddle Play, Dirty Girl Scout drinks, and more.

name: Kombuchachacha
description: Kombucha: (n) kom-BOO-cha. Renowned playa aphrodisiac. You may not get the booch you want but you will definitely get the booch you need. Cha Cha: (n) Intricate Latin American dance. The home of con+sent. Come meet our chicken(s). Relax, refresh and cha cha the day away. 4 stars on yelp 2025.

name: KonaZona Coffee & Tiki Bar
description: KonaZona  Tiki Bar, Serving Liquid Hugs for your brain in a Tropical  setting.  Coffee in the morning, Mai Tai's in the Afternoon.  Chill in our Tropical Hammocks  and relax with the soothing Hawaii sounds and cooling surroundings

name: Kosmik Dust
description: Please stop by and play Fire Skee Ball! with your friends and campmates! Check out our other technological interactivities such as our High Striker and Theramyd. Take a spin on our Tipsey Totter and Merry-Go-Round!

name: Kuker Camp
description:
BULGARIAN KUKER Mutant Vehicle is based on the Kukeri Ritual Dancers - a millenia old tradition from Bulgaria, Eastern Europe. Kukeri are people wearing elaborate self-made fur costumes and hideous animalistic masks. Every year in the end of winter/the beginning of spring Kukeri dance to scare away evil spirits and bring joy, happiness and prosperity for the whole village throughout the year. 
In addition to just having the festive and carnival-like appearance, we have infused our ancient MUTANT PET with a modern soul - mixing ancient bagpipe melodies and live drum beats with various electronic music styles.

name: Kumaya
description: Cozy up in our 24/7 library lounge filled with pillows, blankets, books and art. Write, doodle, or read the journals lying all around, filled with the stories of visitors from past burns. Eat a pancake at our morning disco party. Pilgrimage with us to deep playa at sunrise for tea and tunes. Get some deep rest in our meditative sound bath or simply lounge and connect with fellow travelers < 3

name: Kurenivka
description: Kurenivka is a Ukrainian camp built around art, hospitality, and a touch of beautiful absurdity. Home to the vibrant Blue Bull art car, we bring together Ukrainian cultural energy, welcoming vibes, tea, music, and interactive moments for passersby and participants alike. We aim to create a camp that feels alive, open, and memorable — a place where people can pause, connect, and experience something both playful and meaningful.

name: Kwalq Camp
description: The Kwalq Camp mission is to help young polywogs achieve the best version of themselves by learning how to breath. Ready for the next level? Please stop by and we'll help you achieve your best froggie self.

name: La Calaca Village
description: La Calaca Village offers a theme camp, art car and artist support on playa. We pride ourselves on being makers, teachers and healers . Come for the healing, stay for the hedonism! Spiritual healers, yogis and massage artists await you in our Healing Plaza. Wanna help build and work on a big art car? Visit the "Imagination Station Piazza" featuring different activities and gatherings daily!

name: LAF Lazy-Ass Fuckers
description: Come walk through the history of Playa SWAG at The Playa Artifact Museum! We provide a look into past pins, posters, tickets and more, highlighting decades of creativity at the Burn. We host workshops with new artists and friends from years past. All are welcome!

name: Lakes on the Playa Village
description: The only lake on the playa, come swim

name: Lamplighters
description: Lamplighters! Longest running performance art on Playa. Come help us help YOU! Lamplighters light the city every night of the event so YOU can get home safely. We throw a volunteer party everyday at 5pm, and light the city after that.

name: Lands Beyond
description:
Lands Beyond is a haven for strivers and adventurers always seeking the unknown. We invite you to step beyond your comfort zone and explore new experiences with us. A globally minded camp with Mexican flair, we welcome Burners into our cosmic neon-lit domes for tasty micheladas, delicious mezcalitas and refreshing aguas frescas.
Our programming includes ecstatic dance, breathwork, dynamic meditation, and cacao ceremonies, offering moments for both celebration and reflection. If you feel like slowing down, wander into our Cosmic Souk, where you can relax on comfortable cushions while sampling unusual treats and concoctions from across the galaxy.
Come for the fluorescent cosmic crèpes and refreshing micheladas?stay for our black-light international Day of the Dead party!

name: Last Camp Sitting
description: Is it a porto, is a portal? Only those who look closely will know!

name: Latica
description: We are a very diverse camp that will exemplify radical inclusion. This camp will be mostly populated by latinX individuals from Venezuela, Mexico and various hispanic upbringings along with some strong allies.

name: LEGENDARY Playground of the Gods
description: The Legendary Playground of the Gods is a place for learning, authentic connection, and celebrating life. This is a place to remember that we are all Divine, Infinite & Immortal beings simply wearing the disguise of being human. Come and find an oasis from the desert, find rest in the shade, get frozen treats and feast on a week of inspired offerings in workshops, classes, music, and entertainment designed to feed your soul. Welcome Home.

name: Legends of the Hidden Playa
