description: We run an obstacle course/escape room that is loosely based off an old 90's game show and its recent reboot. With 13 separate rooms, each with their own puzzle, we will truly test your Burning Man preparedness! We have daily timed trials to earn a spot on our leader board and see if you can solve the Shrine of the Silver Monkey-Man!

name: Leopard Martini Lounge
description: The LEOPARD MARTINI LOUNGE has been returning since 1998 serving top shelf cocktails in a chill area with wonderful people. The LML BIKE REPAIR SHOP will return this year to support our community. BETTY'S PIE SHOP will continue to serve fresh pie daily in a no rush atmosphere. CLEO the mutant vehicle with continue to roam the playa.

name: Lightning Bug Lounge
description: A family-friendly camp supporting Spark the Firefly as she flickers across the playa, glowing with the warmth and nostalgia of evenings spent chasing lightning bugs.

name: Lily Pad Lounge
description: Home of LilyPod support camp. Have support for other small art cars, particularly those based off golfcarts. Also salve and frog-related things.

name: Liquid Spankuary
description: Dusty, parched, and feeling a little too well-behaved? Come get refreshed and red-cheeked at Liquid Spankuary! We're serving up ice-cold, Agua Fresca to cool your core and handmade butt spanks to fire up your afternoon. Choose your flavor and your intensity (from a "love tap" to "full playa-dust cloud"). Our certified Spank-baristas ensure every impact is consensual, respectful, and perfectly timed with your first sip. Come for the hydration, stay for the vibration!

name: Lit AF
description: Stumbling around the playa in the dark like a total darkwad? Come get Lit AF! We'll help you add fairy lights to your bike, backpack, or outfit. Stop by for a workshop, spare batteries (AA or CR2032), or to donate extra lights or batteries to the cause. And if you need lights while you're out and about, our Darkwad Patrol may just find you and save your poor darkwad soul.

name: Lituanica Birds
description:
We are Lituanica Birds Camp, a community that travels across the ocean to Black Rock City, bringing with us a cascade of ideas, energy, and love. Inspired by the freedom and grace of birds, our camp is a home to the endless journey of exploration. At our core, we believe in the beauty of connection with nature, others, and with oneself. Our camp offers welcoming spaces where every visitor is invited to embark on a personal voyage of discovery. Through a variety of activities and experiences, we encourage everyone to celebrate the natural world, self and each other. 
Stop by Lituanica Birds Camp to find a community where warmth meets wonder. Here you'll find a sanctuary for reflection, connection, and the shared joy of exploration.

name: Live Laugh Love Lounge
description: Step into the most relatable sanctuary in Black Rock City. We are a high-irony, low-stress retreat celebrating the simple comforts of suburban life with a massive gallery of reclaimed domestic art. Visitors can enjoy a nostalgic backyard experience featuring classic lawn games like cornhole and ladder toss. Come for the snacks, stay for the board games, and find your inner peace at our signature wall of wisdom. It is the perfect place to take a break from the extra and embrace the basic.

name: LIZARD
description: Our camp welcomes you to enjoy Oriental food at any time, and we also provide iced water and drinks.

name: Loadie Camp
description: The home of the iconic Shark Car. Loadie Camp is a hive of Mutant Vehicle visionaries and builders, contributing over 10 different Mutant Vehicles of varying sizes. Come meet the builders and learn more about the Mutant Vehicle process.

name: LOBE
description:
Hypothesis: Scientifically rigorous yet playful participation enhances your burn.

Intro: LOBE invites you to experiment with our placebo bar, sci-art and brain-inspired activities.

Specific Aims:

Aim 1) Are you drunk!? Our speakeasy The Double-Blind Pig serves placebo-controlled refreshments. While you sip, ask the local (inebriated?) scientists all your burning questions (results may vary)

Aim 2) Can we tickle your brain!? Play with our interactive neurotech, mind-stretching games, and discover the neuroscience of your favorite drugs!

Aim 3) Ready to blow your mind!? We're not just nerds, we're artists too! Study our scientifically inspired pieces co-created by neuroscientists and friends.

name: Lollypopolus
description: Lollypopoluis is a theme camp based in Portland Oregon with campers from Portland, Boise, Montreal, CA and Tokyo Japan. We are focused on Self Care and provide the Self Care Pharmacy for those items you may have forgotten or didn't know you'd need. Join us in the Circus tent for music, food, beverages and connection!

name: Long Feng Camp
description:
Long Feng Sound Camp is a living, breathing immersive soundscape where East meets West in rhythm, ritual, and release.

By day, it hums with connection. By night, it ignites. A precision-tuned sound stage draws you into a field of movement and awe, while the Xiao Long Night Market unfolds nearby - a Chinatown dream woven with delights to tickle the senses including games, tea, and unexpected moments of play.

This is a place to arrive, to lose yourself, to find each other. Follow the sound and join where East meets West.

name: Lookout! The Camp
description: Absurdity disguised as a fire extinguisher. The art support camp for "Lookout!"

name: Lost + Found
description: We are a diverse community, a California-based collective of dreamers, artists, adventurers, and creative doers, that loves throwing fun off-the-wall parties as much as we love connecting on deeper levels. We love to just be, we love to play, curate unique experiences, and faff about - whether it's flow, dance, music, magic, bubbles, movement, fire, food, drinks, art, live jams, deep talks, tiny things or a whole lot of silly nonsensical shenanigans. L+F is a diverse group of eclectic individuals that operates with love, respect and the 10 Principles of Burning Man. We create fun vibes and third spaces together as we inspire others to flow, love, and be their free and fearless selves. We have a habit of receiving lost and found items, including people. ;) Come play and get lost with us!

name: Lost and Sound
description: A cozy neighborhood space, welcoming everyone to immerse themselves in the spirit of discovery and togetherness. Engage with our interactive art installations that narrate the tales of artifacts from forgotten times. Every corner holds a secret, and every artifact is a key to new connections. Share your story of what you found, the journey it took you on, and watch as we create a cocktail (or mocktail based on your preference) that embodies the spirit of your adventure. We welcome you to explore, relax and rejuvenate with communal conversation. Our intimate dance floor beckons you to let loose and find your rhythm. Come, explore, and leave your mark on our ever-evolving story.

name: Lost Art
description:
Come and visit the Lost Art of Conversation Cafe! We at Lost Art celebrate opportunities to create deep connections with friends old and new. At our Conversation Cafe you will be welcomed and supported in exploring avenues of conversation that encourage depth with the goal of learning something new about others and maybe even yourself. We want you to come and settle for a while and get lost in conversation. To keep you nourished we have tea in the mornings and street foods from around the world in the evenings. 

We are a small collaboration and connection driven community from across the US who love taking on ambitious projects, connecting with other awesome communities, and seeking growth and meaning in all that we do. Come on by, we'd love to get to know you.

name: Lotus Dome & Café
description:
The Lotus Dome & Cafe offers spaces for folks to recharge, reconnect, and recenter their bodies and minds.

Our camp has two main spaces. The Lotus Dome is our quieter mindfulness center, home to offerings like yoga, guided meditation, breathwork, movement workshops, flow workshops, spiritual offerings, and mindfulness-related talks. It’s a calm place to stretch, breathe, meditate, reflect, or simply take a moment for yourself.

The Lotus Cafe is our shaded social lounge, where folks can cool off, connect, and enjoy iced cold brew coffee and tea. The Cafe also hosts hands-on creative workshops like screen printing, bracelet making, and other art-based offerings.

Whether you’re looking for a quiet reset, a cool drink, a creative activity, or a friendly place to land, we'd love to welcome you to our camp!

name: Lovana
description: Step into a lively corner of Chinese street-food hospitality on playa. Expect rare regional comfort food, shared seating, drinks, and a warm place to pause, gather, and connect with strangers. Draw a Blessing Card, leave a Love Note, and stay a little longer than you planned. Come for the aroma and curiosity, stay for the conversation and human connection.

name: Love Tripping
description: Trip & stumble out of your den and into our arms. We're here to show you love all week, with events of affection, appreciation, curiosity, and acceptance. Featuring the Touchless Love Wash, 18-Hand Massage, Naked Breakfast Slop, the ASMR Salon, and the gargantuan Book of Understanding.

name: Lovin' Oven
description:
In the middle of the desert: hot, dry and dusty; we bake bread. All week, every morning. Just for you!
Let us feed, host and entertain you. Enjoy freshly baked bread served with tasty toppings, including some vegan loaves everyday; freshly brewed mint tea and unbelievably good vibes! 

Chill out on the suspended cuddle puddle or day beds, have a dance with DJs changing daily, hang out in the shade or come back and chill in the quiet at night. The Lovin Oven welcomes you ALL.

name: Lucid Dream Hideout
description: A afternoon coffee bar to get the best iced coffee and Matcha on the Playa! We have a live DJ, wi-fi and shade to sit and chill to share your amazing burner stories. Spin our Wheel of Misfortune for a fun experience and receive a memorable sticker to remember your amazing time with us!

name: Luminary Camp
description: Support camp for Luminary and The Love Beacon MVs

name: Luminos
description: Come make a gourd lantern with us! We provide the gourds, tools, and know-how to help you make a beautiful gourd lantern that you can take home with you.

name: Lunar Disco
description: Embrace the cosmic elements in our electrifying dance and party spaces, with interstellar beats and mesmerizing ambience. Connect with fellow stargazers in our ceremonial space, honoring the celestial bodies and the shared human experience. Embark on an otherworldly adventure at Lunar Disco.

name: Lunars Camp
description: Experience a unique journey aboard our tethered hot air balloon, 75 feet high, with live instrumentals and DJ Sets. Enjoy stunning Black Rock City views and our ground-level dance floor. Join the best show on earth in our Celestial Circus lounge or relax and rejuvenate in our Oracle's Den.

name: Lusty Chanterelle Kombucha Bar
description: Whisky is out- Kombucha is in. The Lusty Chanterelle Kombucha bar is a place to cool down, relax, unwind, and drop in with good conversation and a cold non-alcoholic beverage with your fellow burners. Come with an empty cup and we will fill you up and help you feel at home with the most quaffable drink on playa.

name: M*A*S*H 4207th
description: Attention all personnel! Come visit the MASH 4207th - best care anywhere! Relax during the day with ice cold PBRs and the best martinis on the Playa. Enjoy the shade of our vintage tents and the company. Return at night for a break from the chaos of the burn with nightly showings of MASH TV episodes.

name: MacGyvers' Union
description: Every camp has a MacGyver -- now the MacGyvers have a union. We provide all MacGyvers with recognition, thanks, tools, training, entertainment, emotional and moral support, chill space away from their home camp, and an official ID card.

name: machinedom - the experience
description: machinedom-the experience.... come by and see us!

name: Mad Tea(se) Party
description: Mad Tea(se) Party is a circusy sound camp and interactive lounge. We offer Victorian era living room ambiance, nightly tea service, yoga/acroyoga workshops and more! Since 2019, Mad Tea(se) has hosted it's flagship Wednesday evening Cabaret Show under its iconic, striped circus tent.

name: Magic Lantern Society
description:
The Magic Lantern is a wandering inn, located at the end of all worlds. Sumptuously-appointed with antiques, curiosities, games, and mysterious old books, we are a space created for deeper human connection, and a warm and inviting sanctuary for the weary and curious traveller.

Our centerpiece is our unique Trading Booth, where stories and secrets are the only accepted currency. Anyone can step up to don our shopkeeper's hat?we believe in erasing the boundaries between host and traveller.

name: Magic Paradise
description: Dive into an oasis of wonder, where community and enchantment come together! Enjoy captivating up close magic shows, intimate speakeasy encounters, and daily afternoon treats. Let our skilled team repair your gear, and make your bike stand out with our dazzling decorations.

name: Maison Phi
description:
Maison Phi is your beautifully chaotic oasis in the dust where hydration, pancakes, yoga, and late-night dance floors all coexist in perfect imbalance.

By day, come get revived at our Cucumber Water Station, reset with yoga, cool off with popsicles, or hang at our card games and pancake mornings.

By evening, we serve up our iconic Dirty Chicken Martini Soup and roll out for golden hour art car rides with Fibonacci, our spiral-powered art car and cosmic counterpart?because Maison Phi and Fibonacci are two sides of the same frequency.

By night, Phi Frequency takes over, music, movement, and connection under the stars.

The House of Balance, Growth, and Natural Harmony and a bit of Chaos!

name: Mansonian Institute 4 Urban Study
description: Visit us to learn Burningman History from its very beginning to now from experts. Come hear "Meet the Man Base Build Krewe" talk and ask questions Tues @ 3-4:15PM. Bring a shirt & make it a BM t-shirt Tues + Wed 10-Noon, Swag Swag Swag + visit our fabulous day bar for BM themed games & drinks. See Tubatron "the Flaming Tuba guy" do his thing! Celebrate Mansonian's 20th birthday on Play on Wednesday Noon to 1:30 PM!

name: MARA
description:
MARA Camp invites you to experience Belarusian traditions of purification and connection.
Step into our Laznia and take part in a traditional steam bath ritual that cleanses body and spirit. Rooted in centuries-old practices, it is a space to reset, release, and begin anew. Herbal tea is served as part of the ritual experience.
In the afternoon, gather at our Draniki Station to enjoy freshly prepared Belarusian potato pancakes and connect through the simple act of sharing food.
MARA is a space of warmth, renewal, and human connection.

name: Martha Love
description:
Come play out fabulous games

Performance Stage

BRC Community space - Stage available for your use - Come and have your presentation in our space. contact us to make a reservation

Martha - Historical Vehicle - Longest continuous art car on the playa . Sharing Love; Jump on board and enjoy the loving company, visit the artists, and the best beats in Black Rock

name: Mary E's Lavender Hand Wash
description: Come feel the Lavender Love and wash the day's playa away! A moment of tranquility is sacred in the desert, and we are here to honor that moment with a lovely hand wash & hand massage, leaving you feeling relaxed and happy!

name: Matcha Mama
description: A daytime oasis serving handcrafted matcha lattes and meaningful connection. Stop by for a refreshing drink made to order, then settle into our shaded "Spill the Tea" lounge for conversation, reflection, or simply a moment of rest. With rotating flavors and a calm, welcoming atmosphere, this is a space to slow down and be present. Whether you stay briefly or linger a while, you're invited to connect in whatever way feels right.

name: Math Camp @ Group W
description: A Safe place to drink and Derive. Share your problems with us.

name: MAXA
description: We are Maxa, rooted in family. built by hand We create warmth, bringing people together through art and music.

name: Maybe You Should Talk To Someone
description: Our camp provides on-playa counseling services, offering burners a space to process emotions, navigate conflicts, and reconnect with their experience in a meaningful way. In addition to one-on-one support, we create opportunities for self-guided reflection at out Zen Tent where you can journal, create art, and enjoy quiet contemplation. By blending therapeutic support with opportunities for introspection, our camp serves as a sanctuary for those seeking clarity, connection, and emotional renewal on the playa.

name: Mechanical Garden
description:
From Wednesday to Saturday afternoons, we share iced mung bean and osmanthus sweet soup with anyone passing by, a traditional Chinese summer dessert meant to cool people down in the desert heat.

Red silk and playful mechanical flowers create a small garden space where people can wander, rest, and explore.

We also take casual portraits and sometimes gift Polaroid photos so visitors can leave with a small memory of the playa.

With shade, gentle music, and open hearts, we hope to create a little oasis where people can pause, connect, and share a joyful moment in the desert.

name: Media Mecca
description: Media Mecca is Black Rock City's home to storytellers, journalists, and media. All media projects must register at Mecca prior to beginning in BRC.

name: Mellow Mountain
description: Mellow Mountain invites you to trade smooches with the Kissy Fish art car, play on our swings and rings, and be served kid-made lemonade and espresso martinis.

name: Memento Mori
description:
Life, Death and Sexi Breakfast!

At Burning Vitae we nourish your body and invigorate your soul!

Come experience the sexiest breakfast on playa followed by powerful life and death reflective exercises.

Who says the most important meal of the day can't also be the sexiest?

name: MESA
description: Join us on our raised sanctuary where the spirit of community, self-expression, and well-being converge. Our vibrant, shaded oasis offers a diverse array of experiences, from sunset drum circles to sunrise yoga sessions, fireside mezcal nights and even late night volleyball (it's lit)! With a dedication to Radical Inclusion, we welcome all seekers to our haven of pillows, rugs, and couches, where connections are forged, creativity flourishes, and transformative journeys unfold.

name: Metal Detected
description: Calling all metalheads! Real metal is a rare find in the dust, so we built a stage for it to amalgamate. We provide the instruments and mics for anyone to meet up, plug in and jam, or scream through nightly karaoke. We host primal screaming and metal detecting events and welcome all genres and skill levels to keep the stage alive. Come metal detecting and leave as detected metal.

name: METAL MIMI Camp
description:
Metal Mimi, the curious little creature who is our namesake, dwells at the Bay Area Metal Shop where Art Destined for the Playa is Born.

Metal Mimi is Witness to Art made Manifest and she is the Keeper of our Magical Dreams.

Metal Mimi Camp was created in honor of the Metal Workers, Welders, and Artists who desire to bring their Art to the Dust. Our mission is to help them.

You will find their art at Metal Mimi Camp and on Playa.

name: Metal-Morphosis
description:
Camp Metal-Morphosis provides metal workshop M-F 12-2pm.
Make your own pendant and learn metal work skills at our camp.
Some burners come every year !

name: Metamorphosis Energy Lab
description: An electric-powered mutant vehicle support camp dedicated to the art and science of energy transformation on the playa. Our fully solar-powered base of operations keeps our all electric mutant Vehicle (The Hungry Caterpillar) running day and night, ferrying participants across Black Rock City with zero emissions. We believe in the metamorphic power of radical technology, clean energy, and community. Find us by the hum of electric motors and the glow of solar panels.

name: MIDAS TEAR COLLECTIVE
description:
Step into a welcoming French gathering space where conversations flow alongside French wine and cheese. Join us in building a collaborative geometric sculpture using Zometool, an evolving creation shaped collectively throughout the week. At sunrise, gather beneath The Tear of Midas for meditation, reflection, and community sharing circles. Relax, create, exchange ideas, and imagine new ways of living in harmony with the natural world through art, dialogue, and collective creativity.

A collection of flags will be hoisted — French, Brazilian, Norwegian, Argentine, Breton, United States, and a pirate flag — visible from the street, as a gesture of fraternity and peace, symbolizing that we stand together in unity.

name: Midnight Roast
description: Late Night Afterhours Coffee + Music! The ONLY coffee service after midnight.

name: Mighty Misfits
description: A Mighty Misfit is a person whose behavior or attitude sets them apart from others in a conspicuous way, yet somehow makes it okay. A fish out of water, square peg in a round hole, round peg in a square hole. If you've ever felt you don't fit in in the default world, come and play with the Mighty Misfits. We are a welcoming, dusty respite with a misfit list of activities. Feed your body and soul with us!

name: Miki Beach
description:
Miki Beach is inspired from an array of beach lounges in Miami and the Caribbean, and mimicking these beach lounge vibes, we are striving to create an open, breezy, colorful environment to relax and have fun. 
Miki Beach is your desert oasis so come celebrate with us at one of our playful parties, sip on one of our delectable libations, visit us for our Brazilian BBQ on Saturday or participate and become a winner on one of our silly activities such as the Miki Beach State Fair.

name: Mimosa
description: Hey you, yes you our dear friend! I know what you want, or I would say even need. A fresh, cold MIMOSA. Please step by our bar where we will get you what you need.

name: Mindseye Bonsai
description:
We are a small art support camp of builders, artists, scientists, and dusty travelers from all over the world. Our mission is to bring sculpture to the playa and have a good time doing it. With 10 years of experience bringing art to Burning Man, we love sharing neuroscience-inspired art and curiosity with fellow dusty desert folks. If that sounds like your kind of camp, reach out and come join us.

“Become the vision of the mind’s eye And carry your flame to the fire Do not wait for the fire to carry the flame to you”

name: MindShark
description: Stay out of Mindshark, we're glad to have you! We serve questionable drinks with confidence, blast music you didn't ask for, and light up the night with fire and LED absurdity. While you are staying out of MindShark you may participate and spectate as brave souls attempt our infamous bar games, flow with our LED dome, or trigger columns of flames to the beat of the music. Equal parts bar, art piece, and bad decision factory?this is MindShark. Enter freely. Leave slightly worse.

name: Mindwerk
description: Come to Mindwerk and ride our slide!! Relax in our shady dome and enjoy a Pomerosegasm, the most delicious and refreshing cocktail in Black Rock City! Climb up to our viewing platform where you can behold a 360 degree view of our beautiful metropolis. Exhilarating egress is provided by a convenient slide. It's been called "just the right amount of sketchy" by satisfied customers. And its polymer surface won't burn your buns!

name: Misfits Menagerie
description: Glowy tent with helix tower, worst bartender, weirdest games, and belly laughs

name: Mission Country Club
description: Hailing from the sunny Mission District of San Francisco, we invite everyone to enjoy the dusty comforts of our playa outpost. Pull up a bar stool at Flanagan's Pub - open day and night - for a refreshing beverage. Cozy up on one of our couches beneath the ample and breezy shade structure. Let loose on the dance floor. We're a relaxed and fun-loving crowd from all over - San Francisco, Tahoe, Reno, Los Angeles, Washington DC, Boston, New York, Seattle, Portland, Ireland, Germany, Belgium and beyond. Often serving tunes and always serving drink, the Mission Country Club has been calling Black Rock City home since 2004.

name: Mist Connections
description: Misconnections is a tiny temple to bad timing, chaotic crushes, and emotional side quests. Stumble in, get aggressively misted, and accept an irresponsible amount of shave ice while you write anonymous notes to the hottie from the porta line, the stranger who rescued your bike, or the person you trauma?bonded with at sunrise.

name: Misters & Sisters
description: We are a fun daytime camp, offering two main activities, 1) overhead water misters, accessible all week from dawn to dusk, operated by staff or self-service, and, 2) a DIY Essential Oil body spray activity from noon to 3 p.m. Monday, Tuesday and Wednesday (with Friday as backup for bad weather).  We have 26 different essential oils to choose from and will show you how to mix base, medium and top notes to create your own fragrance. Our oils are therapeutic grade.  Give your senses a spa treatment!

name: Mo's Mini Martini + Erotica Camp
description: Mohammeds serves the coldest martinis and the hottest erotica on the playa. Come and join us for an ice cold martini in a REAL martini glass and, if the spirit moves you, write down your own true erotic tale in our 400 year old book filled with the daring do's of other Black Rock Citizens. We open after lunch at 1:00pm and close when the camels go to bed, around 1:00am.

name: Mobility Camp
description: We offer Oh Shiny! Tours for anyone who wants to get out and explore the incredible art. We give priority to people with physical disabilities. We also provide crutches and wheelchairs for anyone who gets injured on the playa. Public charging station for Medical Equipment. Stop by and check out our obstacle course!

name: Mobility Munchers
description:
Mobility Munchers is a diverse and inclusive camp along a variety of dimensions, yet specifically an advocate for PWD overlapping with those who like culinary artistry. Find us for finger sandwiches and Vermont maple syrup + food for your mind and health along the way. 

We embrace the spirit of YaY. 
YaY is an enthusiastic affirmative that can not be said without smiling. 
If it is not a YaY, it might as well be a nay. 
Embrace the YaY.

name: Molotov Cocktail
description:
Our shaded bar/chill space offers welcome respite and comfort for the dusty and thirsty.
We will be bringing a variety of home brewed and concocted alcoholic beverages for the citizens of Black Rock City.
We offer a variety of games including cribbage and ten thousand/farkle.

name: Mona Camp
description:
Welcome to Mona Camp, where the spirit of caring, loving, and creativity thrives amidst the vast expanse of the playa. As part of the same community that brought you the Huge Mona Bunny in 2023, the enchanting Mona Mushroom in 2024, and the MONA DIE! DIE! DIE! burn in 2025. We are dedicated to spreading the Mona spirit far and wide.

We believe in the power of art to inspire, connect, and uplift souls. Our theme revolves around celebrating art, neuroscience, and diverse world cultures.

name: Monkey King Camp
description:
A playful cultural playground on the Playa filled with DJ sets, music, interactive art, games, drinks, Asian inspired food gifting, and Monkey King energy. 
Come explore our Dragon Pillars, catch live sets from DJs and artists on our stage, hang out in our lounge spaces, share tea, snacks, and good vibes, and jump into spontaneous moments of fun with fellow Burners. 
By day and night, our camp is designed for discovery, connection, and mischief in the spirit of the Monkey King. 
We are also developing the Monkey King Multiverse, an innovation project with map based camp information to help Burners find camps, connect with each other, and navigate Black Rock City more easily. Come recharge, dance, play, and be part of the adventure.

name: Moon Cheese
description: We still believe the moon is made out of cheese. That's why we serve grilled cheese sandwiches throughout the week to the hungry citizens of Black Rock City. Stocked with all different types of bread & cheese and a range of sweet, spicy, tangy & juicy dipping sauces, we're grilling under the stars to satisfy the cravings of all those dancing & adventuring at night.

name: Moon Landing
description:
Moon Landing, a celestial outpost of creativity, exploration, and radical self-expression at Burning Man. Our camp is a launchpad for dreamers, builders, and cosmic wanderers?a space where art, technology, and human connection intersect in gravity-defying ways.

Inspired by the pioneering spirit of lunar exploration, we craft immersive experiences that transport participants beyond the ordinary. Whether it's through interactive installations, mind-expanding discussions, or late-night moonwalks under the neon glow, Moon Landing invites you to step into the unknown and embrace the infinite possibilities of the playa.

Join us as we orbit together in a community fueled by curiosity, collaboration, and a little bit of space dust. The countdown has begun?see you on the moon!

name: Moonlight Collective
description: The Moonlight Collective is part of the Temple Crew hub and will be supporting the Temple of the Moon build. Come visit our bar and have a chat with the Entity. Meet the team that designed the temple this year and share your stories.

name: Moonraker
description: Moonraker Mutant vehicle, 10th year.

name: MOOP MAP HQ
description: MOOP Map HQ is Playa Restoration's home base ? part LNT response center, part history hub, part hangout. We're like a firehouse for MOOP, ready to roll out when there's an issue. It's also where you'll find past MOOP Maps, interactive displays, and friendly faces happy to chat about Leave No Trace or how to join the Resto crew!

name: More Is More
description: Reality is a suggestion. Excess is a plan. Climb our wood tower, enjoy drinks and DJ with us daily.

name: Mos Eisley Village
description:
Mos Eisley... 
You will never find a more wretched hive of scum and villainy. 

We must be cautious.

name: Mostly in Tune
description:
Leave with dusty shoes and a song stuck in your head.

Mostly in Tune is a participatory jam camp. Join the band, borrow an instrument, sing along, enjoy live band karaoke, perform spoken word over live backing tracks, or simply enjoy the music. No experience required.

Want to join a camp and actually make music? We’re looking for a drummer and keyboard player to complete our house band. (Until then, Roland is keeping the beat.)

Weather permitting, our jam sessions are captured with professional multitrack audio and video, then mixed after the Burn. Featured artists who share their contact information can request copies of their recordings and opt out of social media featuring their performances.

Come record the soundtrack to your Burn.

name: Mountain Mayhem
description: Straight from the Colorado Rockies, Mountain Mayhem is the greatest dive bar on the playa. With the best drinks, games, and bartenders to be found, we will be sure to keep it hot while staying cool. Come by for a thirst quenching snowjob and a shotski, or have your socks blown off at connect 4.

name: Mouse House
description: You know who loves hammocks? Mice love hammocks. If you also love hammocks, you might be a mouse yourself! Come to the Mouse House to get in touch with your inner rodent. Vibes so chill you might find yourself trapped.

name: Mouse Trap
description: Keep your friends close, but your cheese closer!

name: Mudskippers
description:
The Home of Pop in the Playa, we are a radically-inclusive, diverse and expressive tight-knit group of lovers from all over the globe.
We're a worldwide network of friends and a family. We work and play together to make the burn more fun and give bigger to those that come to our theme camp. 

Come enjoy our Pop Gym, our amazing dance parties, fun workshops, or just come chill out with us!

name: Mural Maze Support Camp
description: Mural Maze Art Support Camp is a collaborative space supporting a group of muralists creating a large scale installation on playa.

name: MUSE (Maenad University)
description: The Maenad University for the Study of the Esoteric (M.U.S.E.) is a tribute to the deity Dionyus and offers a temple space for offerings as well as for our interactivity which ranges from spiritual to silly. We offer a 24 hour labyrinth for visitors to use as well as a kiosk which will host a variety of camp run and visitor run interactivity. We are a very welcoming group and you are free to say hi and chat with us when we are out and about.

name: MUSE Café
description: MUSE is a nod, a wink, a slap on the bum. It is a toast to the muse in you and the muse in me. It's booty shaking praise and it's champagne smiles. It is a place where we can embrace both the funky and meaningful. Our goal is to honor & celebrate the inspiration in every human being. We create a space and curate events that ignite the playful & seductive spirit of the muse. Our mission is to honor the muses among us and within us. To seek, offer, and discover inspiration in both the obvious and the peculiar places. To create a nurturing home on playa, to host our fellow burners, and enrich as many people's burning man experience as much as possible. Come to our cafe hours or speakeasy to get a taste!

name: Mutant Ninja Burners
description: Are you looking for a place to kick up your dusty boots or maybe somewhere to warm up during the cold night? At Mutant Ninja Burners when you cross our sewer rat picket fence you're one of us! Don a headband, dance and groove to some wubs. Learn some sick nunchuck skillz. Warm yourself by the fire pits. You'll be rewarded with friendship, acceptance and a hot slice of pizza if you come by during one of our wubby, dubby pizza parties. Cowabunga!

name: My Favorite Things
description: When the dust hits, we turn to our favorite things?cooling, comforting, and slightly questionable. Stop by for a reset, a little delight, and maybe something you'll pretend you didn't love as much as you did.

name: Mystic
hometown: Bay Area + Los Angeles CA + Denver, CO + New York, NY
description:
Mystic is a legendary theme camp with 20+ years of magic in Black Rock City ? a vibrant sanctuary of interactive art, transcendent music, and soul-expanding workshops.
BY DAY: Dive into our Visionary Speaker Series, Healing Modalities, and Mind-Body Workshops inside the iconic Mystic Theater and Mystic Temple.
BY NIGHT: Lose yourself in fire dancers, visionary musicians, and boundary-pushing artists at our new Monday Night Celebration Party and legendary Truth & Beauty Wednesday Night Party.
Then take it to Deep Playa aboard the Mystic Flyer Experience ? our roving Mutant Vehicle bringing creativity, community, and pure Burning Man wonder wherever it lands.
This is your invitation. Come transform with us.

name: Mystikal Misfits
description:
This year the Mystical Misfits celebrate 23 years on Playa. 
We will be providing the beautiful Narwhal as a stationary stage for Performances, DJs, and a shaded rest spot for Burners.
We plan to have Daily events on the Narwhal during the day and evening.
We will also have a Bar. Seeing refreshments to Participate everyday at Happy Hour. They will also have DJs scheduled everyday.
This year we will also have a "Chill Out" dome for Participants to get out of the weather and just chill.

name: Mystopia
description: Step out of the sun-scorched wonderland into our cool haven. It's an icy oasis, an ice cream paradise, and a sanctuary for all. We welcome everyone: friends, partners, parents, children, individuals of any race, orientation and identity. Stop by our burner family and experience the rainbow of diversity. Come play with us, sit down and watch some drag/burlesque, dance with a stranger or simply relax on bean bags surrounded by refreshing mist.

name: NAACB
description: NAACB (National Association for the Advancement of Colored Burners)

name: Naked Heart
description:
Naked Heart is devoted to the full embodiment of the divine feminine. We offer amazing experiential and experimental workshops that allow you to feel your feminine heart, your radiance, your inner goddess. This work requires the masculine as well; Everyone is welcome. 

At Naked Heart we recognize the need to embrace both the light and the dark in our journeys. When we pursue the light we use movement, the senses, sensuality, sexuality and connection. This beckons us in and brings the light of awareness back into the bodies we have vacated. To go there fully requires confronting our shadows. We embrace those as well as we dive into shame, fear, anger, unsavory memories from this life and past lives, and disempowering images of our bodies. Welcome home.

name: Native Tongues
description:
A Native Tongue speaks to the frequency we all share, a common way of communicating with love, empathy & respect. An acknowledgment of the humanity we recognize in each other.
And also a kick ass rap collective from the 90's!

name: Navigate to YES
description: Find your destiny on playa with our GPS - Global Persuasion System

name: Neodebauchery
description: We are a throng of dome-dwelling miscreants, hooligans, bloviators, simps, warlocks, horse girls, diggerfish, and charlatans. As one of the aforementioned groups, your birthright compels you to complete the pilgrimage to the fabled land of Neodebauchery. A melange of tomfoolery new and old, Neodebauchery provides a welcoming space for weirdos of all creeds, colors, and degree of crustiness. Come gyrate to the soothing, yet somehow also abrasive melodies of our human-DJ chimeras, witness visual distortion unlike you have seen (since your last burn) with our procedurally generated Digital Domeflesh, and participate in our daily sinful activities.

name: NetsaH
description: Explorers and curious souls, every shared energy is etched into eternity.

name: Never Sleep Again
description: Inspired by the vibes of Berlin nightclubs and the global underground party scene, we bring deep, groovy beats to an intimate dance floor enclosed by lush chill spaces with beds, couches, cushions, and pillows for when you need to reset. Drift between dancing, lounging, sharing a drink, playing games, and getting lost in moments with other burners. Our space pulses with sound, curiosity, mischief, and radical self expression. Look a little closer and you'll find our space is full of creative details and hidden surprises waiting to be discovered. Come as you are, stay as long as you like, and get a little weird with us. Always love. Never sleep.

name: New Desert Outpost
description: We are an eclectic, antique outpost for wanderers and those seeking adventure.

name: Next Year on Luna
description: We explore the question: as the shifting systems around us shape our experiences and our lives, what does it mean to maintain our essential humanity and ultimately to remain, or become, ourselves?

name: Nipple Crime
description: Nipple crime is a Reno based theme camp dedicated to memorable experiences. Come have a drink at our extensive home-brewed bar. Friday's Sensual Hotdog eating contest is our biggest event and won't disappoint. We are mostly a day camp but often have small parties well into the morning.

name: Nipple Pie
description:
Welcomes you to join us for our early night parties, whether it is to stomp our dancefloor or to simply sip on a refreshing cocktail in our cozy lounge.

At the start of the new night, when our projectors launch their state of the art 3D projections onto our 50ft mural, and when the beats roar up to the busy avenue, that's when Nipple Pie shines the best

name: No Drama Camp
description: We are all inclusive Camp that provides the Citizens of Black Rock City with a fun and interesting place to stop by for a Drink at the No Drama Bar. We host many daily events under our large shade structure. Nightly DJ's play music for those stopping by on their way around the Playa. Enjoy our fun oversized Bar Games, while you sip some of the best drinks to be found. There is always something happening that you don't want to miss at No Drama Camp and Bar.

name: No Holes Barred Comedy Club
description:
We know you missed us! We're back to make you laugh! 
Start your day with some coldbrew and comic strips, chill out in our giggle inducing Meditation Sessions, learn how to make friends and strangers laugh, and cry, in our variety of Story Telling and Stand Up, and comedy related Workshops, then test your new skills at Open Mic. Got beef with your campmates? Join us for "Judge Django" to argue your case and redeem your reputation! And of course, the main event! Every night! Laugh your butthole off at our Pro Stand Up Comedy Special! 

All Holes Welcome!

name: NO STAIRWAY TO HEAVEN
description:
Musicians and wanderers gather here for open jam sessions where anyone can join the circle with instruments, percussion, or pure curiosity. 

Our signature event, Jam Battle, invites players into a friendly one-on-one improvisational showdown inspired by dance battles and musical conversation. 

Throughout the week visitors can relax in the lounge, share moments of spontaneous music, and if you're lucky, you'll find our White Dwagon Ramen Cart gifting fresh bowls of ramen to hungry travelers. 

Come listen, play, and see what happens when people surrender to the moment.

name: Nobo House
description: Nobo House is an international, quirky Holistic Wellness & Recovery camp that is a place of refuge for playa adventurers, artists, & builders. Our gift is a chill playa spa, that includes a steam room, outdoor gym, dance classes, massages and smoothies.

name: Nocino's
description: That cozy social place where people come to hang after a long day of [redacted] and [censored] to connect with beer, pizza, and good music.

name: Node
description: Node is an oasis of epic proportions. Stop by for drinks, vibes and beats. Dont miss our Hip Hop BBQ on Wednesday!

name: Nom De Plume
description: We are a tea lounge that has yerba mate brewing the entire event in our circus tent. Come by to kick it, chill, and lounge. Relax while thriving, and drinking tea. The way life should be. We have a variety of other teas available throughout the week but always have yerba mate brewing. Sit down and hydrate while you start or finish your day. Yerba Mate Dub starts every day at 10:30am. Classic dub sounds from around the world as time turns elastic. Come have some tea.

name: noMADart
description:
noMADart Camp one of few Deaf Family Friendly camps that offer daily renewable art project where you can make a gift, memory and connection all in one stop. We pride ourselves with openness and awareness of the Burning Man Ethos and Principles. 
Dusty Hugs

name: Nordic Paradise
description: Where cold-brew coffee meets an exciting bar and cafe. Explore workshops for body and mind, dance to music, and chill out in style. Join our Qurious Viking party, celebrating all gender expressions. It's an unforgettable experience waiting for you. Welcome to Nordic Paradise!

name: Norms Garage
description:
Norms Garage and its Handle Bar is a space full of bike-based furniture and a human-powered blender bar, recycling default world bike parts into new lives and uses on playa. We also host a variety of bike-oriented events, teaching people the delicate art of how to physically and emotionally ride a tandem, jousting on a big wheels trike, how to do the limbo on two wheels, and hosting many other mini-games focused on finding new ways to enjoy and appreciate your playa bike.

At the Garage, we can fix almost anything: a contentious relationship, a broken heart, a lost traveler in space or time. We cannot, however, fix your bicycle.

name: NORSE CODE
description:
Norse Code is an international camp centered on music, dance, movement, and human connection. We create an open, welcoming space where campers and visitors can gather, participate, and engage with one another in meaningful ways.

Our elevated deck serves as the heart of camp life, hosting yoga, breathwork, sound baths, exercise classes, and evening DJ sets throughout the week. Programming is consistent and accessible, giving everyone the chance to join in and take part.

By day, expect movement and workshops. By night, music, dancing, and shared experiences bring the camp together. Norse Code is a space to show up, connect, and celebrate together

name: Northwest Mist
description: World famous misting tent that is like walking into a rain forest on playa. Where we come together to provide a cool oasis for dusty travelers. We open before event opening so that the builders of our great city and art have somewhere to cool off, regenerate and talk to other builders.

name: Nose Fish
description:
Come get coffee from an undisclosed appendage of the Nose Fish itself Monday, Tuesday, and Thursday mornings and stay for the music! This year we're giving away cookies!
Bike repair clinics are happening Monday, Tuesday mornings 10:30-12:30 and Thursday afternoon 2-4:30
Hella Halo-Halo Thursday 2-4:30 during bike repair - come get a refreshing Filipino shave ice treat! Don't forget your cup or bowl!
Electronics Repair M-F 2:00 - 4:30 personal lighting repair/tutoring
Sewing repair service M, T, Th, & F 2:00 - 4:30: come darn your dazzling duds with our resident seamster/seamstress at our super sewing service!

name: NOT BORING
description:
NOT BORING is a sunrise after hours sound camp where the night flows into day and the energy keeps building.

Join us from late morning into the afternoon for music, movement, and connection powered by a high quality sound system. Our space brings together a vibrant dance floor, refreshing drinks, cooling fans, and a welcoming atmosphere designed to recharge and uplift.

Participants can cool down with mist and shade, receive gifted fans, and explore a creative art area where they can paint and take their piece with them.

We create a balance between high energy celebration and mindful moments, inviting everyone to participate, express themselves, and be part of something alive.

If you are still dancing, you are in the right place.

name: Nova Heaven
description: The crew that has created Nova Heaven for the past two years are gathering together to bring "Let There Be Light", a new art installation to playa. Come by and say "Shalom". We love you.

name: Now and Then Artist Collective
description: We are a group of artists who have worked together on many projects over the years. Our goal is to support each other so we can get our art to playa and camp together. New artists are welcome.

name: Nudibranch
description: Mutant vehicle support camp with radical inclusion in mind.

name: NumbSkulls
description: Support camp for NumbSkull

name: NYC Community Container
description: We Guarantee Nothing! But if you're from the NYC/NJ area your gear probably comes to the burn on our shipping containers.

name: NYC Deli
description:
NYC Deli will be be serving Seinfeld-esque laughs and scrumptious New York Deli breakfast food 10am-12pm Monday through Saturday during the Burn. Bacon Egg and Cheese is most popular but we also have vegan, veggie, kosher and gluten Free breakfast sandwich options too! Coffee and water served. Like last year: there is an air conditioned public picnic area to enjoy your meal! 

In addition to the food: NYC Deli also offers Siberia! Siberia is a 100-person public cooling center kept at 70 degrees 10am-5pm Monday through Saturday. Most burners use it to sleep or quietly socialize. There is no programming: just ocean noise playing over a speaker. Ice is available! Siberia is NYC Deli's response to 2022's 104 degree heat.

Please stop by! ???????

name: Ocean Beach
description: Ocean Beach is a sun-soaked fever dream of surf shacks, sea creatures, and boardwalk absurdity. Join our salty circus for lobster pizza rituals, smoothie shamans, sunset cocktail ceremonies, and the infamous ode to JB's cheeseburger in paradise. Stretch your soul with yoga, tantra, and sound healing. Play boardwalk games, ride silly rides, perform on our aerial hoops, or lounge like a sea god. We're a 100% green camp riding the tide toward a stranger, better world. New beach bums always welcome ? come get weird by the waves.

name: Oceyolotl Sanctuary
description: Jaguar Temple welcomes burners for evening healing ceremonies, traditional Mexican live music, out of this world singing, legends telling and much more spiritual and fun experiences. Enjoy our special cacao, rituals and magical atmosphere!

name: Off the Dome
description: Come explore & express yourself at Off the Dome! Formerly known as Freestyle Palace, Off the Dome is back in the playa Wonderland for its second decade as the original musical imagination sanctuary: the Playa Talent Incubator. Our namesake DIY Jam Dome is powered by the talent and creativity Black Rock City's citizens. Our stage, mics & instruments are available for singing, rapping and making impromptu music. Off the Dome hosts the hip hop visionaries: Black City All-Stars and Black Rock City Regional Air Guitar Championships - now in its 12th year, as well as the Galactivators. We are all about the magical love of performance! Come play & perform with other performers and creators at our innovative haven. At Off the Dome, do it live at Home in BRC.

name: Ofosho
description: Good ramen, a great playa moment! Serving the ramen experience on the playa the last 12 years. Doodle or dance to deep house or minimal techno while you wait, noodlessly polaroid yourself or connect with 100s of fellow burners either noodling around or slurping an irresistible bowl of happiness (we have got you covered vegetarians!). Ofosho memorable!

name: Oh mi Gato Rat Cafe!
description: Oh Mi Gato Rat Cafe, formerly known as Oh Mi Gato Hat Cafe, formerly known as Oh Mi Gato Cat Cafe, delighting your senses with a combination of Colombian coffee, relaxing yoga movements, really cool hats and Latino party vibes. Drinks, art and music. What else do you need to find your inner beast.

name: Oh No You Didn't!
description: Be our guest and get it off your chest at our playa confessional lounge, featuring libelous libations and scornful judgment by our panel of experts. Commiserate with the best as we help keep your shame in perspective.

name: OHF- One Human Family
description: From Macedonia to Florida, our camp welcomes everyone to chill in our comfortable space and recharge. Coffee and Tea offered daily along with Conch Blowing, Yoga, Jewelry making and great discussions. Come join us as One Human Family.

name: OHM HOME
description: We are a mutant vehicle support camp. Home of Ohm Kar, Manta and Vibe Apple. Come n boogie. Take the ride.

name: OLYMPVS
description: Olympvs is a theatrical courtyard where curiosity, connection, and sensual exploration come to life. Step inside a world of music, shadow, masks, and playful encounters where strangers become scene partners and every interaction becomes part of the story. Through immersive theater, games, and guided moments of connection, Olympvs invites wanderers to explore identity, desire, and communication in a consent-forward space. Come curious. Leave transformed.

name: Om Skillet
description: Om Skillet - serving the playa Gourmet Grilled Cheese lunches Monday through Thursday and hosting the Short Stack TuTu Tuesday dance party at 2:22pm on Tuesday since 2011.

name: Only mEmbers
description: "Only mEmbers" bar (21 and over). Only VIPs with proof of membership are permitted. Absolutely no exceptions.

name: Opulent Temple
description: Opulent Temple. Sacred Dance to world Class Music

name: Oral Fixation
description: Popsicles!! Come one, come all, to partake of our tantalizing treats!! Suckle your way through the pearly gates of bliss. We've doubled our offerings to maximize your oral pleasure. Don't miss out!!

name: Organic Fruit & Veggie Camp
description: The finest fruits and veggies to wet your whistle and soothe your soul. Come have a snack and a chat and reset your mind and body.

name: Orgy Bus Camp
description: Orgy Bus Camp provides a safe and clean space for play parties on the playa. All of our parties have an opening ceremony where we practice consent and boundaries, as well as a fun and interactive opportunity to meet other guests. Our parties are at 3 PM and 11 PM daily.

name: Orphan Asylum
description:
Orphan Asylum is a hodgepodge crew of misfits who come together through careful planning, organization and a dash of straight anarchy to create a unique social experiment that has not been terrible yet so far.

We rely on the kindness of strangers, and making them not so strange (or stranger, depending) by the end of the burn, as well as providing sanctuary to strangers on playa in need of a desert home. We don't charge dues and are instead entirely donation-based from our past and current orphans.

Folks donate everything from money to org support to moral support to technical/skill support. Before the burn, we take in new camp members on an application-basis.

name: Orphan Endorphin
description: Orphan Endorphin: Folding Dimensions. We are everywhere at the exact same time. Be careful what portal you open because you can change the weather just by saying it within OE. Wake up and all is different.

name: Our Own Devices
description: Home base for Our Own Devices, a massive metal pop-up book unfolding from the playa. Swing by to talk about tall tales, engineering puzzles, and the fine art of using serious skills for deeply unserious things.

name: Owl and the Pussycat
description: We are a small but mighty group of folx whose camp is a safe, welcoming environment for all Burners. We not only value physical comfort as seen by our cozy lounge and dining space, but emotional comfort to promote connection, conversation and reflection with our fellow Burners. We also value a good time! Come by our quiet tea house where you can take pause and meditate. The Owl and the Pussycat is like a warm hug for your Burn.

name: Pacific
description: The underwater home of the mutant vehicle Pacific, Neptune's Chariot. The sea themed camp is welcome to campers to relax in our underwater shade and is here to host 2 dance parties on Tuesday and Thursday.

name: PALINKA LOUNGE
description: Palinka Lounge offers a welcoming respite for Burners new and old around the globe, we offer a comfortable environment for Burners to take a moment to relax, have a drink, introduce themselves, and learn about what it means to be a burner (or learn about Hungarian burners) gaining from our camp-members Burning Man knowledge. We do this not only through sharing a drink, but also by engaging in activities together such as arts/craft, games or trampoline.

name: pandemonium
description:
kinky or jus curious ? either way we have a home for you at camp pandemonium. Where chaos becomes joy, and pain is pleasure.
Home of the Flaming Heart. come enjoy some of our guided kink classes in rope, flogging /impact, and fireplay. enjoy our 2 story pyramid and grand views above the dust . swing is our lyra open 24/7. dance w djs on our intimate dance floor. meet old friends and make new ones. pandemonium is what you make it ...come explore

name: Pandora's Lounge & Fix-it Shoppe
description:
Our camp keeps our fellow Burners biking: our repair shop offers education, tools and parts, for bike repair. Actually we'll help you repair just about anything, but bikes are our specialty. 
Bike repair is our specialty, we will teach you to do your repair. We are open 24 hrs a day with a self service shop area with tools.

name: Paper Cranes
description: At our camp, we strive to create a home on the playa - a place where our campers feel just as excited to return after a long day as they are to dive into our interactive events. We keep it simple but meaningful: serving up PB&Js, letting our DJs set the vibe, and coming together each night for a family meal you won't want to miss. At the heart of our tradition, we invite visiting burners to write their wishes on paper cranes, which we bring to the Temple - a ritual that embodies the spirit of our community.

name: Paralunatics
description: Art Support Camp for Hahalua. Please come visit!

name: Parley
description:
Parley is your dedicated conversation camp. Come "Parley" with us during our daily facilitated events or drop in during the day for adhoc conversations on your topic of your choice. 

Our mission is to facilitate meaningful conversations and bridge gaps between people who might be different from one another. The topics and framing are done in a way that everyone can have an opinion and a voice. During the Parley, ideas and thoughts shall be shared, rapport shall be built and new friends made.

name: Parliament Art Crew
description: We are an Art Support Camp dedicated to bringing large-scale, immersive installations to life for the delight and inspiration of our community. Over the years, we've proudly supported projects such as COQUÍ, Feed Your Head (Man Base), Atabey's Treasure, MÚCARO, Got Framed, and Pitirre - each one creating meaningful, shared experiences on the playa.

name: Patsy's Hangout
description: Patsy's Hangout is a fabulous lounge in the gayborhood where you can connect with old friends and make new ones while enjoying refreshing beverages. Enjoy high-energy tunes, good company and a comfortable space all day, every day. Stop by for our daily recurring activities including: Patsy's Classical Morning Brew: Serving coffee and tea with classical chill music every morning and Patsy's Bar: Serving cold beverages, and lots of ice, every day. Participate in our daily special events including Patsy's Closet on Monday and Patsy's Nail Salon and bad wine tasting on Tuesday. And, our dueling pianos (well keyboards actually) are back and will be performing their very popular all-requests sing along, and groove along happy hour shows Tuesday Wednesday and Thursday. Remember: You're Fabulous!

name: Penny Smashing Point
description:
Bring your dusty body to our camp,
Smash a penny like a champ.
Add a chain, a clip, a hook,
Wear your keepsake on the playa—take a look.
Paint your body, be the art,
Leave with magic you helped start..

name: People of Color Camp
description:
Bringing COLOR to the playa since 2014!
The People of Color Camp is what happens when The Muppet Show gets put in the same telepod as an episode of The Fresh Prince of Bel Air, MTV's The Real World and a debate at the United Nations.
We provide opportunity for BIPOC Burners to not only learn about and experience Burning Man, but make it our home. We bring the diversity of our cultures to the playa through events, workshops and simply our presence. We bring our music, our soul, our rhythm, our culture - Unapologetically!
We welcome all people of all backgrounds. Stop by! Add some color to your burn! It's always love! :)

name: People's Art Congress
description: The People's Art Congress is an open salon of art, ideas, and unexpected conversations on the playa. Wander in for shade, interactive art, and workshops exploring everything from neuroscience and philosophy to creative expression and community connection. Our camp regularly hosts art gatherings, movement sessions, and evening happenings that invite participation and curiosity. Out front you may find our "take one, leave one" treasure chest filled with small gifts and surprises for passersby. Stop in, share an idea, make something new, or simply enjoy a moment of connection.

name: Pepperland
description:
Pepperland is your Playa home for the newbie and the veteran.
We are a mellow camp with a Beatles vibe that will send you on a Magical Mystery Tour.
We have a lot of workshops we do in camp, so many to choose from! You can also just stop by and relax in the Octopus's Garden and chill out!

name: Petaled Portal
description: We are an Art Support Camp for Petaled Portal, a stained glass mosaic on playa.

name: Phantasmagoria Camp
description: Escape to our 3-story temple with breathtaking views , sipping on our signature cocktails crafted with love. Unwind in our shady oasis, designed to rejuvenate your body and soul on hot desert days. Join us for sunset weddings every day, and groove to our daily music program featuring a unique sound system —. Come recharge and find your vibe with us!

name: PhoCureBurn
description: PhoCureBurn is a Vietnamese-inspired café serving comfort food to the citizens of Black Rock City. We believe food has the power to bring people together and foster a sense of community. Our goal is to create a welcoming space where burners can connect, share stories, and form lasting memories—whether over an iced (!!) coffee or a steaming bowl of pho.

name: Phonic Bloom
description: Join us to experience a sound-reactive light show. Sing, play instruments, or just relax and enjoy a synesthesia-inspired experience in a relaxing and intimate environment.

name: Pickle Joint
description:
Downtown Black Rock City's favorite magical little hole in the wall. Serving our world famous Pickle-Tini Cocktail since? errp? too long.
Let's say well over a decade. Always a sumptuous groove on our dance floor?.or maybe a Led Zeppelin Kazoo orchestra.

name: PickleBack Mountain
description: Come by and enjoy our homemade Pickle Back Juice at our Pickle Back Bar. Come through our Saloon Doors in Space, mosey on up to bar, throw down a Pickle Back! Then, for the daring, jump on Gherkin our famous Bucking Pickle for the buck of your life!

name: Pickleback Oasis
description: Take a break from the hot sun and stop in for a cold Pickleback. Relax and meet new friends under our shade structure.

name: Pilov's House
description: The private location of world famous Pilov. After many years on the playa, Pilov has decided to build a spectacular house on some of the finest dirt in the land.

name: Pinhole Project
description: Come create large format pinhole photography to capture art installations and the community in the desert! We have built a darkroom every burn since 1999. We host art-making workshops every morning. We take the workshop on an art tour using old-school pinhole cameras loaded with photographic paper. This allows participants to slow down, observe their surroundings more closely, and truly immerse themselves in the process of capturing images. Plus, the unique aesthetic of pinhole photography adds a distinctive charm to the photographs, making them truly special mementos of the experience.

name: Pink Heart
description:
Pink Heart welcomes all Burners with open arms and open hearts! Whether you're seeking refreshment, connection, or a moment of reflection, our camp is here to nourish your body, mind, and spirit. Rehydrate with ice-cold water, indulge in our beloved vegan coconut ice cream (served Tuesday and Wednesday from 1—4 PM), or unwind with soothing buffer massages at our Vibration Station.

Find your way home through our iconic Pink Heart Arch Beacon, or rest in our lush pink cocoon of shade, complete with soft fur couches and welcoming smiles. Share your journey, process your transformation, or simply bask in the beauty of Black Rock City from our vibrant lounge. This is your space to pause, connect, and be seen.

name: Pink Lightning
description: Pink Lightning is the home of the Burning Man Ultramarathon, and all things running at Burning Man: the 5k, the beer mile, the naked mile, easy mile, and more! Come to run an event or support an event. We also love all things PINK!

name: Pink Mammoth
description: We create an inclusive environment of love, compassion, connection, and self expression through dance, both on and off the playa.

name: Pink Ponies
description: Pink Ponies is a diverse collection of kind and welcoming queer campers. We curate and host events and workshops that celebrate queer joy. We pride ourselves on being a great place for all campers to meet and mingle the first Sunday night at our Queeer Homecoming. We also offer daily workshops on a variety of topics close to our community's heart. We celebrate randomness, and anything goes at this weirdly joyful camp. Come build relationships with us that will last a lifetime.

name: Pink Squirrel
description: Ever catch yourself daydreaming about playing table tennis, diving into a ball-pit, belly-flopping onto a trampoline packed with giant pink plushies, casually shredding on the drums, hunting for acorns like it's a competitive sport, napping like a zen jedi, dropping beats as DJ Nuts, and sipping pink cocktails at a squirrel-themed tiki bar, all the while absolutely everything around you is unapologetically PINK? Yeah, we thought so. Welcome to The Pink Squirrel, where you can finally do ALL the things. Kid friendly, squirrel approved.

name: Pinky Swears
description: We are the art support camp for Looking Up Arts. We design and fabricate art in San Francisco, CA. Our camp is open to teaching and mentoring art fabrication skills, and we accept new members through late July, depending on space.

name: Pirate Camp
description: Pirate Camp is a diverse group of experienced burners providing Black Rock City with the finest frozen alcoholic refreshments. Are you too hot and parched to go on? Looking to make new friends? Stop by any afternoon from 1-4pm and hoist a mug with the Pirates. Margarita, Mai Tai, Daiquiri or Pina Colada.

name: Placement HQ
description: Placement HQ is the official location of the Placement office on playa. We are at Esplanade & 5:45 - stop by to get in touch with your placers, to check in for a PEERS shift, or just to say hi!

name: planet wood collective
description:
Campers: designers, architects, and engineers in the built Environment.

Focus on the development of low-carbon infrastructure and living in Black Rock City. Give back to the community by sharing knowledge from yearly experimentation and iterations.

name: Planned Playahood
description: We offer "second aid" services including contraceptives, pregnancy tests, and hygiene products and a Menstruation Station to help you stock up on your needs. Pay homage to Our Lady of the Shaven Beaver, where you can experience your playa rebirth. climb our tower or use the couch swing, get a faux-scription from our camp 'doctors' for whatever ails you, and visit The Museum of Dildonts (items you don't want to put in your body). We have it all to Un-Fuck your Burn!

name: PLAYA 54
description:
We are a Dance Theme Camp located in the Tokyo sector playing the best Progressive & Melodic Techno. Come help build magical chaos with our new interactive art!
LET'S DANCE in the Dust Together!!

name: Playa Agora
description: A vibrant space of connection, curiosity, and community. We host a full week of interactive workshops, coffee, and sangria, designed to spark conversation, inspire creativity, and bring people together. Come learn, share, and laugh with us as we co-create something meaningful at Burning Man 2026.

name: Playa Alterations
description: Playa Alterations is your one-stop shop for chopping, cropping, bedazzling, sprucing, or painting up your favorite duds! We have shade, sewing supplies, outfit ideas, and tunes to carry you through your week.

name: Playa Art Park Support
description: A camp to support the Playa Art Park, a place to enjoy smaller art in a cozy setting.

name: Playa Choir
description: Playa Choir is a performance art piece open to all participants. Come and join us for a rowdy, spirit-lifting musical experience! Radical Inclusion, no audition required! Singers of all skill levels, ages and persuasions are welcome! Also seeking musicians, dancers and aerialists. Rehearsals are Tuesday through Saturday 10:30 a.m. to 1:00 pm. Join us on the risers or just come to listen. Full performances are on Sunday: Sunrise at the Temple and 11:00am in the Playa Choir Dome. An additional collaboration performance with the Black Rock Philharmonic tbd. Performances are a non-denominational, non-religious, spiritual, moving experience. More information and music can be obtained in advance at our website Playachoir.com.

name: Playa Circuit Boogie
description: Here at Playa Circuit Boogie we use circuits and science to spark ideas and bring strangers together, all while jamming out to groovy tunes and enjoying a cold beverage from our bar. Come learn the basics of soldering and circuit building; ride away with your very own light-up pendant and the skills to make an even better one next year. And bring us your broken electronics during repair hours, we'll try our best to get them working.

name: Playa Delicacies Cooking School
description: Playa Delicacies cooking school is an interactive learning experience

name: Playa Glass
description: Would you like to make jewelry from the playa dust? Grab a pair of welding goggles and harness the energy of the sun to melt the playa into glass. We provide the instructions, tools, and supplies, you cast your artistic aspirations into glass.

name: Playa Info/VRT
description:
Look for the Blue "I" in the sky near center camp!
Providing Oracles, Digital Services, Lost and Found, ASL, Health Permits and BRC Lockout and Towing Services.
Open 9am-6pm daily with limited services 8 am-11am on Sept. 2

name: Playa Jazz Cafe
description:
A celebration of Jazz Music featuring nightly concerts and jam sessions, 
 daytime educational workshops, and a lively bar serving coffee and cocktails.

name: Playa Peace Project
description: Playa Peace Project is a global movement of artists, dreamers, and doers — united by music, generosity, and the spirit of adventure. We're a theme camp and international sound collective that brings music, art, and magic to the playa and beyond. We support emerging artists and bring them to Burning Man for the first time. We are San Francisco based.

name: Playa Piano Bar and Lounge
description:
Playa Piano Bar and Lounge will be featuring live collaborative musical performance along with refreshing beverages every afternoon except Friday and Saturday. Come by Tuesday for Tutu Tuesday Tacos and Tutus from 12-2pm
Come by SaturdayFor Pizza Pockets and Music from 12-2
Cocoa and music at sunset Monday to Friday at 8 PM

name: Playa Pinups and Fine Art Fatales
description: We are a camp consisting of Photographers, Models, Muscians and Artists dedicated to capturing the beauty and diversity of the citizens of Black Rock City, while offering an opportunity to enhance personal expression through the creation of several types of art.

name: Playacuda
description: Home base for Playacuda, a mutant vehicle roaming the playa in search of connection and good energy. We offer a laid-back spot to pause, cool down, and meet fellow travelers. No schedule, no pressure, just spontaneous moments and open invitations. Swing by and you might end up on your next adventure.

name: PlayaDough
description: Are you a burner hungry in body and in spirit? PlayaDough will treat you to delicious dumplings, vodka and unsafe doses of eastern european nihilism.

name: PlayAground
description: We are playground with radical swings, shade, lounge, bar, games, music & art.

name: PLAYGROUND
description: Playground is a dynamic oasis set in the heart of Black Rock City, designed to draw in the curious and reward the adventurous. Alive with immersive sound, striking visuals, and a continuous flow of music, it offers a space where participants can pause, connect, and engage. From fire-lit nights to rhythm-filled days, Playground blends energy, artistry, and atmosphere into a compelling destination on the Playa.

name: Pleasant Camp
description: A pleasant place to be.

name: plop!
description:
Welcome to our wild and whimsical dancefloor in the shade, where the vibes are as sexy as they are hilarious! Picture a vibrant space filled with young, adventurous souls ready to unleash their inner party animal. plop! is a playground of creativity, featuring DJs spinning the hottest house & techno beats that will keep you dancing until the sun goes down.

Costumes are a must here - think playful, provocative, and downright outrageous! Whether you're rocking pasties, neon tutus, or something kinkier, you'll fit right in. Join us for one of our daytime dance parties or evening happyhours filled with laughter, freedom, and a sprinkle of mischief. This is the place to let loose, connect with like-minded individuals, and make memories you won't remember.

name: PlovKraft
description: We cook delicious PLOV and serve it together with crazy music on the UFO stage!

name: PLUR Pups
description: Human Pup Play (no bio-pups involved!) is a role playing activity that brings play, immediacy, and unconditional affection back to adult life. It came from queer kink culture, but any adult can join! Get on all fours, bark at your friends, play fetch, wag your tail, or just take a nap in a blissful dogpile. The PLUR Pups doghouse is your headquarters for pup culture on the playa. Drop by to learn about pup headspace, (no experience required!), interact in dog mode with other pups at a mosh, or join a skill share.

name: PO9
description: We connect you with the world, we are the original way to get USPS mail to the playa, as we have been for decades. We do: USPS to the Playa, Playa to any (international) address with a unique artistic postmark! (US postage encouraged/required), and friendly (and not-so-friendly) posties: stand in line, and fill out your form... in triplicate... with crayon.

name: PolyParadise
description: PolyParadise has been influencing the Hearts & Minds and Washing the Bodies of Playa Citizens from '2:00 - 10:00' since 1999 celebrating 28 years in BRC in 2026. Polyamory involves openness to multiple loving relationships, with honesty among all partners. We welcome ALL Poly & Poly Friendly folks to camp within our borders. PolyParadise 2026 welcomes the Twisted Swan | Temple of Bacchus as part of your Playa Experience. PolyParadise is NOT a Swinger Camp. Being Poly or Practicing Poly is NOT a requirement for camping with us, but being OPEN MINDED about other people's lifestyle choices IS!!

name: Pookah Lounge/SNAFUBAR
description:
Pookah Lounge is a legendary dusty Burner hideaway glowing with Christmas lights, hookah, art, music, and excellent humans. Thrills and chills await but the best part is YOU. Come in and stay awhile.

SNAFUBAR (the Better Beverage Bar) is an irreverent MASH-style camo-netted field bar for dusty wanderers in need of hydration and questionable advice. Stay in school - we'll mix you the best drinks on the playa.

name: PopoVille
description: PopoVille is your local watering hole with an artisitc twist please come enjoy our excellent "M" cocktails and enjoy chilling out in our grafitti zone

name: Pops and Drops
description: Join us in our welcoming 20x30 lounge tent for cool relief and good vibes. We gift refreshing frozen popsicles while live DJs spin rotating sets throughout the day. Relax on grass turf and Moroccan rugs, sink into comfy seating, dance, chat, or just unwind in our shaded, cozy space. Open afternoons Monday through Thursday - all burners welcome to linger and enjoy. We prioritize radical inclusion, accessibility, and community for everyone.

name: Popsicle Bahrrr
description:
Ahoy matey! Welcome to Popsicle Bahrrr, a pirate- and beach-themed camp where sun-weary seafarers gather for friendly parley over ice-cold popsicles.

Drawn in by the beacon of our lighthouse and music from DJNEW, wanderers can find respite from the desert heat beneath our shade canopy and relax in the Popsicle Bahrrr lounge. Inside, guests can unwind on inflatable seating while enjoying or playing our colorful, popsicle-themed piano.

Being the generous pirates that we arRrrre, we share refreshing popsicle booty with visitors daily from 2?5 PM, Monday through Saturday. Popsicle Bahrrr is a cheerful gathering place for mariners, mermaids, and hearties of all ages. Ahoy!

name: Potty Project
description: Home of the Potty Project a group of volunteers helping teach LNT at the potties and make the potties fun! We offer volunteer shifts M-F of the event so stop in to sign-up!

name: Powder Palace
description: Bringing a winter chill to the Playa and looking forward to sharing some of our winter delights. Come by for snowshoe races and our apres-ski dance party!

name: POWERHOUSE
description: PowerHouse is the on-Playa home of the Sunbelt Rental Power and Heavy Equipment service teams for Burning Man DPW and dozens of Theme Camps.

name: Practice Camp
description:
Practicing Burning Man in all the best ways! Come by for our daily Practices from arty to farty. Interact and make art with the truly unique Exquisite Dorks . Come see how practice makes camp!

Exquisite Dorks is a collaborative art piece that takes the surrealist game of "Exquisite Corpse" and makes it 1000 feet long. It will be possible for thousands of people to participate. Drawing materials will be provided and stools will be available for young and disabled persons. Come by any time day or night!

name: Prairie Kids
description: We are the Prairie Kids, The Mutant Vehicle Support camp for the Astral Plain.

name: Pranksters in the Pines
hometown: South Lake Tahoe / Reno / Las Vegas
description: Brought to you by the Merry Pranksters... A nice blend of art, life, and Laughter. Dont be a Dullard, come have some laughs.

name: Preservation Society
description: Preserving what has been lost. Our luscious green garden is your oasis in the desert. Our events refresh you with music and dance. Our bar serves potent potables with preserves from all the corners of the world from which our camp hails.

name: Pretty Pickle
description: A relaxed and welcoming outpost on the dusty road to nowhere. We have daily afternoon pickle service (Noon to 3 pm). Cold pickles and pickletini shots! We invite passersby to step under our shade, enjoy a refreshing treat, and ride our disco pickle swing! In-the-know visitors may inquire about our playa-famous pickle warmers!

name: Prismaticamp
description: Various artists coming together to offer LED knowledge, personal reflection experiences, dice games, & good vibes.

name: Pussy Avalanche
description: In spite of what degenerates might think on first read - Pussy Avalanche is all about cats. Like cats, games, books, or dorky references? Welcome home.

name: Pussy Day Spa
description: If there is one "must do" at Burning Man, it's a visit to the Pussy Day Spa. We offer a choice of refreshing body wash and pussy massage including happy ending. What's not to like? Pleasure and bliss awaits as we pamper and delight you. Your boundaries will be respected, your feedback / adjustments encouraged, and your wishes fulfilled. We guarantee it will be the best experience you will ever have at Burning Man, or anywhere else. Open daily from 1 to 5 pm, we take reservations (recommended) as well as walk-ins.

name: Putt Putt Palace
