description: Putt Putt Palace hosts a, 24/7, glow in the dark miniature golf corse and holds daily tournaments. Come stop by for our early am coffee bar and our open every afternoon Putt Putt Bar where we serve both spirits and non-alcoholic beverages.

name: Quarks and Recreation
description: Games for Progress! Play! Scientists vs. Valkyries! Discover! Nuclear Fusion Bocce-Golf! Learn! The modern wonders of the Atomic Age! Your local Quarks and Recreation department invites you to experience our comprehensive catalog of nuclear-inspired games, physics trivia, labyrinthian bureaucracy, and definitely-not-radioactive "drinks" at the elusive h-bar. (Void where the strong nuclear force is inhibited; the electromagnetic force may apply).

name: Queertirement
description: Queer Retirement Community - Hang with the queer playa elders, drink lemonade, bring magic, love, and gifts and receive great wisdom.

name: Rabbit Hole
description: It's whatever you want it to be!

name: Raccoons
hometown: Vilnius, San Mateo, Kaunas, Madrid, Kyiv, L.A.
description:
Well, as the loveliest trash pandas, we firmly believe that sustainability, alternative energy sources, as well as the 4Rs (Reuse, Reduce, Rethink, Recycle) are crucial in our daily human (and raccoon) lives.
A raccoon can be crafty and resourceful, responsible and playful, but above all?curious and friendly.

name: Raditude
description: A collective of Lucid & Light lucky individuals serving up Rad-Attitude Adjustments every DAWN & DUSK with a themed streetside Fireplace Art Piece and an Axis Mundi Reali-Tea Lounge; shoe-free shade and more for all those building, volunteering, and interacting within Black Rock City!

name: Ragnarokk
description: Ragnarokk is the End and the Beginning. It tells a story where destruction is necessary for creation to flourish. It is rebirth, it is recovery, it is rejuvenation, it is a renaissance, it is renewal, restoration, and resurrection. It is what we are experiencing in our lives right now. It is Burning Man. And now, it is us. We are camp Ragnarokk!

name: Ranger Headquarters
description: Black Rock Ranger Headquarters ? The center of Black Rock Ranger Operations. Located on the Esplanade at 6:35.

name: Ranger Outpost Berlin
description:
Ranger Outpost Berlin - The Black Rock Ranger Station in the 3:00 sector where participants in need of assistance can
seek out the help of a friendly Black Rock Ranger. Located at 3:00 and C.

name: Ranger Outpost Tokyo
description: Ranger Outpost Tokyo - the Black Rock Ranger station in the 9:00 sector where participants in need of assistance can seek out the help from the Black Rock Rangers. Located at the corner of 9:00 and C.

name: Ray's Fix It
description: Break something? We'll try to fix it! No promises, other than you'll leave with something and we'll have a good time trying. Power tools and expertise available Office Hours, otherwise 24/7 DIY with hand tools, work space, and plenty of materials to MacGyver your issue. Bikes are DIY only, nor do we have mutant vehicle help, though we'll try to point you in the right direction. We are a small mom and pop shop, so for generators and RV help etc., we'll direct you to those specialty camps.

name: Read Write Draw Camp
description: Family friendly chill space where you can read, write, and draw.

name: Ready Playa One
description: A world that we dream up, believe in, and step curiously into, together in Black Rock City. Each day is an adventure to expand our minds, deepen human connection, and creatively challenge the status quo's of the world that we believe in changing.

name: Rebel Camp
description: ESD Support Camp

name: Recycle Camp
description: CRUSH IT w/the Recyclenauts at Recycle Camp. Find us at our new location, 5:35 and just off the Esplanade. Bring us your mesh bags full of empty aluminum cans & ride the amazing bicycle powered Crushing Machine - The Crushinator! (plz no tin/steel/glass/plastic/trash)

name: Red Nose District
description: Red Nose District (RND) has been in existence, in one form or another since 1998. In 2013, we resolved to keep our hearts, minds, and noses RED from now until the end of time! RND has roots and participants in LA, SF, Santa Fe, NYC, Las Vegas, Pacific NW, Canada, Israel, France, & various states & countries around the world. Our members are involved in (or are lovers of) the circus arts, & work to bring our skills & talents to the playa in forms that allow for immersive & participatory experiences for citizens of Black Rock City. Notable past projects/activities include: High Chair Stilt Bar, PedalBump, Muse, Fire Wire, Wheel of Fortune, Zenobia Blanca stilt limo, Mega Mega, Bounce Back, stilt lessons, 30' swings, & circus variety shows of all forms! Come find us on the playa!

name: Red Rooster Ranch
description: The Red Rooster Ranch art car celebrates the fun and frivolity of Nevada's tawdry past and present association with saloons and Cat Houses. Come join us for a ride and enjoy a libation in our tiny saloon!

name: Redhanded
description: Has your period caught you red-handed? We've got your back! Stop by our elegant Victorian period lounge for refreshing drinks (N/A options available), and precious period supplies while enjoying fun live events. Got dust in curious places? We'll help you freshen up sustainably. Need extra care? We offer support when you're bleeding or just having a tough day. Oh, and we've got pee funnels, because nothing feels quite as empowering as peeing standing up like a boss. Come sip, vent, and refresh with us at Redhanded!

name: RedNeck Regal Theatre
description: Total white trash movie nights; complete with our best white sheet hanging for a screen. BYOLC (Bring Your Own Lawn Chair) or blanket. What will be showing? WHO KNOWS? Maybe it's a musical night? Maybe it's a black and white version of Creature from the Black Lagoon? Maybe its cartoons! We make no promises. All we promise is that it's an outdoor community movie screening at its best! If the alcohol kicks in, we may even pass around a microphone and do a BMST3K! Come join us!

name: ReEntry Station
description:
A calm, low stimulation space designed for participants returning from deep playa. As you make your way back into the city, step into a shaded environment offering cold water, electrolytes, and a place to pause and reset.

We provide a soft landing from the intensity of the playa. No loud music, no pressure, just a welcoming space to reorient, cool down, and reconnect before continuing your journey.

Whether you need hydration, a moment of stillness, or simple human connection, Reentry Station is here as a quiet checkpoint between the vastness of the playa and the rhythm of the city.

name: Religious As Fuck
description: A mix of Christian clergy, lay people and friends who want to bring a wide open welcome to BRC citizens, as they wish. Our mission is to offer affirmation, blessing, and spiritual support to Burner folx through Christian sacraments, ritual, prayer and conversation. We provide decomodified and non-judgy Christian spiritual practice and hospitality.

name: Renewables For Artists RAT HQ
description: Provides information and resources to artists and camps to support on-playa solar renewable power installations. Ditch the generator, rely on the sun! It is easy, and we are here to help. Visit us on playa to learn more about playa solar solutions, from tiny projects to the Temple. Enjoy a refreshing freezy pop or cup of tea while you rest in our shady lounge. Read up on best practices and solar safety. Charge your batteries. Need some solar panels for use on playa? Come and get them from the Solar Donation Station. Contact a RAT if you need solar support for your art installation. 100% solar = playa resilience! Dust yer panels people!

name: Reno Housewives
description: Costuming BRC since 1998. Looking for the perfect outfit for that party? ASK US -- From frumpy to fabulous, we have you covered.

name: Resonance
description:
An art support camp for the Resonance Tree  which is a large-scale immersive art installation made entirely of bamboo, designed and built by Resonance Studio. It responds to sun, shadow, sound, and movement. Rising seven meters above the playa, the Tree invites people to enter through woven roots, climb through the trunk, rest in canopy nets, and gather beneath a living canopy of shadow and sound.

By day, its canopy filters the desert sun. By night, the trunk glows from within, and hundreds of solar bamboo lights hung from the branches shift with the wind, casting shadows across the cracked playa.

name: Retrofrolic
description:
An adult destination offering multiple features located within the 7:30 Red Light District.
— A 1800 sq ft supervised public dungeon playspace 
— A 2000 sq ft public shade porch.
— A suspension point between our twin-towers for flying pole, Lyra, yoga silks and Shibari demos.
— Morning coffee with Mayor Angus
— Daily class to explore your sensual, bondage, and sexual desires. 
— Learn about sane and safe dungeon play at our daily BDSM 101 orientation classes.. 
— Get those heretofore unanswered question about kink answered! 
— No shame, no blame and no regrets! 
— All staff have completed consent classes by the B.E.D. organization.

name: Reverbia
description:
An All Live Music Camp with 4 stages, including: The Cosmic Dome (LED interactive) The Jam and Teahouse, The Phoenix Rising Shade Stage, and Reverbia Main Stage. 
Reverbia features Daily: Calm Inside (breathe, Stretch) ,Live Music Yoga in the Morning...Dance Workshops, Open Mic/ Songwriter Showcase, Concerts in the Shade, Reverbia Classical Music Sunsets and Live Nights, The Reverbia Childrens' Hour, and Late Night Mini Radiance Dome, and Jam and Teahouse. Reverbia also features Dance Performances, including the Production Tommorow, Today. Our Tribute to Lost Musicians honors musicians who passed away the previous year. And the 50th Anniversary of Stevie Wonder's Songs in the Key of Life. Here with guest artist performances.

name: rEVOLUTION
description: A camp of old and new friends. We believe that through evolution, we can create a revolution. We reserve the right to change, to be agents of change and to commit to the Burning Man principles each time we return after our revolution around the sun. We offer food, beverages, healing through Gamma Breath Work, opportunities to communicate with anyone and fun through dance. West Coast Swing and Martinis. Hot dogs, Chili Cheese Dogs, Veggie Dogs, and Gin & Tonic and flavored water. We feed your body, soul and sense of freedom. There are no requirements to visit us, only the ability to participate, act on immediacy and be open to both revolution and evolution. Come join us to eat, dance, breath and create!

name: RhythmWave
description: Where the dust meets the soul. We provide a 2,000-square-foot barefoot sanctuary dedicated to the art of Conscious Dance. Utilizing a sprung bamboo floor beneath a cooling canopy, we host daily facilitated 'Waves' that invite participants to shed their playa personas and dance their inner truth. This is not a place to be seen; it is a place to be felt. We offer the tools to move through what is stuck, find your center, and return to the city more embodied and alive.

name: RIPPERS ROW
hometown: Austin, New York, Los Angeles, Dallas, Miami
description: A high-energy music and dance theme camp bringing the heat from sundown to sunrise. Based out of Austin, TX, we host DJs and artists from around the world on a proper dance floor built for one thing: getting loose with strangers who are about to become your people. Each event is a full production experience with sound and lights worthy of the playa. Whether you stumble in deep in the night or catch the sun cracking over the mountains at one of our morning sets, Rippers Row will be ready for you. Home of the mythical GatorWalrus. Long May They Reign!

name: RIPPLE
description: The Ripple Effect reflects on the very nature of affecting change: how one small stone tossed into a body of water causes a ripple effect with an almost never-ending forward motion. Camp Ripple is all about tossing those positive stones to impact your own life and those of others one small metaphorical pebble at a time!

name: Roadside Distraction
description: Roll up for a hub of spectacular sidetracks and childlike wonder! With renowned attractions in our Chamber of Wonders, including the soul-searching experience of Burning Man's Darkest Room, fun spins on classic carnival games, and a whimsical Gift Shop, there's something for everyone at Roadside Distraction.

name: Roasted Breauxs & Coffee Heauxs
description: Roasted Breauxs & Coffee Heauxs Coffee Roasting on the Playa & serving pour over coffee in BRC since 2011. We serve single origin coffee Mon/Wed/Fri 11-2PM We will focus on reducing our carbon footprint in BRC

name: ROCA
description: Make a Rock. Take a Rock. Leave Your Mark.

name: Rocket 'n Roll
description: Rocket 'n Roll mutant vehicle support camp

name: Rogue Nation (SEAWeed)
description: Ever wonder what happens when light listens? Light Echoes is an interactive LED wall that responds to your movement, sound, and presence, transforming you into a living paintbrush. Stop by during the day for a shady lounge to rest your dusty bones, or come back after dark to see the wall come alive. Join one of our workshops to create your own digital art and add it to the wall's growing collection. By the end of the week, Light Echoes becomes a collaborative gallery built by the citizens of Black Rock City.

name: Rooftop Frose
description: A view at sunset with a cool refreshing drink for relaxed burners

name: Rootist Lounge
description:
#RootistLounge & #SirensCove are camps based on the joy of #energy, the beauty of #spiritual connection with self, and others. It's a gathering of open-minded and like-minded individuals where friendships surround you. 
We are always creating new art, supporting art, art cars, and artists. If you would like to co-create with us, please email us! With a major focus on energy work, healing sound vibrational therapy, #yoga, #workshops, #hughealing, #ArtCars -Art car support, Art project support, and so much more. We are constantly striving to go above and beyond to create a truly magical experience for our participants. We put in our all, dedicating endless hours of our time to creating a beautiful place where everyone can gather and celebrate life through yoga, music, and #community.

name: Rootpile
description: An established Theme Camp at Burning Man whose mission is to bring live Bluegrass music, Bluegrass musical instrument instruction, and Southern food and culture to the burns that we attend. We offer live pro-Bluegrass music most nights of Burn week. We are open to new members who embrace our mission and culture.

name: Royal Honey
description: Art is the stored honey of the human soul, gathered on wings of inspiration and transformed into royal jelly by the contributions of many. Royal Honey is a camp with all types of bees that pollinate Playa with art, music, hugs, and love. Connect in our Canopy of Blooms, enjoy sweet nectar from our Pollination Station Bar, lose yourself in our Rabbit Hole Lounge, and waggle your booty on the Buzzpoint Dancefloor.

name: Rubber Armstrong
description: For everything bad, Mezcal, for everything good as well, and if it still does not help, one and a half litres. We are a diverse solar-powered camp made up of members predominantly Aussie but from all over the world, all sharing a love of Mezcal. Join us for a delicious Mezzie Margie from midday to 17:00.

name: Rum Amok
description: Throughout the week, our shade structure transforms into a tropical bar with a communal open-air studio. We provide the drinks, the brushes and the pigment, you provide the inspiration and the playa magic. Whether you're a master painter or just looking to make a mess, your strokes will contribute to our collective camp mural.

name: Rumpus
description: Morning cereal, crafts and remedies, fun and games, non-electronic beats, and a chill bar.

name: Rustic WerQ Ranch
description: A camp full of folx who support all artists that make the many art projects happen on playa. Drop by for a whiskey or a water between 730-930p.

name: SAHARAA CAMP
description:
Trance. Tradition. Transformation.
Ancestral echoes rising,
From the Atlas to the Playa.

name: Saints and Sinners
description: Friendly easy-going camp. Kid- and family-friendly button-making and temporary tattoos most mornings. Afternoons offer opportunity to officially divorce an unwanted playa name. Afternoons also offer various adult oriented activities with topics including Shibari rope suspension to presentations on increasing enjoyment of fellatio for both givers and receivers. Someone friendly is hanging out in our street-side shade structure most all the time. Stop in and say "hi!"

name: Sake To Me
description: Sake To Me - your friendly playa servers of various chilled and flavored sake. There's plenty of sake and chill in our shaded, cushion-ish area, plus giant Jenga and other games for all!

name: Sakenoma
description: High class lounge with bowling (leave your pedo billionaires at home). Providing a 4 star SAKE experience

name: Salty Jacks
description: Your local deep dive bar and your safe-port in the storm, open daily. A nautical disco grotto with salty libations and an eclectic fleet of DJs.

name: San Marco Square
description: A camp of creators and community, named after Venice's most famous public square, this is the kind of place you stumble into and then forget to leave. Come up to the Sky Bar, a fully built out cocktail lounge that hydraulically rises 15 to 20 feet above the playa, for a gifted drink and a view of Black Rock City that does not exist anywhere else. On the ground, a sprawling shaded plaza hosts daily DJ sets, aerial silks performances, and a community pole that is always open and always going. Bring your whole self, leave your wallet at home.

name: Scorpion Walks
description: Extraordinary Mechanical Vehicle Powered by Turbine Engine and walking on legs

name: Scotch & Hop
description: Oh My Fur & Whiskers! You're late! You're late, for a very important date! Come follow the White Rabbit into our garden, where you can journey down a whimsical Acculturation Path with glowing & mesmerizing flowers & sparkly things. See where the rabbit has gone, Down The Rabbits Hole, to get some enlightenment and inspiration for your life! Enjoy our Tea Party, day or night, where you may encounter some personalities like Queen Elizabeth, Mr. T, Ice-T, or some Tea-Rex's! Who knows?! We offer restorative libations of all types during the day and Hot Toddies to warm you up on your nightly adventures.

name: Seashell Cartel
description: A tiny nautical syndicate in support of the PlayaBoot, a mutant vehicle shaped like a boot with a pineapple on top.  Come for the Boot, stay for the questionable maritime affiliations.

name: Second Rodeo
description:
Howdy, y'all!

Second Rodeo welcomes any and all participants to enjoy cheeky and fun rodeo-themed activities, offerings, and wild hoedowns! If it ain't a party you seek, we also specialize in providing self care amenities to those seeking respite.

Let us prove to you that this isn't our first rodeo! Come as you are, every one of y'all!

Yeeeeehaw!

name: Second Wind Pirate Cafe
description: We're open from 9 PM until we feel like it. It's a pirate-themed coffee bar serving strong black coffee. No milk, no sugar, maybe alcohol. Just bold coffee and a lot of laughs. Our pirate crew runs silly games and keeps the crowd entertained. Outside, two loud pirates with bullhorns heckle and lure people in. It's weird, playful, and a great late-night stop. Come grab a cup and join the chfunaos.

name: Secret Passage
description: Hosts Fluffy's Cafe of Games: 10am-10pm Mon-Sat. Infused waters, cotton candy, comfy seating, tabletop and interactive games. Hosted game show daily: Fluffy's Feud! No need to come with a Family for this Feud, We'll introduce you to a new family. Or, if you want to bring your crew, you can do that too! Buzz buzzers and win real prizes. Or just sit and chill. It's all good at Fluffy's Cafe of Games located at Secret Passage Camp.

name: Send Noods
description: Want to send a unique one of a kind NoodleGram? Get crafty and dive into our pool of noodles to make your masterpiece which we will hand deliver to your loved one in BRC. Limited time only, come join our team of couriers, and experience the joy of engaging in new connections! Let us give you a safe (to the third powa) space to radically express yourself and show you what immediacy is all about! If that's not your cup of tea then just join us in a hot steamy bowl of Noods in our stretchy yoga classes! If you're itchin for more, come bounce around on our tramps and have swing with a friend on our porch swings. Get sunlit making art with our giant fresnel lens which harnesses sunlight to burn a variety of mediums.

name: Serenity Now
description: An oasis in a world of dust. Serenity Now is one of the playa's oldest coffee shops, and for a good reason.

name: Servants of the Secret Fire
description: Been bringing dazzling LED and fire art to playa while hosting fire spinning jams and flow workshops since 2015. Come check out our library, dance to our DJ sets, or snuggle into the cuddle puddle beneath a glowing canopy of >14000 LEDs - look for the burgundy/red/orange/yellow dome!

name: Sha La La
description: We are SHALALA, a fun inclusive camp with little pop up events daily including wellness and Bloody Mary mornings. Espresso martini lounge evenings and specialty cocktail happy hours.

name: Shake, Shake, Shake
description: Shake your tail feather as you enjoy an ice-cold, hand-shaken cocktails on a hot playa day. Voted "the best damn cocktail bar on the Playa" by our friends and regulars!

name: Shamandome
description: Since 2008, Shamandome Camp has introduced the citizens of Black Rock City to Core Shamanism as described by Michael Harner and offered shamanic healing, reawakening burners to their rightful spiritual relationship with all nature. The sound of a single drum beating at 185 bpm puts you into an Altered State of Consciousness (ASC), allowing you to journey to the Lower World, where you can meet your Power Animal, get answers, heal yourself, and help other heal themselves. You can do this because you're human. It is your connection to Mother Earth.

name: Shangri-Lounge
description: Camp of amazing humans who support the Shangri-Lounge bicycle-drawn mobile martini bar. If you can find us in Deep Playa late at night, we'll serve you the finest cocktail you've ever had while you relax in intimate conversation with new friends under the stars.

name: SHANTI TOWN SOUND MOVEMENT
description: We strive to bring you the citizens of Black Rock City the most authentic experience in Reggae music and Sound System Culture. Delivering strictly Irie Vibes to Burning Man since day one!

name: Shanty Town
description: Tracked down the Up Nort Art Shanty out on the playa and ready to meet its resident troublemakers? Stop by our reception area to retrieve your commemorative postcard and learn more about our first large scale art installation. Meet the crew, explore the ecological inspiration behind the piece, and linger for connection, laughter, and a little desert mischief.

name: Sharkey's Bar and Lounge
description: Sharkey's Oasis: The unrivaled "Preferred Party Beyond the Porto-Potties, where Peni and Pagina frolic on the Pre-Playa Plaza Playground!" Our mission? To delight you with delectable libations, provide respite under our shady canopy, serenade you with tunes in the lounge, and bestow upon you exhilarating and daring drinking games! ???

name: Shenanigans
description: ICE COLD face masks! Find us when the sun is high and the heat is excessive every day. We will welcome you into our comfy chill space and put a cold mask straight from our ice packed cooler on your face. While the moisturizing ingredients soak into your skin, you're welcome to kick back and enjoy the occasional water spritz, fanning and cup of iced tea.

name: Shift the atmosphere
description:
Committed to spreading love and healing to the citizens of Black Rock City through guided meditation, genuine connection, emotional support and real
community. Please stop by for our spiritual painting workshops, interactive music offerings, emotional release ceremonies or just to stop by and join us for coffee and matcha.

name: Shiny's Keepers
description: Shinys' Home

name: Shitty Glitter
description:
A boutique Bed and Breakfast providing the most luxurious hospitality experience in Black Rock City. Stop by for a rest in the clean white linens of a freshly made canopy bed (changed daily) and be sure to chat with a camp concierge to get the most of your stay. Swing by The Parlor on Wednesday evening for our "Breakfast Taco Tuesday (For Dinner On Wednesday)" where we'll be serving breakfast tacos and dancing the night away with an incredible lineup. If you're in need of some relaxation, check out our in-house spa "SPAcate" on Friday where we'll be providing cold Tecate, face masks, massage chairs and other gadgetry to put you in the ultimate state of relaxation. 

Shitty Glitter 
"You're Welcome!"

name: Shitty Wood
description: We (sometimes) have wood. We burn. Established 2007.

name: Short Bus Coffee Camp
description: Proudly serving only the finest Hawaiian coffees and organic accompaniments! Open Monday thru Saturday

name: Shoturanga
description: We believe true connectedness isn't found in perfect zen?it's forged in the shaky, sweaty, deeply questionable life choices that happen somewhere between chaturanga and "why is this still plank?" This is yoga for the rest of us: the ones with wandering minds, tight hamstrings, and a running internal monologue that would definitely get us kicked out of a silent retreat. And nothing says connectedness like being gently roasted while your arms tremble. Radical honesty; it's not criticism, if delivered with love. BTW, your hips are sagging, again. Come have some fun. Put on a goat onesie or take a shot. Share the struggle and the miserey. Challenge your balance and your dignity with friends.

name: Shuttlecocks
description: We're bringing Badminton back. Our playa court is open from 3pm into the evening from Monday to Thursday for pick up play. Come on by, grab a racquet and have a go! Don't miss our Tuesday BADminton cheeky happy hour at the Outer Lounge and Thursday evening tournament where you can challenge your fellow burners. Whether you're showing off your killer smash, whacking a few birdies, or relaxing with a refreshing Pimms cup and a cool misting, there's something for everyone.

name: Sian Kamp
description: A deep house and tea lounge. Miss deep house? Love tea? We are here for you ;) Pick a time and come say hi!

name: Side Boob
description: The "side boob" has long been disparaged as trashy. But why? Come join us at Side Boob and let your side boob out on the dance floor or cuddle up with one of our camp members and share a bit of your inner "side boob" ? a part of you that you don't always feel like you can share. We promise, no matter how trashy you think it is, we appreciate all parts of you. We are an eclectic, non-judgmental, life-loving, arms-and-hearts-wide-open group of sometimes trashy people who want to know you better, side boob and all.

name: Sidequest Sideshow
description: Clownin' around!

name: Signing Wanderers
description: Silence can be surprisingly loud when hands start talking. Visitors are invited to learn American Sign Language, play visual communication games, and experience Deaf culture in a lively and welcoming space. Try flirting without words, tell stories through signs, and discover how much can be said without speaking. Come join the fun and let your hands do the talking.

name: Silver City
description: While cooling down fellow burners with delicious soft serve ice cream, and ice cold drinks. Silver City will be supplying the beats that will have peoples feet stomping and body swaying.

name: Simian Akademy
description:
Looking for a truly unique interactive experience? Come visit the Olfactorium where our Mistress of Scent will concoct a custom perfume just for you, based on your unique, personal preferences.

So you've had a flat bike tire on the playa and like a good burner, you brought a spare to replace it. What to do with that old, limp inner-tube? Take it to "Sexy Treads" sustainability station and convert it into fabulous fetish wear! Tools, supplies, and examples (and more flat tubes) are on-hand to create a sexy, strappy harness!

Cranky from the heat? New best friend getting on your nerves already? You need to CHILL THE FUCK OUT AND COLOR! Relax and color your frustrations away. Choose your favorite, beautifully embellished swear word, or perhaps a picture of unicorns being total assholes!

name: Siren's Cove
description:
A veteran group of Burning Man friends that have gathered over the years. We have been on many adventures across the world to Rejoice in the wondrous village that is created annually in the high desert dry lake bed.

A bunch of Land lubbing Unicorn, Pony lovers and for Water lovers, Mermaids and Aquatic animals.

name: SIZE DOESN'T MATTER
description: We are a small camp but we pack a punch! You might stop by to grab a pair of sunglasses, and before you know it, you'll be running a 1/2 marathon with us!

name: Skinny Kitty Teahouse
description: The best big, fat, kitty-loving teahouse on the playa. Come get some shade, couches and tea, tea, tea 24/7. If you come at the right time you might catch a performance, a wandering piano player tickling the keys, some aerialists, fire spinners or just some fabulous conversation at the tea bar. (Also dead things)

name: Skrambles**!*
description: Born from chaos and tempered by confusion, now a respectable bar and lounge! Home of the best Bloody Mary on playa (accepting all challengers) and the shrine to Elijah Wood.

name: Skyhorse Carousel
description: An amusement ride and a piece of art which celebrates human culture and cosmology from ancient to modern times, creating an experience with aspects of both art and play. The horses of the carousel are painted like figures from myth and legend that relate to the sky, bearing, guiding, and embodying the Sun, Moon, and stars for mortal civilization down below. You might spy one of the fiery steeds from Apollo's solar chariot, the Jade Rabbit in the Moon, or even the Paiute Bighorn who became the North Star. So come take a ride through the sky yourself, and recapture some of the magic and simple delight of childhood.

name: SKYTING HQ
description: Carries a crew who have travelled from a parallel dimension to support radical inclusivity, roving risk reduction, ecological grief rituals, and sounds from the global majority underground.

name: SLAYER!
description: Come sip heavy metal themed craft cocktails while banging your head to the finest metal tunes on the playa at our Heavy Metal Happy Hour. Slinging drinks until 6:66PM.

name: Slow the Fuck Down
description: Art Department camp

name: Slutplatz
description: Your slutty local neighborhood beer garden and dance floor. Come escape the sun or dance in the rain. Sometime we even have beer. Prost!

name: Slutt Putt
description: 24-hour Mini-Golf... with a Naughty Twist! Get strokes off your game for committing various 'slutty' acts posted at each our whimsical holes! Swing by the clubhouse for an Arnold Palmer or John Daly during our bar hours, or just relax and enjoy the lounge any time day or night. Innuendo, retina-searing color, and genitalia-themed decor abound. Kindness and consent mandatory-- clothing and class optional.

name: Slutty Microphone
description: Provides an open mic stage that welcomes guest live music performances 24/7. Our stage includes a shared keyboard, drum kit, guitar, and a few other instruments. Bands are welcome!

name: SlöMóth
description:
SlöMóth is the birth of night striving toward the light ? a space where all participants become moths, both visually and philosophically. Inspired by post-modernist ideas, our camp blends curiosity, playfulness, and the irresistible pull toward brightness.

Spot our mischievous moths by their Fluffy Pink Coats, Wiggling Antennae or at least The Moustache. If we're not in camp, we're flocking toward distant lights or performing a ritual at our beloved installation ? The Moth.

name: Snack Shack
description: Home of The World Famous Black Rock City Hotdog Eating Contest. Floggin' and Doggin' since 2022

name: Snacklandia
description:
Snacklandia is a whimsical camp serving up surprise snack and drink pairings through our interactive Spinning Wheel.
Each spin brings a random delight?salty, sweet, spicy, or maybe a group hug. New this year is our Nail Art Station, where Burners can express their favorite Burning Man principles through creative, glitter-filled nail art. With daily tastings, playful workshops, and spontaneous fun, Snacklandia invites you to come curious and leave deliciously surprised.

name: Snark Bar
description: A Snarky experience awaits day or night, take a spin on the prize wheel if you dare! Our Dick n Ball pit awaits those that would prefer a cozy lightshow with a touch of nostalgia. Snark, shade, couches, a dome with hammocks and excellent drinks await dusty hot travelers of the day. WIFI Available - intermittently!

name: Snarket
description: The Snarket and Le Gentrifique, the snarkiest businesses in town. We got what you don't need with a cup of coffee on the side. Millions of dissatisfied customers can't be wrong. Come get a mouthful.

name: Snarky Marquee
description: Have something to say, stop by the Snarky Marquee and say it. Our snark masters will help you get the word out.

name: Snow Chance
description: Christmas in the desert. Come by and get in the festive mood! Ornament making, pics with Santa and Naughty or Nice drinks.

name: Snow Cone Zone
description: We provide Snow cones at Center Camp Monday thru Friday 12 to 3pm.

name: SnowKoanSolar
description: Snow Koan Solar serves snow cones daily, hot dogs very late at night now and then, and provides solar-based power for a number of camps in our HUB. We also have a public charging station where smaller items can be charged.

name: Snuggles
description: A cozy, consent-forward oasis designed for meaningful human connection. Step into a softly lit lounge where guided hug exchanges, peer massage sessions, partner stretch, and love letter writing invite you to slow down and connect. Enjoy curated mezcal tastings, sunrise cuddle meditation, and a midweek sound bath experience in a welcoming, multicultural space. We create structured yet playful containers where participation, respect, and Radical Inclusion come first. Come soften, connect, and co-create a moment of warmth in the dust.

name: So Far So Good
description: Step up to a familiar machine that offers something extraordinary. This ATM does not dispense money, but stories. Speak a memory, a longing, or a truth, and receive a small printed story shaped from your words. Come withdraw something you cannot buy.

name: Sobremesa
description: People arrive for a drink or a taco and somehow stay for hours. Inspired by the Mexican tradition of the sobremesa, this camp recreates that moment after the meal when conversation, music, and laughter keep the table alive. Expect a cozy lounge, tacos from the comal, a communal table that sometimes becomes a dance floor, and plenty of late-night carajillos. Come sit, share stories with strangers, and linger a little longer than you planned.

name: Society for Temporal Preservation
description:
The Society for Temporal Preservation consists of time travelers tasked with preserving the fabric of spacetime. Space time is like a cat though, it takes care of itself. This is good, because now we can leave a bowl of food out and ignore it while we visit Black Rock City. We serve as ambassadors of the temporally free, working to introduce Black Rock City to the magic (science) of time travel.
Our goals include:
- Exposing burners to the wonders (AND HORRORS!) of time travel
- Instilling a sense of hope and responsibility in regards to an individual's place in time
- Getting the anti-matter out of the carpet. That stuff is STICKY

name: Soft Landing
description: Soft Landing offers a comfortable space to drink tea, hydrate, and rest in our Full Circle Tea House. Soft Landing also presents the Palenque Norte speaker series featuring over 40 visionary talks and stories spanning concepts such as technology, community organization, medicine, art, science, design and ethnobotany.

name: Sol Family
description:
Rise & Shine with us every morning 7am - 11am

Barista Coffee Service and Cafe
By VERY popular demand, Coffee NotSi returns. Barista coffee service. DJ'd zen morning vibes. Extended hours. No complaints.
+ New in 2026: Frappuccinos!

Sparkling Energy Mimosas
A refreshing new twist toward caffeinating the playa each morning (with bubbles!). Traditional mimosas/prosecco served as well.

Rise & Shine Lounge
Come for the caffeine, stay for the vibes. Daily DJ'ed morning lounge space with upbeat tracks, dancing, shade, misters, sofas, hammocks and cafe tables.

Charm Bracelet Buffet Bar
Capture a memory, or create a completely unique playa gift. Make friends and fun custom jewelry.

Join us Monday and Wednesday afternoons 2-5 for our Signature Day Parties! DJ's, refreshing icy cocktail bar, misters and more.

name: SOLARIS
description: Please do not publicly list

name: SolarPlus
description: A free solar-powered community charging lounge offering e-bike, scooter, and device charging to all citizens of Black Rock City. Powered entirely by renewable energy, our shaded lounge is open daily with hosted shifts, welcoming anyone who rolls up with a dead battery. No fees, no VIP access just a genuine gift to keep Black Rock City moving.

name: SOLARPUNKS
description: We are a collective of creatives and applied technologists harnessing the power of the sun to fuel our festivities - and yours. SOLAR STATION is our gift to Black Rock City: a utility-scale clean energy power plant providing free solar energy 24 hours a day to charge theme camps, mutant vehicles, e-bikes, art support, phones, batteries, and more. Think of it as the clean energy counterpart to Hell Station - renewable electrons instead of diesel. Beyond the juice, SOLAR STATION is a proof of concept that decentralized clean energy can power real communities in the most demanding environments on earth - from the playa to disaster zones to cities everywhere. Come charge up, tour the system, and catch a glimpse of the world we are collectively building.

name: Solid City
description:
We're mothers, daughters, siblings, and partners and maybe a cuz or two parts of a grown-ass family camp encouraging strong bonds among Black and brown Burners and their families ~ and what better way to do that than by tossing them in an ESCAPE ROOM laced with puzzles forcing you to use critical thinking skills!? 

If you can make it through our 90's cityscape and out the other side to our street meat and Notorious B.A.R. still friends, then you know your relationship back in the Default will be SOLID!

name: Some Camp!
description:
It's a food bank AND a cinema! Tell us your tale of woe, replace your lost food. Vegan and keto available while supplies last. Bring us your extras (e.g. water, gear, no perishables) for redistribution

Grab some popcorn and stay for a movie after the sun goes down. Most to all selections subtitled/silent. We will be providing hot ramen & drinks after the burn

name: SomeDay Isle ...
description:
Tiki Bar, Broth'l, Hammock Hangout , and Burn Barrel Gathering Space
Inspiration Destination and Late Night Orientation Staytion.

We will captivate you with our main event Mai Tai, You Tie, We all Tie Amateur Shibari. We offer late night fireside music, games, and chats and an always open protected lounge and hammock chill dome. 
Our Broth'l is a 24/7 hydration and nutrition station with hot and cold water, tea, coffee, broth, ramen, and electrolytes.

We are a fun, active, engaging band of responsible hooligans with a comfy camp space to share. We encourage fun playtime but, as importantly, we educate and demonstrate Burning Man core principles. We offer avenues for creating art and personal expression, and we encourage Dreams. SomeDay Isle ... ?

name: Someplace Cozy
description: Someplace Cozy offers a restorative sanctuary to the citizens of Black Rock City. Wander into our cozy space for mindful relaxation, physical recovery, chill beats, and deep conversations. Our air conditioned tent offers a range of daytime programming, including somatic movement mediations, mindset workshops, yoga, breathwork, and supple soul stretching. Come by at night for an ambient lounge to relax in.

name: SonicBoom Saloon
description: Come enjoy some old west drinks while you learn to crack a whip or gamble your precious shwag away.

name: Soon to be Infamous
description: Your burn is Soon to Be Infamous! Stop by and decorate a flag with your playa name and address during our Don't Fucking Leave Your Fucking Bike on the Fucking Playa! Bicycle Flag Creation Station Events and help us end bikicide, the careless abandonment of an innocent bike to wither and die on the playa.

name: SophistaPirate Cove
description:
Word travels about a Pirate port on Esplanade, a place the SophistaPirates built when they decided to make something worth staying for.
During the day, it's a place to settle in: shaded lounges, games at Kracken's Trap, a stop at Captain Cooks, and stories shared at the Thirsty Pearl.
But it doesn't stay quiet for long.
By night, the ship wakes up. Music, fire sails, and projection art take over, and the Cove fills with movement.
With music, workshops, wandering performers, and 24-hour access, there's always something happening... or about to.

name: Soul Forge
description: Take a deep dive into personal growth and learning - Hammer out your spirit at Soul Forge!

name: Soulshakers
hometown: Bend Oregon / Queenstown NZ/ Vancouver BC
description: Our camp is a playground for the free-spirited and a home base for nomads with a thirst for connection and adventure. We're a global tribe of dream-chasers and boundary-pushers, supporting each other to live our best lives; from the peaks of New Zealand to the shores of Thailand, and everywhere in between. We are solid as a community and feel that the space we hold between us can inspire other Burners to live courageously and less conventionally, as we all aim to do, as a community together. Join us, where every moment is a chance to shake up the soul and sprinkle a little more magic into the burn.

name: SoulSound
description: Step into SoulSound, where rhythm meets ritual and every soul becomes part of the tribe. Guided by sound and spirit, we gather like modern day Vikings around the pulse of music. Move through sound journeys, tribal dance, and moments that awaken something deeper within. This is a space of strength, connection, and shared energy where strangers become family and the beat becomes your compass. Come curious, leave transformed.

name: Sound Cabin
description: Welcomed to everyone to join us for rides around the playa. Just find us and jump on.

name: SoundCloud
description:
Welcome to the SoundCloud, your cloud themed portal to high vibe frequencies and dreamy beats. We are a collective of sound lovers sharing music from our cozy cloud lounge. Float with us through ambient sound, deep grooves, and healing vibrations.

Our crew includes sound therapists, healers, ceremonialists, musicians, DJs, and curious explorers united by a love for vibration, frequency, and connection. From meditative sound journeys to soulful rhythms and heart opening gatherings, we create experiences designed to uplift and inspire.

At our dreamy lounge on the playa you will find a sanctuary to relax, connect, and recharge. You may also see us roaming the dust aboard Claudius, our cloud art car, sharing music and good vibrations wherever we float

name: Sozo Experience
description: Open for those looking for inner or outer healing, and for those wanting more of the supernatural! We offer venerative and regenerative meditation, drum circles, spiritual readings, healings, and an experimental "Dopamine Dump" experience. So get some caffeinated exotic coffee with us in the morning, or come to afternoon thought provoking and interactive workshops on surviving in the desert. We welcome you with open arms to join us for a truth ceremony, or check out and do the menu board of spirituality!

name: SP Station
description: Home station for the SP Express mattress cabana train!

name: Space Bar
description: A group of humans committed to supporting art at Black Rock City. Come meet us at our art sculpture or in our open-to-all shade structure at camp.

name: Space Cowboys
description:
Shakin Yo Business again on the Playa!

The cowgirls and cowboys are back yet again with their version of the Wild West. 

Travel the playa on the Martha - An Art Car with Love & personality. Martha < 3's you! An experience to the edge of the playa.
M, Tu, W; 4p - 7p - Learn Argentine Tango
All day every day - play Gigantic games in camp

Put on your best duds and enjoy your experience at the Space Cowboy Lounge where we barter, trade, howl, laugh, dance, and share liquid libations, music, and much, much more. Bring a bottle, a twelve-pack, or a bag or two of ice to make your lounge hours cool and comfortable. 

Be sure to join us for the Black Rock Hoe Down, a hidden party gem.
SOMEWHERE! A party that will be out of this world.

name: Spaced Out
description: Visitors are invited to step into a creative space where they can slow down, explore, and take part in collaborative art. At the center of the camp is a large drawing installation that evolves throughout the week as participants add marks, gestures, and symbols to a shared canvas. Guided meditation to drawing sessions and informal conversations invite people to explore ideas around art, music, storytelling, and imagination. Anyone can join in, regardless of artistic experience, and contribute to the artwork as it grows over the course of the week.

name: Spanky's Wine Bar
description: The infamous crown-jewel of Burning Man bars. We take a tongue-in-cheek approach to wine, and a paddle-to-cheek approach to your butt ;)

name: Sparkle Camels Costume Bazaar
description: Need to upgrade your playa swag? We've got you covered, from funky hats, tutus and sparkle bootie shorts. You never know what you'll find. Open every day from mid-day to dusk. All are welcome!

name: Sparkle Love
description: Come experience a little Sparkle Love in our beautiful oasis Tiki lounge, enjoy a cold drink and make new friends. We are a colorful and eclectic crew of sex positive, queer friendly, Sparkle Lovers and Burning Man family with an international flair. Cold drinks, hot friends, sexy games, groovy beats, rainbow colors all around.

name: Spec-Taters
description: And amidst this sea of humanity, there are potatoes. Yes, potatoes. Perhaps an unexpected sight in the midst of such a surreal landscape, but therein lies the magic of Burning Man. These humble tubers, often overlooked in daily life, take on new significance here. They're not just food; they're symbols of sustenance, resilience, and community.

name: Spoonful of Friends
description:
A camp built around the simple idea that sharing a meal can turn strangers into something closer. We create thoughtful, beautifully hosted dining experiences that bring people together. Long tables, warm lighting, music that invites you in, and conversations that linger.

Our camp is a place to connect, and participate. Some come to cook, some to serve, some to host, and some simply to be held by the experience. Everyone contributes to the energy in their own way.

name: Square One
description: A diverse group united in creating large-scale art through efficient and sustainable designs, inspiring individuals and other camps to burn stronger. Our efficiency-driven approach allows us to contribute more to the community. We modify and use Burning Man?centric shipping containers for our camp activities, including the B&B BBQ and our 35-foot hammock Nest tower. We operate two large art cars: Sparky (Hot Sauce) and Eden. We also provide logistical and power support for various playa art projects.

name: Squeeze the Day
description: A refreshing oasis of "Ice Cold Liquid Sunshine" on the playa! Since 2016, we've been inviting passersby to pause for a chat & a shot of homemade limoncello. Our camp is simple: good people, tasty pours, and real connection where strangers become friends in the dust. We're also the artists behind the Serendipity Machine, an interactive art installation designed to spark meaningful encounters on the playa. Small in size but big in heart, we exist to spread warmth, wonder and a little unexpected magic.

name: Stag Camp
description: We invite anyone and everyone (drama-free), including singles, couples, and small groups from all walks of life. We have no strict regimen of things to do or fees to pay. Everyone contributes as much as they like, with radical self-reliance a camp cornerstone. If you're looking for shared showers, meal plans, kitchen shifts, etc., we're not the spot for you. We all just come and hang out, creating a community among ourselves that is unique, fun, and will be whatever you make of it!

name: Stampede!
description: A movement and connection-driven space inviting you off your bike and into the herd. Step into a shaded lounge for yoga, breathwork, and playful, consent-forward interaction. Explore aerial, join spontaneous group moments, or simply land and connect. Come find your stripes.

name: Star Buds
description: This is the dedicated heart and support for the Sanctuary of the Silent Star.. Come share a cup of tea in our cozy lounge and discover quiet clues on how to unlock the mysteries of the .... We invite you to trade the noise of the city for a moment of meaningful stillness and communal connection. Our space is a soft landing for weary travelers.

name: Star Jelly
hometown: San Francisco, San Diego, Park City
description:
A loosely knit collection of individuals operating as a singular organism. Traveling space and time to learn and share with you all at Burning Man. Come by to enjoy our wonderlawn oasis and traverse the sparkly gates to the new you. Or enjoy some general shenanigans in our Jelly Dome. We'll also be giving out Gold Stars, so come by to share your tales of why you deserve a Gold Star!!! 
Fun for all ages!

name: Stardust Lounge
description: Enter an interdimensional portal that leads to a magical experience comprised of love, silliness, and sparkly things! Stardust Lounge is an eclectic pit stop for dusty travelers on their inter-playatary journeys. The three sections of the camp--the Lounge, Spa, and Wedding Chapel--offer visitors a fun blend of rituals, games, and opportunities for self-care.

name: StarFist
description:
Infamous international tea service Mon-Sat 2-5pm serving a delightful selection of hot and cold infusions from around the world as we pamper and delight our guests. Offering a refuge from heat and dust, unparalleled hospitality and secret surprises for the lucky few. 

Morning meditation/yoga sessions most days at 11:11am and our fascinating evening StarFist Lecture Series, exploring a range of thought-provoking topics and stirring debate in our sumptuous StarFist Lounge.

name: StarPups
description: A daily caffeine fix of cold-brew coffee in the morning and a relaxed space to hang out at throughout the day! Play some games and make new friends in our cafe, toss some bags for cornhole, or test your coordination with giant Jenga!

name: Stars And Bikes
description: Bike Repair! 12 to 4 pm Monday through Saturday. Professional mechanics with tools, parts, and skills to fix all your bike problems. Shaded waiting area with seating and a self-service station for those who are radically self reliant! Roll on in, both you and your bike deserve some love.

name: Steam Bath Project
description:
The original and still the best steam bath experience.
Step into a world of relaxation and rejuvenation at The Steam Bath Project. Located at the heart of Burning Man, our camp offers a unique and immersive experience inspired by the soothing power of steam. Enter our tranquil oasis and indulge in the therapeutic benefits of steam bathing, surrounded by the sights, sounds, and scents of the desert. Our Lavender Lounge provides a sanctuary for participants to unwind and prepare for their steam bath adventure, while interactive elements engage the senses and foster community connection. Join us for a journey of self-discovery and renewal, where the principles of radical inclusion, communal effort, and radical self-expression come to life.

name: STEEP?
description: GOOD JOB! You made it to Burning Man. Now come playfully question existence with us at STEEP?. Explore you inner child with games, heckling, random acts of wonder, authenticity, connection, and... DRINKS. We love them. With alcohol, without alcohol, and often featuring plant extracts and ALWAYS made with love. Come Drink in the Love at camp STEEP? ya weirdos.

name: Stimulation Station
description: Dive into a little oasis for your nervous system at Stimulation Station. Slip on a mask and let the world fade as we guide you Monday through Friday, 12pm to 3pm, through a consent based sensory reset. Expect soothing touch with gentle tools and scratch therapy plus calming soundscapes designed to help you drop in and breathe again. Spot our bold front scaffolding and hot pink Stimulation sign glowing under black lights, then settle into our lounge and neon lit Geodome, open 24 7, to recharge, connect, and tumble into whatever spontaneous magic the night brings.

name: Stoop
description: Serving top-shelf, neighborly vibes, Stoop is a place where you belong. Our art is hosting. Welcome home! We've created a place for neighbors to gather, share stories, express their art, and make new friends while sipping a delicious cocktail and eating a grilled cheese, blueberry pancake, or whatever we've got going on the grill.

name: Stoop City
description: Stoop City captures the magic of a fever dream spent wandering the streets of Black Rock City. Come share a secret on our cozy stoops with a new friend, savor a steaming slurp of spicy ramen, or grab a last-minute bandaid from our Asian-inspired bao-dega. This might just be the late night corner bodega you never knew you needed.

name: Storytime Friends
description:
Storytime and Dreamtime co-create magic. Storytime is a larger-than-life Tiffany's banker's lamp, building community through the magic of storytelling and reading aloud across the playa. Pick up a book, sit in a circle, and read to friends new and old. Lie back, listen, and watch the stained-glass lampshade slowly change overhead. Share your own stories, or create a new one together. Storytime is a stage for reading and connection, and a comfortable retreat from the noise, throughout the city and in deep playa.

Rest on Dreamtime to inspire, introspect, reflect on dreams past and co-create new visions for the future.

name: STRANGELOVE
description:
Fly the Friendly! 

Come get your altitude and your attitude adjusted in our airliner-themed lounge, where each afternoon you can enjoy the company of your fellow jet-setters while you sip ice-cold draft beer or a signature cocktail and groove to tasty house beats at our 16-foot wing-shaped bar.

name: Struggletown Station
description: Struggletown Station is the depot station for The Struggle Bus artcar. Come hitch a ride with us for art tours and just exploring the amazing Playa sites and sounds.

name: Studio and Spa
description: Come to BRC Studio and Spa to not only to receive a massage or have your sensual, erotic or daring fine-art photo taken, but join one of our workshops and take some new skill back to the default word. Either way, walk away with a unique photo print, or a new skill, or at least relaxed!

name: Suburbia
description: We are putting our efforts into bringing that same tacky suburban culture to Black Rock City. New and old burners will be able to see one of the most disgusting/ugly parts of society in the urban sprawl of the 'default world' displayed in a beautiful and enjoyable way. From the moment someone spots Suburbia, they will see a typical suburban neighborhood, but the with Burning Man principles close to heart. We hope that through this subverted lens, participants will appreciate Black Rock City for more than an escapism from their daily lives, but also an opportunity to encompass the Burning Man principles into their everyday lives when they return to the 'default world'.

name: Sundowners
description: "Sundowners" comes from a South African friendship ritual we host Monday to Friday at sunset. A safari themed art car and a South African shebeen speakeasy anchor our public offering, alongside dance and cultural programming rooted in music, movement, and social exchange. Our creative center is Afrofuturism, imagining a positive and inclusive future through speculative art and technology, reflecting the diverse backgrounds and practices of our community. We see Burning Man, as the planet's largest temporary city, as a fitting context for this expression.

name: sunny side up
description: Art camp for burning man art installation "sunny side up"

name: Sunrise Tavern
description: Come for the bacon, stay for the sunrise. You gnome you'll like ;)

name: Sunset Lounge
description:
You know us and you love us.
Up to our usual shenanigans .. Come find us!

name: Suspended Animation
description: Experience full-suspension erotic rope bondage: part kinetic art, part thrill ride, part endorphin rush. Our crew of expert riggers offers bondage and BDSM rides to all (Yes! You too can fly!), workshops for all levels, breathtaking performances, and night time play parties. We also rove the playa and build impromptu bondage sculpture!

name: Swan Forest
description: Swan Forest is the heart and soul of our camp, where creativity, community, and transformation come together. Named after both the Prodigal Swan and the Forest House art cars, our camp serves as a space for artistic expression, connection, and shared experiences. The Prodigal Swan, with its dynamic sound and light displays, invites exploration and interaction, while the Forest House brings a sense of nature and futurism to our environment. Together, these art cars provide a unique space for immersive experiences, where all are welcome to engage in a vibrant, inclusive community.

name: Swing City
description: Swing City brings the energy and vibe of the Original Muscle Beach in Santa Monica California to Burning Man. We strive to provide a safe welcoming playground that can be enjoyed by all ages. Come to participate or just hang out in our shade and watch the various acrobatics available as seasoned professionals and movement newbies alike explore our space.

name: Swirl Support
description: Basecamp / garage for Chosen Yogurt.

name: SYMBIO
description: Drop your responsibilities at the door and check into SYMBIO. Expect playful chaos, questionable life advice, and zero supervision as you reconnect with your inner child (who probably makes worse decisions than you do). Snacks, silliness, and spontaneous magic included.

name: Synaesthesia
description: A dreamworld where movement, sound, and light unite. Come play on our 26' tower, dance to live music and DJ sets, and enjoy a refreshing beverage.

name: Synapse Conduit
description: We are Phó - Cup. Your midnight Phó restaurant Come find up in deep playa on Wednesday and Thursday night. Relax, eat and drink and then take your dusty ass out for some fun at the next shiny object!!

name: T33M0
description:
T33MO will get you back on the track
If your bike is sick, we'll heal it for ya!
If you're low on energy, try our refreshing icy slushies while relaxing in our cozy lounge.

name: ta-keel-ya or ta-heal-ya
description: A glowing pink disco dome invites passersby to pause and choose their own adventure! Will it be a tequila shot or a fiery wellness shot packed with ingredients like ginger and turmeric. Campmates host this simple but spirited ritual throughout the week, creating a space for laughter, conversation, and unexpected connection. Come spin through, reset your energy, and share a quick moment with fellow citizens of Black Rock City.

name: Tac-O-Cat
description:
We are Camp Tac-O-Cat. We cook tacos for the masses and enjoy serving libations and great conversation. We offer shade, a misty breeze and we have a few gear-heads who like to solve problems. Our camp is made up of Burners with deep roots in playa culture and a few we have newly adopted. People will likely be pulled in by heckling when they pass by, and some of the best connections have come from luring our new friends in from the street. We enjoy cracking people out of their comfort zone and immersing them in dusty happiness.

At sunset Monday, Wednesday and Friday we will be offering tacos. Our tacos are playa-famous and have a special grilled tortilla. We have vegetarian options as well.

Last year we brought out 1,000 pounds of cold beer and plan to do the same this year.

name: Tantra Temple
description:
A welcoming space dedicated to presence, connection, mindfulness and embodied awareness. We offer a calm environment where participants can slow down, breathe, and explore authentic human interaction in a respectful, consent-based setting.

Throughout the week we host interactive experiences including tantra presence practices, ecstatic dance gatherings, conscious touch and tantric bodywork introductions, tea ceremonies, and tarot reflection sessions. 

Our central lounge tent is filled with carpets, cushions, and soft lighting, creating a comfortable space to relax, participate, or simply share tea and conversation. All offerings are gifts to the community and welcome burners of all backgrounds and experience levels.

name: Tarwater
description: Looking for Answers to All Life's Questions? Just took for the mannequin caged in a travois: There you'll find Lady S's Boutique, Cut throat Bowling, The World Tree, miscellaneous games and the welcoming denizens of Tarwater. You'll also recognize us by the crusty old Rat Taxi, parked in front.

name: Tazii
description: Join us for rest, ease, and libations in the Tazii Moroccan Tent chill lounge 24 hours a day! Our bar is filled with pillows and rugs to get cozy with new and old friends. Swamp-cooled during the day for the perfect nap, themed cocktails in the evening to inspire a great night, and good times all the time.

name: Team Human Base Camp
description: A far-flung conglomerate of artist, loonies and weirdos from California, Oregon, Texas, Indiana and Australia coming together to provide an interactive and unique space for live music, DJs, performance artist and speakers to share their offerings. Come be a character in our quirky little variety show.

name: Teddies
description: Themed parties, food, bar & tunes all week. Cuddle with Bears & more in the Teddy dome, open 24/7

name: Temple Camp
description: We are the support camp for Temple of the Moon, this year's official Burning Man Temple. We are a multinational crew of artists, builders, creators and supporters who have spent all of 2026 bringing this temple to life for our community. We welcome everyone to stop by and learn more about the process of designing and building the temple, and we'd love to hear your thoughts and stories.

name: Temple Guardians
description: Location of the Temple Guardian & Burn Perimeter training area, as well as the Temple Guardian Helpdesk. Camping for a few guardians and guardian leadership cadre.

name: Temple O'Flying Spaghetti Monster
description: We are a comfortable neighborhood pub with a-rockin' attitude and groovin' tunes. In honor of His Noodly Goodness, the Friendly Fire Bar will administer ice-cold libations for your mind, body, and spirit. We will also provide unofficial and official playa weddings in His Noodly Goodness' Temple. Come learn about his Noodly Goodness, call almost anywhere in the world on "Talk to Mom" phone, or visit our giftorium. We also offer bad advice, favorable directions, and delicious conversations to invigorate and stimulate your mind. The Flying Spaghetti Monster welcomes all so stop by, be touched by His noodly appendage, stay awhile, and rest your dusty bum.

name: Temple Oasis
description:
Temple Oasis is a decompression spot and camp for those who have gathered at, worked at, or been a Guardian at the Temple.

An Oasis on the playa from the heaviness of the Temple and our service to it; a place to find others who are welcome to talk or sit in knowing silence as we unwind our experiences.

name: Temple of Temperance
description:
We are a new camp with old roots, devoted to restoring the Red Tent as a space for cyclical awareness, connection, and care. Our offerings explore the feminine cycle through daily workshops, embodied practice, and shared experience. 

Inspired by the principles of temperance, we work with fire as a force to be shaped and wielded, not spent. Honouring timing, intention, and responsibility. Like a well-forged blade, strength comes through balance: heat, patience, and refinement. 

This is a space to release what no longer serves, to reconnect with self and community, and to participate in a more conscious, grounded way of being on playa.

name: Tengri Camp
description: A glowing yurt encampment where the wind carries stories, music, and the memory of the steppe. Within warm circular shelters, strangers become guests, guests become family, sharing tea, song, and slow moments of presence under the desert sky. On Wednesday and Friday from 3 to 5 pm, we gift communal meals as gatherings of hospitality and shared tradition. By day and night, we offer a space to rest, create, and reconnect through cultural exchange and shared humanity beneath the vastness of Black Rock City.

name: Tequila Bees
description: The Tequila Bees are a Hive Like No Other, come see what the Buzz is about

name: Terrapin Station
description: The Galactic Terrapin lives to take you on intergalactic adventures of epic proportions. You're always "home" when you're with us, so swing by, take a trip and find your own Axis Mundi.

name: Terrible Turtle
description: A camp at the meeting point of artificial intelligence, creative practice, and the felt sense of being alive. We bring together technologists, artists, and seekers who believe the most interesting questions about AI aren't answered in labs, they're answered in ritual, in conversation, in community. What happens when a machine reads your cards, or a workshop on consciousness runs at noon in the desert? We think something shifts, and the playa is the right place to find out. AI tarot sessions, daily workshops, a live playa podcast, and a participatory art installation open to all of Black Rock City - a long-term experiment in what comes next.

name: Tetrix Stargazer
description: Home to a bunch of Aussies welcoming you to the humble abode of the Stargazer Artcar. We will be serving up daily disco coffee and snacks from 9am-12pm, so come party with us and then hop aboard the Stargazer Artcar in the evening for a journey out to deep playa from 9pm onwards

name: The Airship
description: A steampunk inspired bar camp that's returning to the Playa for our third year. Our little crew of miscreants, scoundrels, and artists want to gift some fun and frivolity to the Playa in the form of themed bar night and a lounge for relaxing!

name: The Alphabet Cookout
description: A welcoming neighborhood gathering space rooted in cookout culture and the joyful spirit of the Alphabet Mafia. Stop by our shaded lounge and bar to relax, meet new people, and enjoy music with a focus on house and dance traditions connected to Black and queer communities. Throughout the week we host listening sessions, neighborhood happy hours, and casual social gatherings that invite participants to step off their bikes and connect with one another. Expect warm vibes, good conversation, and a little bit of DC flavor on the playa. Come hang out and help turn strangers into neighbors. We're serving culture, not food.

name: The Astral Social Club
description: A home on the playa for experimental, ambient, acoustic, classical and celestial music. Indulge in our house made elixirs and tinctures at our non-alcoholic bar; let your consciousness slip through our transdimensional portal. Elevate and expand.

name: The Back Hole
description: GPE Staff and Volunteer Camping: Where Gate goes to Sleep or recover

name: The Balls Depot
description:
Your Neighborhood Balls Improvement Store.

"Do Yourself"

name: the black hole
description: The Black Hole is a Staff Camp supporting the needs of Gate, Perimeter and Exodus.

name: The Cage
description: A young and energetic community focused on fitness, wellness and music. The camp hosts daily training and recovery sessions led by professional athletes, alongside nighttime DJ experiences inside The Cage, a three floor immersive stage featuring sound and lighting.

name: The Carrot Club
description:
Our camp is focused on health and happiness; health through fresh vegetables and fruits at the Black Rock Farmers Market in the mornings and happiness and festivities at the Carrot Club in the afternoons. Enjoy tasty, fresh produce to feed the body, refresh the spirit, and nourish the soul! One of the best parts of exploring any
city is checking out the farmer's market- and Black Rock City is no exception! Come try one of our wide array of fresh fruits
and veggies!
In the afternoons, join us for fresh and icy smoothies (boozy or not) as well as occasional fruit and vegetable-based cocktails at the Carrot Club.

name: The Cave
description: To deviate positively is to play with the rules, reimagine the future, build new realities, and break what no longer serves. It starts small: a question, an experiment, a new way of relating - that quietly reorganizes what's possible between us and around us.

name: The Club
description: A Joker-run casino parody where nobody wins money but everyone risks becoming part of the show. Play two games - Twenty One My Ass and Deez Roulette. Bring a joke, a story, or something strange with you. Welcome to a casino run by people who should not run casinos.

name: The Crusty Swan
description: The best Irish Pub on the playa! Stop by for a shot of whiskey, a traditional Irish Coffee, an ice-cold tea or coffee, some friendly conversation and a dusty hug. Slainte!

name: The Den
description: That magical place where you can explore fun and play, where you can connect deeply with a person and never see them again, where you can talk philosophy, politics, science... or just be horny! In the den, anything can happen if you want it to. Stop on by and hangout at our bar and sample our World Famous Love Puddle Punch, if you are lucky you may get a spanking from our Love Paddle. Or just relax on our comfy couches!

name: The Dusty Nuts Tavern
description: Escape the constant wub wub for something a little different, along with dusty drinks from dusty people.

name: The Enclave
description: A curious arty-party space of pan-asian tones. We fuel our wonky camp with oddities of spiced grit and charm for those with deeply set Playa roots along the new rhizomes to grip in. We are united by a passion for art, design and bafoonery. The Enclave brings a spicy hot mess of Playastani energy to Black Rock.

name: The Fluffy Cloud
description: Home of the The Fluffy Cloud! A giant 360-degree immersive sound and light installation towering 3 stories tall and equally wide, the Cloud is a one-of-a-kind art amplification platform hosting a variety of musical interactivity throughout the week. From world-class DJs to interactive jukebox nights, to sound baths, join us under the Cloud every day of the week to get your taint-shaken by 200,000 watts of overhead sound, light and magic creating a 360 space purpose built for connection.

name: The Fountain (of youth)
description:
A longevity-focused camp at BM where we celebrate life and coordinate to fight aging & death.

Our gifts to the playa are LongeviTEA, our signature teahouse and the Rejuvenating IV Lounge.

We have healthy food (inspired by the blueprint diet), IV hydration raffles, and daily workshops on accelerating longevity, biohacking, wellness, and creating a protopia. 
Whether you're seeking a soothing cup of LongeviTea or a deep conversation about defying aging and death, The Fountain (of youth) invites you to sip, connect, rehydrate and explore what it means to live vibrantly on the edge of time.

name: The G Spot
description: The G Spot is hard to find. A surreal junkyard where anything goes, and nothing is what it seems. Rare pokemon are born here. Come for the mystery, stay for the mayhem.

name: The G-Spot & Sloth Sinema
description: Can you find the G-Spot? We are your favorite neighborhood dive bar. Come thirsty, leave happy! New for 2024 we are shifting to an evening offering and opening the Sloth Sinema. Join us for a chill evening of great movies, themed cocktails, and of course, shenanigans! Family-friendly matinees included. Already have plans for the evening? Come by in the morning for "Saturday" morning cartoons and milk and cereal. Just like mom used to make.

name: the Garage
description: Art support camp for "the Garage"

name: The GASS Co.
description: A camp of artists and fabricators quietly (and sometimes not quietly) building something strange and wonderful for deep playa.

name: The Glorious Wet Spot
description: Home of the Wet Spot art car!

name: The Gutter
description: Your grungy nostalgic neighborhood bowling alley. Land marked by our towering 10-ft bowling pin, The Gutter features a one-lane bowling alley open daily for spontaneous games, wild strikes, and the occasional gutterball. Spin your way into The Spare Room, a shaded lounge and dance space, a bowling-themed bar, and a DJ booth spinning beats to keep the energy rolling. Whether you're here to strike, dance, or just chill, The Gutter is the perfect place to let the good times roll - and don't forget to ask us about our PinPal VIP program!

name: The Hand Lovers Lounge
description: A soft landing space for hands, lovers, lovers of hands, and everything in between!

name: The Hash House
description:
Formerly BRCH3, slings the greasy delicious carb-loaded potatos that we all know and love and much much more all served by members of The Hash House Harriers, the (in)famous drinking club with a running problem since 1938. Grab some spuds and spice them up with your hot sauce of choice from the hot sauce library. Enjoy a cold drink or a drinking challenge at our moderately well stocked bar. Tune up or fix your bike at our DIY bike repair station. Challenge your liver, legs, and tastebuds in the Malort Mile. And make sure to join us on Thursday in your red dress (don't worry we'll have some for you at our boutique) for our annual Red Dress Ride for a tour of some of playas best and worse bars with a few hundred other half minds.

ON ON!

name: The Institute
description: The Institute of higher yearning invites the dusty wanderer to expand their mind into the bottomless pit of knowledge and exploration.

name: The Island
description: A French-speaking camp sharing the spirit of Polynesia at Burning Man. Come discover a warm and relaxing space inspired by Tahiti, with traditional monoï oil massages, cultural touches, and an inviting island atmosphere

name: The Key Camp
description:
The Key = Believe. We have a key for you to open any door. During our interactive event, "Fortune Key Hunting," we will help you discover your key and guide you on how to use it to open new doors in life.

After you explore your key, we will serve cold Japanese green tea and offer you a choice of a henna tattoo of your Kanji or a Kanji sticker.

name: The Last Starfighters
description: Greetings, Starfighter. You have been recruited by the Star League to defend the playa against commodification & moop. Your participation in supporting artists by building a branch of The Solar Library & giving home to Solarians is to be commended. Your communal effort & civic responsibility will be known across the galaxy. You as a radically self reliant creature have always wanted to fight a desperate battle against incredibly dusty odds. The Trailing Soul & Augmented Reality Porta Potties are your legacy. Remember to listen next time a gung-ho iguana tells you to relax.

name: The Lavender Lounge
description: Welcome to The Lavender Lounge! Come in out of the sun and receive a relaxing scalp massage while we mist you with lavender scented water. Lie back on an air mattress and take a few moments to slow down and enjoy yourself. You will leave feeling fresh, alive, and with just a bit more pep in your step! Open 11am-2pm Mon-Fri

name: The Lost Penguins
description:
We have been a hospitality camp on playa since 2001. We are returning this year to bring you our amazing brain-freezing snow cones, and sizzling hot entertainment! Stop by and take shelter from the hot sun, or sit out a dust storm, in our welcoming 40' x 80' shaded lounge. You can relax on our comfy couches, while you enjoy your snow cone or cold beverage from the bar. 

We have live and DJ music, as well as open mic. Feel free to strike up a conversation with someone new, or simply people watch. For age 21+ patrons, you may enjoy our famous Penguin Pee (lemonade & vodka), regular lemonade, or cold water. Enjoy tasty red & black licorice during the day, and decadent dark chocolate at night. We cannot wait to welcome you to our waddle!

name: The Makers Space
description: We are an art support camp and would love to offer support to the artists and builders on playa. with help, food, drinks, materials, other resources if needed.

name: The Market
description: Imagine you are wandering through Playa on your way home from a night of adventure or just starting out in search of adventure. Your stomach growls a bit, maybe you feel just a tiny bit thirsty. From afar you see a gathering of carts, lit up and welcoming. What's going on over there? You pedal towards it and stumble upon The Market. You are suddenly surrounded with stands offering their goods. You eat, you drink, and maybe you even get your future told. Get a new jacket! Get hustled in a strangely rigged dice game. You can't help but think - is this the start of your night, or the center of it all?

name: The Melon Motel
description: A retro desert oasis where playful hospitality meets music and connection. Step into our motel-inspired world, check in with our crew, and become part of the experience. By day, we host a vibrant shaded lounge serving refreshing melon-based drinks and creating a social space to relax, meet new people, and recharge. Throughout the week, we also offer wellness sessions including yoga and movement under our central shade structure. By night, The Melon Motel transforms into a high-energy destination with curated music, immersive lighting, and a dancefloor that brings people together. Whether you're stopping by to cool off, connect, or get lost in the music, The Melon Motel is always open for a good time.

name: The Mystical Grill
