description: A global circle of kindred spirits united by fire, flavor, and story. We gift two styles of traditional Argentinian Asado from our open grill and invite Burners to gather for communal meals, spontaneous storytelling, readings from our camp tarot reader, and soul warming connection. We honor food as a ritual, fire as transformation, and the Playa as our shared home.

name: The OG Pit
description:
The OG PIT is a little fire, a little fancy, a little filthy—but always family. We build hard, stay late, and never forget why we're here. Whether you're sipping morning mimosa coffee, slapping your way through a late-night meltdown, or screaming karaoke to the stars, you're always welcome in The Pit!
See you in the dust, baby.

name: The Organization
description: Whether you are tired and in need of energy, or simply heading out on the playa and in need of a drink, stop by our camp for an espresso martini (or simply an iced coffee or non-alcoholic beverage)! Meet and chat with fellow burners while you sit in our shade, lay down in our hammock, rest in our cuddle puddle or jump on our trampoline.

name: The Parlour Room
description: The Parlour Room is a classy-not-classy, heavily shady/shaded, industrial Victorian lounge space welcoming all BRC citizens to come relax under the shade with a cool beverage during the morning and afternoon or chat the night's adventures fantastic around our fire pit in the wee hours.

name: The Pearly Gate
hometown: Boise, New York, California, Seattle, Ukraine
description: Your one-stop shop for the afterlife. Come find your way through your sins and salvations, walk our runway, bring out your inner Sexy Jesus and Foxy Mary, come to our fetish ball or just stop by for a drink.

name: The Pink Spot
description: The Pink Spot is an art car support camp with The Big Bunny art car, Dj driven holding up to 40 burners. We will leave camp every evening around dusk, please come by for a prefunk and hop on for a thorough throw down!

name: The Pleasure Dairy
description: Finally, what you've been waiting for! A Burning Man Camp that reimagines the little-known historic phenomenon of pleasure dairies! Think Marie Antoinette but in the Wild West. A place where you can never have too many cows or cow puns. At high noon be udderly refreshed by dairy-alternative craft cocktails at our bar, The Tits, and spend some time in the shade nourishing your connections at our message-in-a-bottle service. After sundown, explore our LED cactus garden and kick up your boots in our cozy lounge. Moo-la-la!

name: The Shittest Camp
description:
Our camp celebrates one of the most universal human experiences: poop. Through humor, art, and playful activities, we aim to normalize conversations around bodily functions and remind everyone that we all share the same basic human needs.

Our camp features a toilet-themed bar, a quirky camp museum, and a variety of interactive activities including DJ sets, comedy, scavenger hunts, and creative workshops. Everything is centered around bathroom humor and lighthearted fun.

We welcome everyone to stop by, laugh with us, and participate in the wonderfully ridiculous side of being human.

name: The Shrimp Ranch
description:
Howdy! Welcome to the Shrimp Ranch, where the Wild West meets the salty sea. We're a camp of new and seasoned looking to create a unique experience for the community in the only way we know how: through quirky food, music and event offerings. 

Our ragtag crew will transport you to an imagined past, where crustaceans roamed the frontier. Come learn the lore and embrace our culture at the famous Shrimp Ranch Rodeo! From shrimp snacks and shrimp brine martinis, to our Shrimp Yoga and Crabbin' Shack, get ready to live your nautical fantasy and somehow leave weirdly warmer (or cooler) than you came.

name: The Shuttle Home
description:
A welcoming tea lounge and connection space offering a calm refuge within Black Rock City. Centered around a shaded Tea Lounge, we host tea ceremonies, consent workshops, guided conversations, and intimate gatherings designed to encourage meaningful connection.

Our camp invites participants to slow down, share stories, and recharge in a warm and inclusive environment. With comfortable seating, soft lighting, and a relaxed atmosphere, The Shuttle Home serves as a grounding point for those seeking presence, reflection, and authentic human interaction.

Come by for tea, stay for connection, and leave feeling restored.

name: The Society of Supreme Excellence
description: The Society (for the Pursuit) of Supreme Excellence cordially invites you to pursue excellence in all facets of existence. We're here to support your journey towards pursuing excellence through a variety of excellent activities, including revitalising elixirs, nourishing pizza & supremely soul soothing bass.

name: The Sound Garden
description: We are a high vibe sound camp here to delight your senses with a unique 360 degree sound system that will blow your mind. By night we bring you some of the most talented DJ's and artists to create an unforgettable experience of movement, sound and performance. By day we host sound healings, deep house yoga, and listening parties of your favorite artists. We also offer body work, and a few healing workshops in our Garden Lounges

name: The Sultry Lodge
description:
A sultry crowd from 3 continents!

# A stunning UV-Black-Light Interactive-Art Exhibition:
from Dusk till Dawn.

# Lounge & Chill in Gentle Shade:
through Sultry Day till Fading Eventide.

# Get your hair Braided with colorful extensions:
Mon & Tue noon.
(** volunteer braiding helpers needed! **)

# Sandwiches, Coffee & Tea:
Wed late morning.

# Make your own jewelry out of colorful beads:
Weekdays daytime.

# Birthday Party for every Birthday Star on the Playa:
Thursday after sunset

name: The Surge
description: Come charge your small devices at THE SURGE's bar or living room. Join us for cold-brew coffee, morning meditation, education, conversation in our comfortable living room with a water mister, or grab a tasty brew or shot (or NA cocktail) at our fabulous bar. Join us for our Cancer Survivor circle on Tuesday and Thursday mornings at 11am. Come to our workshop How to become Solar Powered on Wednesday at noon. Come meditate with us at 10 am.

name: THE VEIL
description: Empyrean is an immersive, walk-through theatrical experience that invites you into a mystical journey of beauty, darkness, and transformation. Step inside our atmospheric realms where living art, interactive spirit guides, and cinematic staging surround you in a story you don't just watch, you walk through. When you emerge, drift into our luminous lounge, a sanctuary to reflect, unravel, and process the experience in beauty and connection.

name: The Wastelanders
description: Forged from scavenged tech, glowing mesh, and post industrial grit, this camp pulses with creative chaos.. By day, rogue artists, builders, and hackers gather for connection and playful acts of radical self-expression. By night, the Fire Zone comes alive with performances from local and visiting fire artists. Inside the Tech Noir Bar, wanderers trade stories over chilled drinks in a haze of neon and light. A convergence point for makers, performers, and resilient nomads keeping creativity alive.

name: THICC VIBEZ
description: We will have a branch from the giving tree art car that we have not used on the at car for sometime now. We will be mounting this 8' long horizontally arched branch 15' high off one of our frontage street corners, with 12' long GREEN vines hanging from the branch blowing in the wind like a flag. It looks just like the art car so people will know what camp we are when the art car is away from camp.

name: This Is It
description: This is a camp serving hot & iced tea with offerings of a phone charging station and ASL conversation.

name: Three of Cups
description: Cmon down to the tarot swamp to get swampy and get tarot'd.

name: Through the Looking Gl.ass
description: Ever wondered what it's like inside a colon? Now's your chance. Through the Looking Gl.ass is an immersive, walk-through colon exhibit that takes you on a journey through the human digestive tract - complete with glowing lights, and gurgling sounds. Step inside, walk through, and come out the other end with a new perspective on your gut health. Outside the exhibit, leave a message on our community Gut Feelings wall, take a screening pledge, and grab some cheeky swag. Open 10am to late night all week. No appointment necessary - just walk right in. We promise it won't hurt.

name: tiny camp
description: tiny camp is tiny

name: Titanic
description: Titanic's End is taking a year off, and instead, we are building a giant art activation in the Playa. Look for a giant ship where we will host many events. You can also find our builders at camp and with our HUB camps, Bangers Only and Mothership

name: Titicaca
description: Come and join us on the mystical shores of the exotic Lake Titicaca and enjoy our mountain hospitality.

name: Tossed and Sauced
description: Tossed and Sauced -- a few tossers and some fun-loving saucers are making pizza. We will have pizza on three scheduled days and a couple of pop-up parties. Bring good vibes and a napkin.

name: TOT
description: Where people are nice, the swing set is big and where you are welcome.

name: Totally 80s Disco Aerobic Inferno
description: Totally 80s Disco Inferno is here to knock your socks off. Come build your booty, legs, arms, the whole package, with Jane Fonda style Pilates, Pretty Pretty Pilates, and yoga. We'll also have a Disco Inferno dance party and Neon Night. During the day we'll have an open gym with cold water and fruit, and at night a cozy cuddle puddle tent where people can wind down

name: Touch Glass
description: Art support camp creating the 2026 Honoraria piece Kaleidoscope.

name: Tour de Chance
description: Êtes-vous chanceux? Ride the the Playa's largest French-themed bicycle-powered carnival game for marvelous prizes! But vélo beware, some are risqué.

name: TOWER69
description: A supportive camp for TOWER69 Mutant Vehicle. Hop on board! While we are on duty, you will not drown in the desert of loneliness!

name: Toxic Disco Clam
description: In the default world, the Toxic Disco Clam is a real aquatic creature. It uses its luminous lips to attract passing fish... and then it dazes them with acidic snot. We're pretty much the same: we draw you in with dazzling lights and entertaining activities, we ply you with our intoxicating beverages, and we hope you never leave.

name: TRANSCEND
description: A place to celebrate the sound of electronic music in all of its forms, a place to "TRANCSEND" mind, body and soul using any beat per minute you can imagine. Join us for this musical journey on Tuesday and Thursday afternoons!

name: Treble Makers
description:
Long day on playa? With a daily wine, music, and cheese pairing at sunset, you'll be able to enjoy some of life's most indulgent pleasures. Our artists are grass-fed, our red wine is selected and served by beret-wearing french busboys, and we will show you the difference between cheese and fu**ng fromage.

If you want to get to the next level of indulgence come enjoy the somatic gyrations delivered to your weary core by the one-and-only Buffer Bush. Swing on by and we will help you hit that higher note, we got your back!

name: Tree of Love
description: Step into a legendary oasis where ancient strength meets modern rhythm. Our camp welcomes all weary travelers to find shade under our monumental tree and dance in the shadow of heroic man and woman warrior statues. Whether you're looking to catch a high-energy sunset DJ set, admire the prototypes of our open-playa art, or simply cool down with a refreshing drink, we offer a cornerstone of community and creativity. Join us at the corner of the block to recharge your spirit and move your dusty feet. We can't wait to dance with you!

name: Turbaza Chayka
description: A playful, interactive camp blending vintage aesthetics with irreverent curiosity. Visitors can sip a fine selection of teas while browsing our vintage porn salon, send handwritten postcards through our Post Office of Questionable Taste, and collect stamps or temporary tattoos from the Department of Dubious Markings. Our Badge Bureau issues official credentials for deeply unofficial activities. For those seeking spectacle, the Ice Bucket Fishing Contest offers a lively, crowd friendly experience. In the evenings, our electric bike bar becomes a glowing gathering point with music, light, and connection. Part archive, part experiment, and part social space, the camp invites participation, humor, and shared moments on playa.

name: Turtle Camp
description: A quiet shady spot where SIMON the TURTLE can rest between playa cruises. Come visit SIMON in his "TURTLE CLURB", and cruise the playa in the luxury of SIMON's plushy turtle shell!

name: Twats Your Gender?
description:
An LGBTQ led camp inviting participants to explore creativity, identity, and connection through playful interactive experiences. 

Visitors can screen print personal items with the address of something meaningful and unique to this year's theme. Guests can also create whimsical insect artwork by stamping marbled paint from their bum to create wings onto a small canvas and adding bug bodies and details to design a one of a kind creature. Art can be taken home or left to dry in our gallery and collected later. 

Our intentionally provocative camp name is meant to spark conversation. Through humor, creativity, and participation we hope to encourage curiosity, foster understanding, and celebrate the radical inclusion that makes our community so powerful.

name: Twilight language
description: A collective of creators on a mission to realize conceptual visual art and cultivate energy around it. Our passion is to create bold, interactive, innovative, and novel experiences. Or maybe it's just the world's best pizza party...

name: Twisted
description: A vibrant gathering space where creativity, connection, and community come to life. Our camp features a welcoming bar with mixologists (you never know what drink concoction we might have!), a cozy coffee station, and a lively atmosphere with music by DJ Tokenoshi and live acoustic jam sessions. Expect a mix of interactive experiences, social spaces, and spontaneous fun. Our setup includes a well-lit cantina-style gathering hub, plush seating, bike racks, and unique art installations. No matter where we land on the playa, we are here to bring good vibes, great conversations, and unforgettable moments. Follow the twisted lights and join the fun.

name: Twisted Swan Celtic pub
description: The Twisted Swan and Bacchus! Come for a calm cool after noon or a nice cold pint at night.

name: Two Lanterns
description: Best weddings on the playa, with all the trimmings! Department of Wedding Planning is in our camp, consult with the experts.

name: U.F.O.
description: U.F.O. is an oasis by day to pamper yourself and relax in a cozy, shaded environment with great music. At night we turn up the bass and the fire. Lots of personality

name: Udder Nonsense
description: Something mysterious has appeared on the playa. A herd of cows, extraterrestrial, or possibly escaped from Fly Ranch, has set up camp, and they want you. Come climb the Milk Tower for panoramic playa views, race mini cow RC cars through our obstacle course, or slip on a pair of cow headphones and lose yourself in the Moo Lounge Rouge silent discow experience. Three times this week we throw our signature Happy Hour Cow Parties: milk-themed drinks, costumed servers, and a cowbell that rings every time someone orders non-dairy. By day look for the giant cow-print dome. By night, follow the glowing cow windsock in the sky. It's a cowspiracy. Have you herd? Come find out.

name: Uli Baba & the Horny Thieves
description:
The Finest Flesh Market in Black Rock City! 

In addition to the Ten Principles, our guiding inspiration is hospitality. We are always honored to serve our guests, even while subjecting them to cruel humiliation, voluntary servitude, and wanton drunkenness. Our gorgeous Moroccan tent is lushly furnished with wall-to-wall rugs, benches, and more pillows than you can count. Ours is a hard-working group of camp mates who come together to create a Moroccan oasis in Black Rock City. Auctions always Tuesday through Thursday at 2pm!

name: Uncle Larry's Misguided Burners
description: Home of KART Radio on 88.3FM! Listen to live music while getting weird on the streets of BRC!

name: Under the Big Top
description: Come visit our camp and enjoy talks and teachings of Qigong energy healing and various other modalities. Relax on the many couches in our chill space with introspective music in the background and fall into some fun and deep conversation about qigong and the meaning of life. Try out some of the dozens of hammocks hanging from an intricate and interesting hammock structure. In the mornings stop by for some yoga in the shade!

name: Unicorner
description:
A family-friendly haven for creativity, light-hearted fun, sharing, and magic! Come lounge in our stuffy pile and color in the UniDome and get a prescription at the Unicorn Advice Booth interactive installation!
Unicorner is created by a crew of hearty shenaniganists who have several goals on the playa: having lots of FUN, spreading lots of LOVE, and championing the 10 Principles of Burning Man in the most positive and supportive manner possible. We host daily activities of all sorts at the Unicorner (many of which are kid- and family-friendly) and encourage art, music, radical self-expression, and community!

name: Unitopia
description: A welcoming oasis of music, creativity, and connection. Our camp features a large shaded lounge where participants can relax, meet new friends, and enjoy playful daytime gatherings. Throughout the week we host morning yoga, coffee and music sessions, workshops, and our signature Unicorns and Spritz dance party. Our music art car SoGnarwhal occasionally docks at camp for special performances with DJs and cirque acts, bringing energy and celebration to our stage and dance floor. Whether you come for music, conversation, or a moment of rest, Unitopia invites you to step inside, share the space, and experience a little magic in the dust.

name: UniverseCity
description: Welcome to UniverseCity, the prestigious Black Rock City College of Arts and Sciences. Our accredited program issues diplomas on any subject matter, however imaginary. These range from the fictional and unlikely to major changes in life direction. Join us on campus and register at the Admissions Office to receive your Letter of Acceptance. Early in the week, attend New Student Orientation activities. Any day, come relax in our verdant Quad, take in lectures of questionable accuracy, gaze into our night time Planetarium. Later in the week we grant diplomas recognizing unique contributions to your field of study during a personalized graduation ceremony. We are a family-friendly camp, welcome all burners to our campus and encourage participation in launching your self-declared education.

name: UnStable
description:
We are a Mutant vehicle Support Camp for an MV named "Chester."
We will be sharing resources and supporting an art support camp called, "Apotheneum." They are a large scale interactive light and sound installation.

name: Vagabonds & Tagalongs
description: A camp for wanderers and wanderlust! Vags and Tags brings together an ever-expanding nationwide community of burners to co-create a space where everyone can feel at home. Come by and see for yourself why we've won the official BRC award for best friends on playa since 2012!

name: Vamp Camp
description: Burning since 1994, one of the oldest camps on playa. We are mostly Battle Born burners whom take pride in Nevada. We enjoy playa lore while sipping our signature Vamp Juice or a cup of joe. Stop by, we do bite!

name: Vault 21+
description:
Vault 21+ invites you to step into our 23-hour-a-day dive bar?that's right, 23 hours. If you're roaming the wasteland and thirsting for a drink, there's a good chance we're open? unless it's sunrise. In that case, take a moment to soak in the irradiated sunrise, then return when the time is right. We'll still be here, with a cold drink waiting for you.

This week, we've got a killer lineup of events, including Karaoke (for those brave enough to sing), themed parties (brace yourself for chaos), and food giveaways (because who doesn't love free rations?). Stop by, grab a drink, cool off in the heat, and kick back. All these activities come with a soundscape of non-stop, certified, vault-approved tunes to set the mood.

We can't wait to welcome your dusty, smiling faces into our vault.

name: VCamp - Vibrations in the Desert
description: A unique sound immersion experience designed to relax, ground, and awaken the senses. Our Vibration Lounge features specially designed vibration platforms equipped with built-in subwoofers that emit deep, resonant frequencies, creating full-body vibrations that promote mindfulness and presence. Visitors are invited to pause, tune in, and journey through curated soundscapes that inspire relaxation, clarity, and connection. Step into our space, close your eyes, and let the vibrations carry you to a place of inner balance.

name: Venice Red Light
description: A roaming tribe of artists, musicians, and delightful weirdos building a playground of sound, art, and human connection. From deep sonic journeys in our dome to unexpected encounters in our lounge, we create a space where strangers become friends (or lovers) and nights stretch into sunrise.

name: Very Inappropriate People
description:
A majority Las Vegas based camp with running daytime saloon events & nightly live music & DJ produced dance events.
Upon entrance you might be surprised with special pop-up performances, Vegas style casino games & inappropriate mobsters trying to swindle you into a deal.
Also known for famous shenanigans such as VIP bottle service surprise, Deer in headlights are art car stalking and many more

name: Vibe Check
description: Vibe Check is an oasis on the playa, here to welcome you in with a cold drink and a shady place to take a load off. Pull up for a drink at our swing bar or relax in a hammock while meeting new friends and enjoying good music.

name: Videogasm
description: Black Rock City's Playa Theater since 1998! Nightly video screenings on our 20' screen. Get your morning coffee at our Slurping Sloth Cafe. Body painting every afternoon in our shade structure. Play with our oversized games. Check out the Sleepy Pickle Bar for one of our daily themed happy hours. You Pick it Double Feature chosen by the citizens of BRC (come by and cast your vote.) Compete in one of our live Game/Talent Shows or walk our red carpet and talk to fellow filmmakers and content creators. Chill out on a hammock or battle it out as Kong or Godzilla in our Hollow Earth Mini-Dome. Home of The Black Rock City Film Festival. Live Rocky Horror Picture Show on Friday night! Contact us to show your original film on our twenty foot screen.

name: Vietnamese Iced Coffee Experience
description: VICE is an all inclusive, lgbtq-centric Burning Man Theme Camp returning for the 24th consecutive year to offer cool icy beverages during the heat of the day as well as several other activities for our fellow participants. We encourage diversity, participation, and acceptance and welcome new members from all locales and walks of life.

name: Vin Et Gare
description:
A queer aperitivo camp built around small offerings and shared moments.

A shaded lounge by day with tastings, drinks, and conversation. A gathering place by evening where identity, attraction, and curiosity blur together.

At night, look for us deep in the playa, where a table appears where it should not be, and a drink is waiting.

name: Vines Without Borders
description: A chill international wine bar and lounge open afternoons and evening daily, gifting great chilled wines and snacks from around the world, served by people from around the world. We celebrate a different wine producing region daily. Great music, fun people, curated tastings and something new every day.

name: Vitruvian
description: Turn your world upside down at Vitruvian Lounge. Enjoy good gyrations by taking a spin on our Human Sized Gyroscope, and stay to enjoy good vibrations in our lounge with great music and ice cold craft cocktails. Head into the K-Box for Korean-style private room karaoke to sing the night away together from 9pm to sunrise.

name: Vivarium
description: Step into a playful, welcoming front porch living room where conversation, comfort, and curiosity come first. Expect a mix of sensory delights, language lessons, music jams, whiskey and bad advice, and late-night grilled cheese hospitality. This is a camp for lingering, laughing, learning something unexpected, and connecting with strangers who may not stay strangers for long. Whether you stop in for a workshop or just need a soft place to land, you are welcome here.

name: Vomiting Sparrows
description: We serve the best Bloody Mary on the playa. We entertain, we make friends, we make fun, we welcome all. Keep an eye and ear open for our special events. Chirp Chirp Blarf!

name: VW Bus Camp
description: You are heartily invited to camp and participate with VW Bus Camp for Axis Mundi arriving on the Playa in an old VW Bus or other unique camper. VW Bus Camp is a wonderful and enduring Burning Man theme camp which has been placed and participated on the Playa every Burn since 1998. First, make sure to change out your leaky fuel lines, check your tires, carry a fire extinguisher and pack lots and lots of spare parts and join us participating in Bus Camp's many interactive projects. Yes, we still have a tie dye party amongst other cool stuff. This is a wonderful opportunity for you to bring out your own projects to share and to teach us all something new. Welcome Home and see you in the dust!

name: Waffles & House
description: We serve up delicious Waffles, with all your favorite toppings, ice cold drinks, and bumping House music for your dancing pleasure all week long! Don't forget to come by on Friday for a syrup licking good time, as that's when we host our world-famous Waffolympics!

name: Wally's Cowboy Kitchen
description: Interactive cooking camp for people to learn camp cooking and have a hot meal. Great place to hang out.

name: Wanderlust
description: Welcome to our Moroccan Themed Oasis in the Desert. Come join us for our fun activities. We look forward to seeing you on the Playa!!!

name: Wasted Sunshine
description: Frozen Lemonade FOR ALL AGES! Fantastic insults! Booze for consenting adults. AC Lounge chill zone.

name: Water Suckers
description: A welcoming bar and lounge camp with music, dancing, and a shaded space to gather on the playa. Our core interactivity is an open portrait and live sketch experience for the Black Rock City community, where passersby can sit for a quick portrait, share a story, strike a pose, or co-create a moment through drawing. Add a small story, poem, gesture, prompt, or playful offering to the exchange.

name: Water Temple
description:
Welcome to Water Temple a sanctuary of serenity, connection, and renewal in the heart of the playa. We're a theme camp dedicated to holding space for hydration, healing, and human connection through elemental experiences and desert hospitality.

At Water Temple, you'll find:
Cold, Kombucha (because hydration is sacred)
Guided meditations & sound baths
Shade, chill zones, and high-pressure misting
Yoga & gentle stretching sessions
Water Temple Speaks- Speaker Series 

We believe in sacred stillness, playful presence, and radical kindness. Whether you're seeking a soft reset or a moment of peace under the dusty sky, our temple doors are open to you.

name: Waterworks
description: A part of Burning Man's Department of Public Works, the Waterworks team manages the Civic Water Program. This includes the delivery logistics of large water deliveries on playa to infrastructure, honorarium art, and theme camps with interactive water usage.  Our office can be found on Esplanade at 5:20 between HEaT and Moop Map HQ.

name: Way Way SuperGood
description: If you've ever been crowned the international skee-ball champion of the entire universe two weeks in a row; If you've ever meant to ride off into the sunset on a hobby horse but got sidetracked fluffing pillows (Cajun Style) at a two-star hotel for decades during your search for your life's true destiny; If you've ever gotten so lost in a really good book that you forgot you can't read because you've been too busy calling all the shots; If you think you would like to know what it's like to fly through the air much the way a brick doesn't or even if you've said it before and you'll say it again before and you'll say it before and you'll say it again again... Stop it, Homegirl! You're trying to do too much. Come have a drink and dance with us instead. It's gonna be a Way Way SuperGood time

name: We < 3 CamPINK!
description: Join in our Family Reunion! We have large yard games for day and night play, Dj sets and our signature CamPINK! Karaoke after dark. Drop by our fabulously monochrome camp and tell us how PINK it is while you play tic-tac-toe, connect4, LED bocce, cornhole or glow Jenga. Or have a fancy cocktail while lounging in a shaded hammock enjoying our hospitality and PINKness. Everyone's a WINNER at CamPINK! Spin the recycle-regifty bin and take home a pink prize, or leave a suitable pink thing for the next playa player. Really feeling the moment, need more PINK in your life? Check out our thread rack to see if there's some new PINK fit waiting for you. We're all FAMILY at HOME on the Playa and everyone is PINK on the inside, right? Come join our Family Reunion in the Dust!

name: WeHaul
description: Your cool suburban friends who have the best living room and throw some cool parties if you're willing to commute to the edge of town. Welcoming weirdos who want to express themselves in as many ways as they can, misfit toys on the lookout for lost dreams in need of a new home, encouraging community, whimsy and a safe space to experience being alive! Occasionally known to be overrun by puppets and their leader, the Pink Secretary. WeHaul - Move yourself and rave!

name: Weird Steel
description: A dynamic Burning Man camp where steel artistry takes center stage. We are a collective of passionate artists and creators dedicated to pushing the boundaries of creativity through the medium of steel and steel-framed art installations. From Rhino Redemption, Medusa, and The Flower Tower, Fire Cathedral, Brass Ring just to name a few. Our camp is a celebration of innovation, imagination, and the transformative power of art.

name: Wetspot
description: Established in 2010 and based in Reno, NV, Wetspot is a playa favorite saloon for daytime fun and libations. We invite you to come kick in our doors and let us fill your cup with an ice-cold draft beer or our legendary Skip-and-Go Naked cocktail. Feeling like your burn needs a little more, burn? We've got you covered with a shot of our spicy tequila. You just might end up on the Wall of Flame! Drinking not your thing? That's okay too! Wetspot is about making new friends in an open-to-all setting. Dancing and laughter are guaranteed. Cheers!

name: What Would You Do For A Pickle?
description: Come join us and play the Pickle Game and find out what YOU would do for a pickle! Spankings sold separately.

name: Whiskey and Dust
description:
We are a Whiskey Theme Camp with a habitual yoga problem, as we like to joke.
Serving mid-high end whiskey at our funky little bar. Best damn whiskey bar on the playa bar none.

name: White Elephant Exchange
description: The White Elephant Exchange is a waypoint for roving pachyderms from all eras, generations, and originations to gather. We are brought together by our love of our substantial Funkadelephant and joy of celebrations and adventures. Come by to find the Funkadelephant and its growing family, or come find us roaming the wide open Playa.

name: WHOMP WAGON
description: Whomp Wagon Art Car

name: Whynauts
description:
Come enjoy our Cosmic Cabana Series (Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday Afternoons): Whynauts' signature afternoon oasis sanctuary from the playa's heat. 

Each day features a unique theme aligned with the Axis Mundi concept - from grounded human connection to celestial artistic offerings. 

Step into a sanctuary designed to restore and soothe: by being nourished with hand-fed frozen grapes, delicious quesadillas, and refreshing celestial coolers (sparkling lemonades) while forging connections with Whynauts alien hosts and fellow travelers.

name: Wild Child
description:
Run away and join our circus community, hosted by world-class circus artists, where each day is filled with workshops designed to ignite your passion for movement and performance.

Explore the world of Aerial hoop, pole dance, partner acrobatics, fire dancing & flow props, parkour, flips and more.

Whether you're a seasoned performer or a curious beginner, our inclusive community welcomes all skill levels.

Step into Wild Child and join us for an unforgettable circus adventure.

name: Wild Free Spirit
description: An immersive art experience set inside a large motorhome with seating and immersive lighting. The general welcoming area will be lit with shade, lighting and seating. The immersive art experience and general welcoming areas are open to all ages

name: Wild Tribe
description: Wild Tribe is a camp of professional circus artists and fire dancers.

name: Witches Brew
description:
WE are a Coven of Fire performers, willworkers, and coffee connoisseurs Dedicated to the love of our craft. < 3
JOIN US, and embrace the magick within all of existence!!!

name: Wok Paper Scissors
description: Welcome to Wok Paper Scissors! Here in Sizzle City you battle for your stir fry. Come one, come all to Wok Paper Scissors, serving stir fry on the playa daily. To get your hands on a bowl of our delicious delights, you must first win a game of rock-paper-scissors! Do you have what it takes when noodles are at stake?

name: Wonder Camp
description: The Department of Wonder is our on-playa bike shop. We offer bike repair service and education every day of the event through man-burn.

name: Word Play Cafe
description: Word Play Cafe is the space at Burning Man dedicated entirely to word games for people to gather, play and learn together. Visitors to Word Play Cafe can play favorite daily games, classic word games, and custom games like our Burning Man themed crossword, and other new word games we created just for Burning Man in our 30 ft dome. We have daily events such as panel discussions featuring game developers, facilitated group games and friendly competitions.

name: Worst Bar
description: Drink Shit and Die: Worst Bar gifts experiences in the form of beverages/rituals during our scheduled Unhappy Hours. The consensual experiences are not pleasurable in the expected sense and include but are not limited to mild or moderate elements of pain, humiliation, embarrassment, and disgust or combinations thereof.

name: WrongoWrongo
description: The home of the mutant vehicle Uuna Ahi and your somewhat friendly neighborhood mutant vehicle repair oasis.

name: Wrongtown
description:
Wrongtown is an international family reunion gathering year round at events around the globe including Burning Man which is the main event! We have members on almost every Continent and from all walks of life.

Our goal is to create a community space for our friends and family to experience the playa to its fullest. The camp works together to provide everything needed to survive on the playa including an amazing chill space, equipped kitchen, covered tent city and camp showers. While Wrongtown provides the infrastructure, everyone is expected and counted on to work, to build, strike and keep things running during the event including internal camp operations as well as running interactivity.

Providing everything to survive allows our campmates to focus on amazing projects and epic performances

name: X marks the spot
description: The place where the treasures of family and friends are found. We camp together to enjoy a week of sharing, creativity and beauty. We gather here to reconnect with old friends and make new friends. We like being a small part of this huge community.

name: XOXO
description:
Welcome to your oasis on the playa! Kick back on our loungers, sip icy-cold refreshments that rotate daily, snack on coconut pancakes, and get ready to make some awesome connections. Whether you're shaking it at our parties, stretching at our yoga class, or enjoying sunset views over BRC from our scaffold, there's no shortage of ways to meet new friends.

With friendly people, chill vibes, and a whole lotta love, XOXO is all about making meaningful connections. We've got beats that'll get you dancing, interactivity that'll make you laugh, and an atmosphere that's pure magic. Come for the pancakes, stay for the vibes!

name: Xpat Alien
description:
Xpat Alien has searched far and wide, through many galaxies, to find a new place to rest our travel weary heads. Earth fits the bill and we have decided to stay.
We bring with us the Crop Circle Cantina, complete with 80' of circular shade, phenomenal DJs spinning epic tunes, a bar top with stripper poles for dancing shenanigans, six 3-butt benches to relax on, Colorado brewed craft beer and root beer on tap, and glasses full of ice filled with our own Alien Punch.

name: XXX-MAS
description:
XXXmas! A place where things are as random as a wild holiday themed camp is in a dry ancient lake bed in August where people from around the world hangout to celebrate this special time of year together. From our fully stocked pickle bar and ice cream station to 3 foot chess pieces and pictures with some guy we just met who thinks he is the real Santa Clause, this is a place you sure don't want to miss. Open to visitors pretty much 24/7! Stop by, say hi?

Yep that rhymed-

name: Y Knot Saloon
description: A late 1800s western town with a saloon on wheels, an apothecary, and a water tower. Come for a refreshing beverage, views, and live music.

name: Yabba Dabba Do Me
description: Celebrating 30 years on the playa, the return of Yabba Dabba Do Me, a trampoline suspended from a giant net of bungee cords. Do you think you're a stable person? Then come and enter our "Last Burner Standing" contests. They happen periodically during the week. Every action has a reaction. Every motion has an emotion.

name: Yellow Balloon
description: A clean and sober camp, offering a space for fun, connection, and wellness without the influence of substances. We host daily AA meetings, wellness events like yoga and breathwork, and interactive art experiences designed to uplift and engage. Our camp is a vibrant community of burners who love to have a great time while staying clean and sober throughout the burn. We welcome all Burners to attend our activities and anyone curious to explore a sober experience to hang out, providing a supportive, inclusive space to thrive. Join us for a unique blend of fun, recovery, and creativity!

name: Yellow Bike Project
description: Home of the Yellow Bike Project. Please bring all Yellow Bikes in need of repair here. We will be fixing them for release back into the city. Remember not to hoard, decorate/alter, or take home Yellow Bikes . Yellow Bikes are not to be inside any camp at any time. SHARE them.

name: Yes Please
description:
Yes: adv. — Used to express affirmation, agreement, positive affirmation, or consent.
Please: adv. — Give pleasure to or to be pleasing to; give satisfaction.
Yes Please is the answer to every question. Come chill in our calm and revitalizing sanctuary, dance with new friends, and experience our inclusive oasis of sex-positivity, queer empowerment, and love. Be sure to visit our infamous Non-Monogamy Advice Booth.

name: You Light Up My Ride
description: Disappointed by a poorly lit bike last night on the playa? Never fear! You Light Up My Ride is here to help and inspire you to fabulously light up your rig! Come visit us to get your bike better lit up and stay for a while and share a deep laugh or two.

name: You Look Amazing
description:
You Look Amazing is not just a camp name, but a state of mind. We LOVE each and everyone of you and want to get to know you better. 

Our camp is an oasis of wellness at Burning Man. Where mind, body, and spirit converge in a harmonious dance of rejuvenation and exploration. Nestled amidst the pulsating energy of the playa, our camp offers a sanctuary unlike any other—a haven where participants can immerse themselves in a holistic journey of self-discovery and transformation.

Join us for yoga, mindfulness, workshops, dancing and the best crepes you've ever had, we promise. They're better than sex. 

So come, weary travelers, and let us wrap you in dusty hugs and smiles. Tell us your stories and we'll tell you ours.

name: YOUniversal Teahouse
description:
Iranian / Persian Tea House, daily from 12pm to 8pm.

Come by for Iranian pure saffron shots, exotic desert drinks teas / sherbets and yummy artisanal treats like sohan (saffron brittle) all served with a dose of Iranian / Persian Mysticism and loving hospitality that Iranian Sufi mystics like Rumi, Hafez and Ferdowsi would be proud of! :)

On Wednesday night we will host an open Iranian dinner that should not be missed. Authentic hot homemade Iranian / Persian food / stews / rice and tadeeg on the Playa!

name: Your New Friend
description: Supporting the "Your New Friend" deep playa art piece, we also welcome you to drop in and say hello to the idiots gathered here at camp. We would love to hear your Burning Man story, and promise to only make a tiny amount of fun of you.

name: Yummm
description: Yummm is a camp dedicated to creating Yummmy (non-food) moments for everyone on playa!

name: Yummy RUMInations
description: Come taste anything real or imagined at the Yum Cart! Playfully-mindful camp uniting burners through laughter, curiosity, and consciousness. Daily experiments in vulnerability, intimacy, self-discovery, and storytelling.

name: Zazen
description: Come by and relax in our shade, race our slalom course, and grab a cup of Elvis Espresso every morning. We are a open and welcoming camp excited to meet new and old burners and share the magic of Black Rock together!

name: Zeniza
description: A warm pocket of ritual, music, and hospitality where strangers become companions. By day, we gather for mate ceremonies and guided mezcal tastings rooted in storytelling, curiosity, and connection. By night, we open the space for shared celebration with music, food, drinks, and a welcoming energy that invites people to linger. Come by to reset, connect, and leave with a new story.

name: Zero Fucks
description: A consortium of friends who love being weird together, throwing dark techno parties in secret shipping containers, and exploring creative boundaries. We haven't missed it yet.

name: Zeta zone
description: Art supporting camp for Wisdom Oasis art installation, all around good camp
